page_content:
Posisi: Data Analyst
Perusahaan: PT Matahari Department Store Tbk
Skill Dibutuhkan: Analytical skills, Numerical skills, Attention to detail, Proficient in Microsoft Excel, Familiar with data visualization tools, Data management, Data analysis
Pengalaman: 1–2 years of experience in data analysis, business operations, or project support.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Statistics, Industrial Engineering, or a related field.
Tugas Utama: Collect, manage, and analyze large datasets related to store performance and operational efficiency; support ongoing business and improvement projects by providing data insights, reports, and dashboards; collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure accuracy and consistency of business data; assist in identifying trends, issues, and opportunities based on data analysis to support decision-making; develop and improve data tracking systems or templates to increase reporting efficiency.

metadata.original_description:
Responsibilities:
Collect, manage, and analyze large datasets related to store performance and operational efficiency.
Support ongoing business and improvement projects by providing data insights, reports, and dashboards.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Operations, Merchandising, and Finance) to ensure accuracy and consistency of business data.
Assist in identifying trends, issues, and opportunities based on data analysis to support decision-making.
Develop and improve data tracking systems or templates to increase reporting efficiency.
Requirements
:
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Statistics, Industrial Engineering, or a related field.
1–2 years of experience in data analysis, business operations, or project support.
Strong analytical and numerical skills with attention to detail.
Proficient in Microsoft Excel and familiar with data visualization tools.
Comfortable handling large datasets and transforming them into actionable insights.

page_content:
Posisi: Data Analyst
Perusahaan: PT 8 ELEMENTS
Skill Dibutuhkan: Google Data Studio, BigQuery, Power BI, Excel, Gsheet, SQL, Tableau, Metabase, Python, data analysis, data visualization, mathematics, statistics, data structures, analytical skills, problem-solving skills
Pengalaman: Data analysis expert with experience in data programming languages and visualization software.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Tugas Utama: Utilize tools to analyze Marketing data, create dynamic dashboards and reports, collaborate with Sales and Marketing teams, integrate data from various sources, monitor KPIs, set up monitoring and alerts, perform predictive analysis, and provide training and support to team members.

metadata.original_description:
Job Description
Data Analysis and Interpretation: Utilize tools like Google Data Studio, BigQuery, and Power BI to analyze Marketing data and extract meaningful insights.
Developing Reporting Dashboards: Create dynamic dashboards and reports that provide real-time insights into Sales, Marketing, Product performance.
Collaborating with Sales and Marketing Teams: Work closely with other teams to understand their data needs and provide insights that inform strategy and decision-making.
Data Integration and Management: Integrate data from various sources to provide a comprehensive view of Products, Services, Campaigns, Company performance.
Performance Tracking: Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure the effectiveness of campaigns, activities and strategies.
Monitoring and Alerts: Set up a data-driven system to alert positive and negative deviations for key parameters
Predictive Analysis: Use data to predict trends and market movements, aiding in proactive strategy development.
Training and Support: Provide training and support to team members in using data analysis tools and understanding reports.
Be an independently working professional with a creative mind and drive for results and success
Minimum Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Strong foundation in mathematics, statistics, and data structures.
Data analysis expert with experience in data programming languages and visualization software (Excel/Gsheet, SQL, Tableau, Metabase, Python, etc.)
Advanced excel modeling and data visualization skills
Very strong analytical and problem-solving mindset
Data Warehouses: Snowflake, BigQuery, Amazon Redshift

page_content:
Posisi: OSINT Analyst/Investigator (People Search)
Perusahaan: PT. Bukit Silikon Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Online research, Open-source intelligence (OSINT), Data analysis, Documentation, Pattern recognition, Written and verbal communication in English, Attention to detail, Independent work, Technical familiarity with APIs or scripting languages (Python, SQL), Social media investigation techniques, Digital footprint analysis
Pengalaman: Prior experience as a Fraud Analyst, People Locator Specialist, Contact Information Researcher, Skip Tracing Specialist, Investigation Analyst, or Data Verification Specialist is highly desirable.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Criminology, Data Science, Information Systems, Intelligence Studies, Journalism, or a related field.
Tugas Utama: Conduct online research to locate individuals based on partial data, use OSINT tools and public databases to gather and verify information, analyze and validate data from multiple sources, build and maintain structured search reports, identify patterns and connections between individuals, work with technical teams to improve automation tools, ensure compliance with privacy and data protection laws.

metadata.original_description:
About Us:
Join our dynamic, innovative team at PT Bukit Silikon Indonesia! We are a leading technology firm specializing in cutting-edge solutions in artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML).
We're committed to transforming businesses and enhancing user experiences through smart technology. If you're passionate about AI and advanced analytics, come be a part of our mission to shape the future.
Job Description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and resourceful
People Search Analyst
to help identify and locate individuals in the United States using limited or incomplete personal information. This role involves deep online research, cross-referencing multiple public data sources, and using investigative or data tools to find accurate and verifiable results.
You’ll play a key part in our data intelligence operations, helping clients or systems connect fragmented information to real people profiles.
Responsibilities:
Conduct online research to locate individuals based on partial data (e.g., name, city, phone number, or social media clues).
Use open-source intelligence (OSINT) tools, public databases, and social media platforms to gather and verify information.
Analyze, cross-check, and validate data from multiple sources to ensure accuracy.
Build and maintain structured search reports and documentation of each investigation.
Identify patterns, aliases, or connections between individuals and related entities.
Work with technical teams to improve automation tools or search processes (if applicable). Ensure compliance with all privacy and data protection laws (GDPR, CCPA, etc.).
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in
Criminology, Data Science, Information Systems, Intelligence Studies,
Journalism
, or a related field.
Prior experience as a
Fraud Analyst , People Locator Specialist, Contact Information
Researcher, Skip Tracing Specialist, Investigation Analyst
, or
Data Verification Specialist
is
highly desirable.
Proven experience in
people search
,
background checks
,
skip tracing
,
private investigation
,
or
OSINT research
.
Proficiency with online research, advanced Google operators, and open-source data platforms.
Familiarity with public record databases (LexisNexis, BeenVerified, Spokeo, Whitepages, Pipl, etc.).
Strong analytical, documentation, and pattern recognition skills.
Excellent written and verbal communication in English.
High attention to detail and ability to work independently.
Preferred / Nice to have skills:
Hands-on experience with OSINT or investigation tools (Maltego, SpiderFoot, IntelTechniques, etc.).
Technical familiarity with APIs or scripting languages (Python, SQL) for data enrichment or automation.
Knowledge of social media investigation techniques and digital footprint analysis.
Background in data compliance, digital forensics, or threat intelligence. Prior work experience in the US legal, data, or security research sector.
Why Join Us?
Competitive salary.
Hybrid working.
Strategic office location. Accessible by TransJakarta Bus.
Opportunity to work with some of the brightest minds in the industry.
Career development opportunities and access to ongoing professional training.
A culture that values innovation, inclusivity, and sustainability.

metadata.original_description:
Job Description – Data Analyst (Hybrid)
Location: Jakarta (Hybrid)
Ringkasan Peran
Data Analyst bertanggung jawab untuk mengumpulkan, mengolah, dan menganalisis data kompetitor untuk menghasilkan insight yang mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis. Hasil analisis akan disampaikan secara teratur dalam bentuk laporan mingguan kepada tim internal.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
Melakukan riset berkala terhadap kompetitor (layanan, harga, positioning, aktivitas pemasaran, dsb.).
Mengumpulkan data dari berbagai sumber (website, publikasi, laporan industri, media sosial, dll).
Menganalisis data untuk mengidentifikasi tren pasar, perubahan strategi, serta peluang atau risiko.
Menyusun laporan mingguan yang ringkas, sistematis, dan mudah dipahami.
Membuat visualisasi data (grafik, tabel, dashboard) agar insight dapat dipahami dengan cepat.
Berkolaborasi dengan tim lintas divisi (misalnya marketing, business development, dan manajemen).
Memberikan rekomendasi berbasis data untuk mendukung strategi perusahaan.
Menjaga akurasi data dan konsistensi metode analisis.
Mendukung pengembangan tools internal untuk membantu proses pemantauan kompetitor.
Kualifikasi
Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Statistik, Ekonomi, Data Science, Business Intelligence, atau terkait.
Pengalaman minimal 1–2 tahun sebagai Data Analyst (fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar).
Terbiasa bekerja dengan data dalam jumlah besar dan menghasilkan insight yang bernilai.
Menguasai tools analitik seperti Excel/Google Sheets, Power BI, Tableau, atau sejenisnya.
Memiliki kemampuan riset yang kuat dan perhatian tinggi terhadap detail.
Mampu membuat laporan yang jelas, terstruktur, dan mudah dipahami.
Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun kolaboratif.
Proaktif, analitis, dan berorientasi pada hasil.
Pengetahuan mengenai riset kompetitif menjadi nilai tambah.
Sistem Kerja
Hybrid
– kombinasi kerja remote dan onsite (Jakarta).
Deliverables Utama
Laporan analisis kompetitor mingguan.
Rekomendasi strategis.
Dashboard sederhana untuk pemantauan kompetitor (opsional).
Soft Skills
Critical thinking
Manajemen waktu yang baik
Detail oriented
Adaptable
Komunikatif & kolaboratif

metadata.original_description:
Senior Product Analyst / Senior Product Operations Analyst (Data-Focused)
Department:
Product Operations
Location:
Remote (Indonesia)
Role Overview
We’re looking for a
data-driven Senior Product Analyst / Senior Product Operations Analyst
with a knack for
root cause analysis (RCA)
, a solid grasp of
product operations
, and can connect the dots between
data and product operations
.
You’ll use dashboards, data pulls, and ML-driven outputs to identify patterns, troubleshoot performance issues, and help the business make smarter decisions faster.
You won’t be coding full dashboards — Instead, you’ll
slice and dice the data
, investigate anomalies, partner with analytics to get deeper pulls and
collaborate with analytics/data science teams
to apply machine learning insights in a product operations setting.
Key Responsibilities
Root Cause Analysis & Troubleshooting
Investigate performance anomalies (e.g., contact rate drops, deliverability issues, spam triggers, carrier code failures).
Use
Tableau
and backend data to trace issues from symptom to root cause.
Document RCAs with clear findings, proposed solutions, and follow-up on implementation.
Data Analysis & Operational Insights
Monitor and interpret KPIs like contact rates, deliverability %, spam block rates, and conversion rates.
Perform
ongoing trend analysis
and shareouts to inform daily operational decisions.
Good to have if you can apply AI/ML-powered tools to detect hidden patterns, predict anomalies, and automate parts of the analysis process.
Experimentation & Optimization
Design and evaluate
A/B tests
and controlled experiments on texting cadences, campaign routing, and engagement strategies.
Analyze experiment outcomes (including ML-based predictions) to recommend
data-backed optimizations
.
Reporting & Communication
Deliver recurring performance reports for key product and growth metrics — ensuring they lead to
clear, actionable changes
.
Present findings clearly to both technical and non-technical teams.
Collaborate closely with the
Data Analytics and Data Science teams
for custom pulls, ML insights, and deeper analysis.
Qualifications
Must-Have:
4+ years
experience as a Data Analyst, Product Analyst, Product Operations Analyst, or similar role.
Strong RCA skills — methodical, detail-oriented, able to find the true cause of an issue.
Proficiency with BI tools (especially
Tableau
) for insight generation.
Ability to interpret large datasets, identify anomalies, and spot trends quickly.
Quick learner with the ability to grasp new product workflows and data pipelines fast.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Nice-to-Have:
Basic understanding of ML models (classification, regression, clustering) and their business applications.
Basic SQL querying skills for self-service exploration.
Familiarity with messaging operations (10DLC, toll-free, compliance).
Experience in A/B testing and campaign optimization.
What Success Looks Like
Every RCA you own leads to a
clear, evidence-backed solution
.
Trends and risks are spotted early, preventing performance losses.
You become the
bridge between product operations and analytics
, turning data into decisions that move the needle.
Should be comfortable working from 6.30 pm to 3.30 am WIB.

metadata.original_description:
Eklipse.gg is an AI‑powered clipping and editing service tailored for streamers and content creators. It scans your Twitch, YouTube, Kick, or Facebook Gaming stream VODs to automatically detect and generate highlight clips—think clutch plays, reactions, and high-action moments—then repackages them into vertical videos ready for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.
Data Analyst
Responsibilities:
Mine and analyze data from company databases to drive optimization and improvement of product development, marketing techniques, and business strategies.
Assess the effectiveness and accuracy of new data sources and data-gathering techniques
Develop custom data models and algorithms to apply to data sets.
Coordinate with different functional teams to implement models and monitor outcomes.
Develop processes and tools to monitor and analyze model performance and data accuracy.
Requirements:
Having 2-3 years of experience manipulating data sets and building statistical models.
Having experience using Python minimal 1 year.
Education background: Bachelor's degree, but preferable from a Master's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, or another quantitative field (Fresh Graduate Welcome). GPA must be 3.00+
Young and energetic person.
Strong problem-solving skills with an emphasis on product development.
Experience using statistical computer languages (R, Python, SLQ, etc.) to manipulate data and draw insights from large data sets.
Experience working with and creating data architectures.
Deep knowledge of handling big data.
Knowledge of various machine learning techniques (clustering, decision tree learning, artificial neural networks, etc.) and their real-world advantages/drawbacks.
Knowledge of advanced statistical techniques and concepts (regression, properties of distributions, statistical tests, proper usage, etc.) and experience with applications.
A drive to learn and master new technologies and techniques.
Adaptable to dynamic work environments.
Understanding gaming trends is a plus.
Note:
There is a test for every suitable candidate.
Only the candidates who pass the test will be invited to an interview session.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
We are seeking a talented Data Analyst Consultant to join our team at PT Sodexo Sinergi Indonesia on a contract basis. This is an exciting opportunity to leverage your data analysis skills and expertise to support the strategic objectives of our dynamic and innovative company. As a Data Analyst Consultant, you will be based in Jakarta and play a crucial role in extracting valuable insights from complex data sets to inform and drive key business decisions.
What you'll be doing
Collect, clean, and validate large datasets from multiple sources
Perform advanced analytics to identify trends, inefficiencies, and growth opportunities
Translate analytical findings into actionable business recommendations
Partner with sales and commercial teams to align insights with strategic objectives
Develop dashboards and reports using tools like Power BI/Tableau
Present insights and recommendations to senior stakeholders in a clear, structured manner
Support the design and implementation of data-driven sales strategies
Monitor performance metrics and propose continuous improvement initiatives
What we're looking for
Minimum 5 years in data analytics or consulting roles (experience with sales/commercial data preferred)
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Analytics, Statistics, Business, or related field
Strong proficiency in data manipulation, modelling and visualisation using tools such as SQL, Excel, Tableau or Power BI (Experience with Python or R for advanced analytics is a strong plus)
Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to draw meaningful insights from complex data
Experience in translating business requirements into data-driven solutions
Good understanding of data management principles and data governance best practices
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills to effectively present insights and recommendations
Familiarity with the Information & Communication Technology industry and business/systems analysis is preferred
What we offer
At PT Sodexo Sinergi Indonesia, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. In addition to a competitive salary, you will have the opportunity to work with a talented and supportive team, access to ongoing professional development, and a range of health and wellbeing benefits to support your work-life balance.
About us
PT Sodexo Sinergi Indonesia is a leading provider of integrated facilities management and food services solutions in Indonesia. With a strong focus on innovation, sustainability and customer satisfaction, we are dedicated to creating a better quality of life for our clients, their employees and the communities we serve. Join us on our mission to enhance the daily lives of those around us.
Apply now to become our next Data Analyst Consultant and be a part of our dynamic and purpose-driven team.

metadata.original_description:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!
‎
‎
Job Description
We are seeking a Data Analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner for our business stakeholders and product management teams across of our business and product domains. In this role, you will leverage data to drive insights, support decision-making, and provide actionable recommendations that will shape the direction of our products and business strategies. Some of the key responsibilities that you will have are:
Database: design, test, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g Product Engineering, Data Engineering) to enable, extract, or enrich data/data pipeline.
Reporting: design, build, and disseminate dashboards or other self-served data products to enable stakeholders get quick business performance, conduct data exploration, or derive quick insights.
Analysis: design, perform, and disseminate descriptive or diagnostic analyses with valuable findings and actionable insights to better understand the business.
Experimentation: design, analyze, and disseminate experiments or causal-impact studies to test multiple hypotheses, variants, or initiatives and infer the best result(s) based on relevant success metrics.
Modeling: design, develop, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g Product Engineering, Machine Learning Engineer, Data Scientist) to deploy supervised or unsupervised models as per business needs to optimize business performance.
‎
Requirements
Several openings are available across multiple domains and levels
Bachelor/Master's degree majoring in Statistics, Mathematics, Physics, Computers/Informatics, Engineering, Economics, or equivalent
Good communication, presentation, and storytelling skills to deliver data-inspired findings, also passionate in data, analysis, or insights with high curiosity character.
2-5 years of full time data analyst experience (open for prior experience in scientist and engineerr).
2-5 years of hands-on experience with SQL, spreadsheet, and R/Python.
2=5 years of dashboarding experience with BI or dataviz tools (Tableau, Looker Studio, Domo etc.).
Prior experience in conducting statistical experimentation or A/B testing is a plus.
Prior experience in developing unsupervised/supervised models is a plus.
Prior experience in working on cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure, etc.) is a plus.
‎
If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!

page_content:
Posisi: Soil Health Officer
Perusahaan: PT Timbang Deli Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Statistical analysis, Communication, Teamwork, Independent work, Collaborative work, Microbial analysis, Knowledge of nitrogen-fixing symbionts
Pengalaman: Experience with microbial analysis or nitrogen-fixing symbionts is a plus.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Agriculture (Agronomy, Soil Science, Agribusiness), Biology (ecology, microbiology), or related field.
Tugas Utama: Support the planning, coordination, and evaluation of soil health regeneration initiatives; work with various teams to implement best practices for soil quality; conduct testing and provide recommendations; collect, manage, and analyze trial data; prepare reports and presentations; travel to field sites for trial activities.

metadata.original_description:
About Verdant :
Verdant is a plantation science company in North Sumatra driving sustainable, high-yield solutions for the Indonesian oil palm industry. Our mission is to boost productivity on existing land — helping reduce deforestation, lower emissions, and strengthen long-term food security.
We combine world-class plantation science with hands-on field implementation. From genetics to agronomy and soil health, our teams work side by side to deliver practical science that makes a real difference.
We are now expanding our Soil Health team to strengthen soil regeneration and sustainable agronomy programs — focusing on improving soil function, organic matter, and long-term plantation resilience through science-based approaches and collaborative field implementation.
What You Will Do :
Support the planning, coordination, and evaluation of soil health regeneration initiatives across Verdant’s operations.
Work closely with field, plantation science, and sustainability teams to implement best practices that improve soil quality and long-term productivity.
Conduct testing and provide recommendations for soil-improvement solutions in both nursery and field trials.
Collect, manage, and analyse trial data, and prepare clear reports and presentations.
Occasionally travel to field sites to support trial activities and data collection.
What We Are Looking For :
Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Agriculture (Agronomy, Soil Science, Agribusiness), Biology (ecology, microbiology), or related field.
Strong interest in soil regeneration and sustainable plantation management.
Good statistical analysis, communication, and teamwork skills.
Ability to work independently and collaboratively across disciplines.
Experience with microbial analysis or nitrogen-fixing symbionts is a plus.
Comfortable communicating in English.
Why Join Us
At Verdant, you will be part of a mission-driven and science-led team committed to transforming plantation productivity responsibly. You will have the opportunity to:
Work on cutting-edge soil regeneration innovations that directly improve environmental and economic outcomes.
Collaborate with passionate scientists and field professionals across diverse disciplines.
Gain exposure to both plantation science and real-world operations — from field data to practical implementation.
Contribute to a sustainable future for Indonesia’s palm industry

Perusahaan: A&W Restaurants Indonesia

Pengalaman: At least 3 years of experience in the F&B or relevant industry.

metadata.original_description:
We’re looking for a skilled Data Analyst with a passion for numbers and a solid understanding of the Food & Beverage (F&B). This role is ideal for someone who thrives on turning complex data into clear business insights and enjoys working cross-functionally with teams like operations, marketing and finance.
Responsibilities:
Sales & Revenue Analysis: Track and interpret key metrics such as average order value, sales per item, and revenue trends.
Inventory & Supply Chain Analysis: Monitor food costs, wastage, and inventory turnover to optimize supply chain performance.
Customer Behavior Analysis: Identify patterns in customer preferences, peak hours, and feedback for improved service and retention.
Operational Efficiency: Analyse data on staffing, kitchen output, and delivery times to improve day-to-day operations.
Menu Engineering: Evaluate item profitability and popularity to support strategic menu decisions.
Cost of Goods Sold (COGS): Assess how raw material costs influence profit margins.
Seasonality & Promotions: Analyse the impact of holidays, seasons, and marketing campaigns on sales performance.
POS Systems: Work with data from systems to derive actionable insights.
Fixed Asset Records: Verify and manage records of fixed assets at various restaurant locations.
Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Mathematics, Statistics, or a related quantitative field.
At least 3 years of experience in the F&B or relevant industry.
Advanced Excel skills, including formulas, pivot tables, dashboards, and charts.
Experience working with relational databases (e.g., querying sales and inventory data).
Basic programming knowledge for analysis using Python, SQL, or similar tools.
Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical findings to non-technical teams (managers, marketers).
Problem-solving mindset with a keen eye for uncovering insights that drive business decisions.
Collaborative attitude and experience working with cross-functional teams.

metadata.original_description:
Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team
We drive innovation and operational excellence by turning data into actionable strategies that elevate the end-to-end experience for consumers, driver-partners, and merchant-partners. From optimizing transaction flows and platform efficiency to enhancing reliability, we strive to make Grab the first choice, every time.
Get to Know the Role
You will report to the Product Analytics Manager, TP and you'll have the unique opportunity to collaborate across disciplines (Product, Business, Engineering, Design, Data Science) to transform data into dynamic solutions. Your insights will directly contribute to developing groundbreaking products and initiatives, setting new benchmarks for excellence. This isn't just any role; it's a chance to make a tangible impact on millions of lives every day. You will report to Analytics Manager and based in Jakarta office.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
You will understand our requirements and outcomes to ensure data-driven decision-making.
You will conduct tailored analyses for specific products and operations, define critical business metrics, track them rigorously, and recommend continuous improvements.
You will frame business scenarios and propose features that impact critical business processes and decisions.
You will transform requirements into concise insights through reports, presentations, and dashboards, and consolidate data from multiple sources to create comprehensive views for decision-making.
You will develop data pipelines and custom data science models to solve identified problems.
You will launch A/B tests, analyze the results, and provide recommendations based on your findings.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
You have at least 4 years of experience in data-related or quantitative fields such as Analytics, Science, Statistics, or Mathematics.
You are fluent with SQL, Python, R or other scripting/programming languages.
You are experienced in handling large datasets and maintaining complex Extract, Transform and Load (ETL) processes.
You have solid statistical knowledge and hands-on experience running and analysing controlled experiments.
You are proficient in creating dashboards using Tableau, PowerBI or other visualisation tools.
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with
Term Life Insurance
and comprehensive
Medical Insurance.
With
GrabFlex,
create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through
Parental
and
Birthday leave
, and give back to your communities through
Love-all-Serve-all (LASA)
volunteering leave
We have a confidential
Grabber Assistance Programme
to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab
We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

b. Data Preparation : Melakukan Pengumpulan Data & Data Quality Assurance terkait Performansi & Dampak Bisnis AI
c. Data Processing & Modelling : Melakukan Proses Pengolahan Data (Summarization & Modelling)
d. Presentation & Consulting: Membuat Laporan, Memberikan Rekomendasi & Presentasi
2. Pembuatan Konsep Solusi Analytics :
a. Discovery : Pemahaman Proses Bisnis & Identifikasi Permasalahan
b. Formulate : Membuat Konsep Solusi Analytics & Mendefinisikan Kebutuhan Cost
c. Presentation & Consulting : Membuat Material Komunikasi Konsep Solusi, Presentasi & Konsultasi terkait Solusi Analytics.
Job Requirement
1. Minimal S1 Jurusan Data Science, Statistics atau Bidang Terkait.
2. Minimal Pengalaman 1 Tahun di Peran Analisis & Problem Solving.
3. Pemahaman Proses Bisnis & Kemampuan untuk formulasi kerangka untuk Evaluasi Performansi & Dampak Bisnis.
4. Menguasai Tools Data : SQL for Data Management, R or Python (Data Processing & Modelling), & Data Visualization Tools
(Power BI / Tablue / BI Tools)
5. Kemampuan Komunikasi (Verbal & Visual),termasuk kemampuan untuk mendeskripsikan konsep teknis yang kompleks kepada
Stakeholder Non Teknis.
Skill Requirement
Information Security

Strong analytical mindset with high attention to detail and curiosity about user behaviour.

page_content:
Posisi: Cloud Consultant, Data Analytics
Perusahaan: Google
Skill Dibutuhkan: Cloud data migration, Technical consulting, Technical support, Designing large scale distributed data processing systems, SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis, Hadoop, Spark, HBase, Vertica, Netezza, Teradata, Tableau, MicroStrategy, Reading software code (Java, JavaScript, Python), AI/ML knowledge, Generative AI knowledge, Excellent communication skills, Presentation skills, Problem-solving skills
Pengalaman: 5 years in a client facing, technical consulting, or technical support role; 7 years in technical client services preferred.
Pendidikan: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience; MBA or Master's degree in Computer Science or related Engineering field preferred.
Tugas Utama: Manage and deliver successful implementations of cloud solutions, propose solution architectures, advocate for customer needs, interact with sales and technical stakeholders, and work with internal teams to package best practices.

metadata.original_description:
Minimum qualifications:
Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
5 years of experience in a client facing, technical consulting, or technical support role.
Experience with cloud data migration.
Preferred qualifications:
MBA or Master's degree in Computer Science, or a related Engineering field.
7 years of experience in technical client services.
Experience designing and deploying large scale distributed data processing systems with one or more technologies such as SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis, Hadoop, Spark, HBase, Vertica, Netezza, Teradata, Tableau, or MicroStrategy.
Experience with reading software code in one or more languages such as Java, JavaScript, Python.
Knowledge of AI/ML, Generative AI.
Excellent communication, presentation, and problem-solving skills.
About the job
The Google Cloud Platform team helps customers transform and build what's next for their business — all with technology built in the cloud. Our products are developed for security, reliability and scalability, running the full stack from infrastructure to applications to devices and hardware. Our teams are dedicated to helping our customers — developers, small and large businesses, educational institutions and government agencies — see the benefits of our technology come to life. As part of an entrepreneurial team in this rapidly growing business, you will play a key role in understanding the needs of our customers and help shape the future of businesses of all sizes use technology to connect with customers, employees and partners.
As a Cloud Consultant for Big Data and Analytics, you will work with customers on critical projects to help them transform their businesses. You will provide management, consulting, and technical capabilities to customer engagements while working with customer executives and key technical leaders to deploy solutions via Google Cloud Platform. You will also work with key partners, serving accounts to manage programs, deliver consulting services, and provide technical guidance and best practice expertise.
Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
Responsibilities
Manage and deliver successful implementations of cloud solutions, in collaboration with customer's technical leads, client executives, and partners. Act as a trusted advisor to decision makers throughout the engagement.
Propose solution architectures and manage the deployment of cloud based data and analytics solutions, according to complex customer requirements and implementation best practices.
Advocate for customer needs in order to overcome adoption blockers and drive new feature development based on your field experience.
Interact with sales, partners, and customer technical stakeholders to manage project scope, priorities, deliverables, risks or issues, and timelines for successful client outcomes.
Work with internal specialists, Product, and Engineering teams to package best practices and lessons learned into thought leadership, methodologies, and published assets.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
We are seeking an experienced Product Information specialist to join our dynamic team at PT Serveone MRO Indonesia. In this contract role based in Cibitung District, Bekasi West Java, you will play a crucial part in driving the development and management of our product information data. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to the strategic growth and success of our organization.
What you'll be doing
Help register and organize product data for clients in a clear and consistent way
Check product and material information to make sure everything is correct and fix any small mistakes
Keep the client products database updated and tidy with regular reviews
Group and manage product data using simple classification rules
Look into data issues and help prepare easy-to-follow improvement reports
Support the global database by keeping information clean, well-organized, and easy to use
What we're looking for
Diploma degree or higher — any major is welcome
Comfortable using English in writing and conversation (doesn't need to be perfect!)
Able to use MS Excel or similar programs to work with data
Familiar with analyze tons of data is preferable
Careful and detail-oriented when handling information
Responsible and able to follow simple work steps and instructions
Willing to work at Kawasan MM2100, Cibitung Bekasi
What we offer
At PT Serveone MRO Indonesia, we are dedicated to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience.
About us
PT Serveone MRO Indonesia is a leading provider of maintenance, repair and overhaul (MRO) services in the Information & Communication Technology industry. With a strong focus on innovation and customer success, we strive to deliver exceptional service and solutions to our clients. Our dedicated team of professionals is passionate about driving growth and transformation within the industry.
If you are excited about this opportunity and believe you have the skills and experience to make a meaningful contribution to our team, we encourage you to apply now.

page_content:
Posisi: Data Governance
Perusahaan: PT PERMODALAN NASIONAL MADANI
Skill Dibutuhkan: Ilmu Komputer, Teknologi Informasi, Manajemen Informasi, Statistik, Tata Kelola Data, Manajemen Database, Analisis Data, SQL, Oracle, MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, R, Python, Regulasi Perlindungan Data, Standar Keamanan Informasi, Keterampilan Komunikasi, Keterampilan Presentasi, Manajemen Proyek, Analitis, Pemecahan Masalah, Keterampilan Prioritas, Inisiatif, Kemampuan Adaptasi
Pengalaman: Pengalaman minimal 2–3 tahun dalam Tata Kelola Data, Manajemen Database, Analisis Data, atau peran terkait.
Pendidikan: Gelar Sarjana atau Magister di bidang yang relevan seperti Ilmu Komputer, Teknologi Informasi, Manajemen Informasi, atau Statistik.
Tugas Utama: Menyusun rencana kerja dan anggaran Bagian Tata Kelola Data, melaksanakan penyusunan dan pembaruan kebijakan Tata Kelola Data, menyusun arsitektur data, sosialisasi dan monitoring implementasi kebijakan, identifikasi dan penyelesaian masalah Tata Kelola Data, koordinasi dengan pihak internal dan eksternal, melaporkan progress kinerja.

metadata.original_description:
Kualifikasi
:
1. Gelar Sarjana atau Magister di bidang yang relevan seperti Ilmu Komputer, Teknologi Informasi, Manajemen Informasi, atau Statistik.
2. Pengalaman minimal 2–3 tahun dalam Tata Kelola Data, Manajemen Database, Analisis Data, atau peran terkait.
3. Memahami framework DAMA DMBOK (Data Management Body of Knowledge)
4. Pengalaman dengan alat Tata Kelola Data dan Platform Manajemen Data seperti Collibra, Informatica, IBM InfoSphere, dll.
5. Pengalaman dalam mengimplementasikan Kebijakan dan Prosedur Keamanan Data.
6. Kuat dalam SQL dan penggunaan database seperti Oracle, MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server.
7. Familiar dengan perangkat lunak Analisis Data seperti R atau Python.
8. Pemahaman yang baik tentang regulasi perlindungan data (misalnya GDPR, CCPA) dan standar keamanan informasi (misalnya ISO/IEC 27001 atau 27701).
9. Kemampuan berkomunikasi dengan jelas dan efektif dengan stakeholder di semua tingkat organisasi.
10. Keterampilan presentasi yang kuat untuk menyajikan temuan dan Strategi Data.
11. Kemampuan untuk mengelola proyek Tata Kelola Data besar dan mengoordinasikan antara tim lintas fungsional.
12. Keterampilan dalam memprioritaskan tugas dan jadwal kerja dalam lingkungan yang serba cepat.
13. Analitis dan memiliki kemampuan pemecahan masalah yang kuat.
14. Motivasi tinggi, inisiatif sendiri, dan kemampuan adaptasi.
Job Deskripsi
:
1. Menyusun rencana kerja dan anggaran Bagian Tata Kelola Data dalam rangka mencapai target Divisi Enterprise Information System.
2. Melaksanakan penyusunan dan pembaruan kebijakan Tata Kelola Data (Data Governance) dan Enterprise Information System sesuai dengan kebijakan dan peraturan yang berlaku.
3. Melaksanakan penyusunan arsitektur data dan struktur Tata Kelola Data di Perusahaan.
4. Melaksanakan sosialisasi dan monitoring terkait implementasi kebijakan Tata Kelola Data (Data Governance) dan Enterprise Information System.
5. Melaksanakan fungsi identifikasi dan penyelesaian masalah Tata Kelola Data di Perusahaan.
6. Menjalin koordinasi dengan pihak internal maupun eksternal untuk mendukung fungsi Tata Kelola Data.
7. Melaporkan progress kinerja secara berkala kepada Kepala Bagian Tata Kelola Data.

page_content:
Posisi: Presales Engineer (Paques)
Perusahaan: PT. Lintas Teknologi Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: data analytics, AI, machine learning, technical sales engagement, communication skills, consultative mindset, solution design, proof-of-concept (POC), technical presentations, demonstrations, workshops, technical responses to RFIs, RFPs, sales enablement assets, data engineering, cloud platforms, ETL/ELT, real-time analytics, stakeholder management, analytical skills, problem-solving, conceptual thinking, time management, task management, data query languages, programming languages, SQL, Python, statistical programming, machine learning frameworks, ETL/ELT tools, data integration pipelines, data visualization tools, Unix/Linux shell scripting, data governance, data quality, metadata management, cloud platforms exposure, containerization technologies
Pengalaman: Minimum of 5 years of experience in technical pre-sales, solution engineering, or consulting roles within data, analytics, or AI-focused environments.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, IT Architecture, Business Analytics, or a related technical field.
Tugas Utama: Lead end-to-end technical pre-sales activities, guiding prospects from initial discovery through solution design, proof-of-concept (POC), and final proposal delivery. Collaborate with sales teams to understand client challenges and translate business needs into scalable, data-driven solutions. Design and deliver compelling technical presentations, demonstrations, and workshops that articulate the value of solutions in data processing, analytics, AI, and machine learning. Author high-quality technical responses to RFIs, RFPs, and other procurement documents. Develop, customize, and maintain sales enablement assets. Architect, implement, and present Proof of Concepts (POCs) tailored to client-specific requirements. Build and sustain strong relationships with key technical and executive stakeholders. Stay at the forefront of emerging technologies to advise clients and inform product strategy. Serve as a knowledge hub internally, sharing market insights and technical best practices.

metadata.original_description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and client-focused
Pre-Sales Senior Engineer
or
Principal Consultant
to drive technical sales engagement and deliver innovative data analytics, AI, and machine learning solutions. This role is central to shaping the technical narrative during the sales cycle, working at the intersection of technology, business strategy, and customer success.
The ideal candidate will combine deep technical expertise in data platforms and analytics with strong communication skills and a consultative mindset. You will act as a trusted advisor to clients while collaborating closely with sales, product, and engineering teams.
Key Responsibilities
Lead end-to-end technical pre-sales activities, guiding prospects from initial discovery through solution design, proof-of-concept (POC), and final proposal delivery.
Collaborate with sales teams to understand client challenges and translate business needs into scalable, data-driven solutions.
Design and deliver compelling technical presentations, demonstrations, and workshops that articulate the value of Paques’ solutions in data processing, analytics, AI, and machine learning.
Author high-quality technical responses to RFIs, RFPs, and other procurement documents, ensuring accuracy, clarity, and competitive positioning.
Develop, customize, and maintain sales enablement assets including solution decks, use case libraries, competitive battle cards, and demo environments.
Architect, implement, and present Proof of Concepts (POCs) tailored to client-specific requirements, showcasing measurable business impact.
Build and sustain strong relationships with key technical and executive stakeholders across client organizations and partner ecosystems.
Stay at the forefront of emerging technologies—especially in data engineering, cloud platforms, ETL/ELT, real-time analytics, and AI/ML—to advise clients and inform product strategy.
Serve as a knowledge hub internally, sharing market insights, competitive intelligence, and technical best practices across teams.
Required Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, IT Architecture, Business Analytics, or a related technical field.
Minimum of
5 years of experience
in technical pre-sales, solution engineering, or consulting roles within data, analytics, or AI-focused environments.

Y

metadata.original_description:
Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team
We drive innovation and operational excellence by turning data into actionable strategies that elevate the end-to-end experience for consumers, driver-partners, and merchant-partners. From optimizing transaction flows and platform efficiency to enhancing reliability, we strive to make Grab the first choice, every time.
Get to Know the Role
You will be responsible for all matters related to data ETL, creation of dashboards and development of data driven insights. In addition, you will provide day to day data support to the Transformation and Strategy Office team. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including Corporate Strategy, Finance, and Analytics, as well as other key business units. In this role, you are expected to contribute to strategic planning and data-driven insights that support business growth and decision-making. Your work will involve translating analytical findings into actionable recommendations, aligning initiatives across teams, and ensuring strategic priorities are executed effectively to drive organizational impact. You will be directly report to the manager. The role will based onsite.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
Be an industry subject matter expert in using data to measure and analyze business/product performance in each of our markets and lines of business.
Lead the exploration of business/product issues/opportunities, uncover insights and/or identify targeted areas for business growth.
Localize, tune in-production models to new cities / markets to enable product velocity.
Provide thought leadership and generate data-driven hypotheses to solve key Product/Business problems.
Develop mixed effect, causal inference models to understand interaction effects or product configurations that are working sub optimally.
Build and manage anomaly detection systems to intelligently alert slow-moving changes or sudden anomalies in product or system metrics.
Develop analytics tools to help data teams and other disciplines be more at debugging, data summarization and at analysis of results.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
4+ years of experience, preferably in the e-commerce or the Internet industry.
A minimum of Bachelor's/Master's degree, in Analytics, Statistics, Software, Mathematics, Economics, Computer Science or Engineering
Experience in foundation in data query/manipulation using SQL and data visualization tools (PowerBI).
Strong statistical knowledge - ideally having utilized controlled experiments in the industry.
Able to speak and write Both in Bahasa & English
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with
Term Life Insurance
and comprehensive
Medical Insurance.
With
GrabFlex,
create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through
Parental
and
Birthday leave
, and give back to your communities through
Love-all-Serve-all (LASA)
volunteering leave
We have a confidential
Grabber Assistance Programme
to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab
We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

Perusahaan: PT Citarasa Kuliner Indonesia (Cimol Bojot AA)

metadata.company_name: PT Citarasa Kuliner Indonesia (Cimol Bojot AA)
metadata.original_description:
About the Company
At Cimol Bojot Aa,
we're not just about cimol, we're building a data-driven busines
s. We believe every decision, from managing inventory to marketing strategies, should be backed by accurate, accessible data. We're looking for a Data Engineer to be a key pillar in building our data foundation from the ground up.
This is a hands-on opportunity to build a scalable data infrastructure from the ground up, with a focus on data governance, quality assurance, and reproducibility. You'll work closely with the Data Manager and collaborate across teams such as finance, marketing, production, and warehouse.
What You'll Do
● Build, test, and maintain data pipelines to extract, clean, and load data from various tools (ERP, POS, campaign platforms, spreadsheets).
● Consolidate raw data into a centralized data warehouse on a cloud platform (Google Cloud or AWS).
● Design and maintain a data warehouse using Star Schema, Medallion Architecture, or similar concepts to support analytics across finance, marketing, supply chain, and sales.
● Support data transformation using tools like dbt and manage the data flow using tools like Apache Airflow.
● Control and manage cloud pricing to ensure cost-efficient use of resources.
● Provide and manage access to Business Intelligence (BI) tools like Metabase, Looker, or Tableau to enable self-service analytics.
● Document data models, workflows, and system designs to ensure reproducibility.
What We're Looking For
● Minimum 2 years of work experience as a Data Engineer.
● Strong proficiency in SQL (especially PostgreSQL) and Python.
● Solid understanding of ETL/ELT concepts and experience with pipeline orchestration tools like Apache Airflow and data transformation tools like dbt.
● Familiar with designing and building data pipelines and managing data flow.
● Comfortable with working with APIs and various third-party data sources.
● Experience with Docker for application deployment.
● Experience in setting up and configuring BI tools.
● Strong understanding of data governance, reproducibility, and quality assurance.
● Passionate about the F&B business domain, including inventory movement, sales, and marketing.
● Experience with modern data warehouse technologies like Google BigQuery.
● Strong problem-solving and documentation skills.
● Good communication skills and ability to work cross-functionally.

page_content:
Posisi: Python, SQL, and AI/ML Developer
Perusahaan: PT KNS Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Python programming, SQL database management, AI/ML development, Data preprocessing, Feature engineering, Exploratory data analysis (EDA), Machine learning model training, Database optimization, Debugging, Collaboration, Documentation, Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), Version control (Git), Containerization (Docker), Big data tools (Apache Spark, Hadoop, Kafka), Analytical skills, Problem-solving skills, Communication skills, Time management
Pengalaman: 5+ years of hands-on experience in Python, SQL, and AI/ML development.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, AI/ML, or related field.
Tugas Utama: Write efficient Python code, design SQL queries, develop AI/ML models, optimize database performance, create ETL pipelines, perform exploratory data analysis, and document workflows.

metadata.original_description:
We are seeking a talented and motivated
Python, SQL, and AI/ML Developer
to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will have expertise in Python programming, SQL database management, and experience in developing Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) solutions. This role involves working on data-intensive applications, building predictive models, and optimizing database performance to support AI/ML-driven insights.
Key Responsibilities
Python and SQL Development
:
Write efficient, reusable, and scalable Python code for backend systems, APIs, and automation tasks.
Design and maintain complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and scripts for data processing and reporting.
Develop and optimize database structures and schemas to ensure optimal performance and data integrity.
AI/ML Development
:
Build and train machine learning models for predictive analytics, classification, regression, and clustering tasks.
Implement AI/ML algorithms using Python libraries such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, or Keras.
Work on data pre-processing, feature engineering, and model evaluation to improve performance and accuracy.
Deploy machine learning models into production environments, ensuring scalability and reliability.
Data Integration and Processing
:
Design and develop ETL pipelines to ingest and process data from multiple sources for AI/ML workflows.
Collaborate with data engineers to integrate AI/ML models into existing systems and applications.
Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) to uncover insights and guide decision-making.
Optimization and Debugging
:
Optimize Python code and SQL queries to improve system efficiency and database performance.
Debug and resolve issues in AI/ML models, backend systems, and databases.
Collaboration and Documentation
:
Work closely with stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
Document code, processes, and AI/ML workflows for future reference and team collaboration.
Required Skills and Qualifications
Programming and Development
:
Strong proficiency in Python and experience with frameworks like Django, Flask, or FastAPI.
Expertise in SQL and relational databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, or Microsoft SQL Server.
AI/ML Skills
:
Hands-on experience with AI/ML frameworks and libraries such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, or Keras.
Strong understanding of supervised and unsupervised learning techniques, including regression, classification, clustering, and natural language processing (NLP).
Familiarity with MLOps tools and practices for deploying and monitoring machine learning models in production.
Data Science and Analytics
:
Experience with data preprocessing, feature engineering, and exploratory data analysis (EDA).
Knowledge of statistical methods and techniques used in data analysis and machine learning.
Database and Optimization
:
Proficiency in writing complex SQL queries, optimizing database performance, and ensuring data integrity.
Familiarity with NoSQL databases like MongoDB or Cassandra is a plus.
Tools and Technologies
:
Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, or GCP) and their AI/ML services.
Familiarity with version control systems (e.g., Git) and containerization tools like Docker.
Knowledge of big data tools such as Apache Spark, Hadoop, or Kafka is a plus.
Soft Skills
:
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a focus on delivering high-quality results.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work in a cross-functional team.
Ability to manage time effectively and handle multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment
Preferred Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, AI/ML, or related field.
5+ years of hands-on experience in Python, SQL, and AI/ML development.
Certification in AI/ML or cloud platforms (e.g., AWS Certified Machine Learning, Google Professional ML Engineer) is a plus.
Experience with NLP, computer vision, or time-series analysis is highly desirable.

Perusahaan: PT Wiharta Karya Agung

metadata.original_description:
About the role
We are seeking a talented and driven Sales Marketing professional to join our team at PT Wiharta Karya Agung. In this full-time role, you will be responsible for driving new business development and expanding our customer base in the Central Jakarta, Jakarta region. As a key member of our sales and marketing function, you will play a vital role in contributing to the overall growth and success of our company.
What you'll be doing
Prospecting and identifying new business opportunities within your designated territory
Developing and executing targeted sales and marketing strategies to attract new clients
Building and maintaining strong relationships with potential and existing customers
Presenting our products and services in a compelling and persuasive manner
Negotiating and closing sales deals to meet or exceed revenue targets
Collaborating with the marketing team to create and implement effective promotional campaigns
Providing regular sales activity reports and contributing to the overall sales planning process
What we're looking for
Proven track record of successfully driving new business development in a sales or marketing role
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build strong relationships with clients
Strong negotiation and closing skills, with a focus on achieving sales targets
Proficient in using sales and marketing tools and technologies
Degree in a relevant field such as business, marketing or sales
Familiarity with the local market and industry trends in Central Jakarta, Jakarta
What we offer
At PT Wiharta Karya Agung, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. We offer a competitive salary, performance-based bonuses, and opportunities for career advancement. Additionally, we prioritise the well-being of our employees and provide access to various health and wellness initiatives.
About us
PT Wiharta Karya Agung is a leading provider of innovative solutions and services in the Sales industry. With a strong presence in Central Jakarta, Jakarta, we have a reputation for delivering exceptional value to our clients. Our team of dedicated professionals is committed to driving growth, innovation, and customer satisfaction.
If you are excited about the prospect of joining our dynamic team, we encourage you to
apply now
.

Didirikan pada tahun 1990, kami telah menjadi pemain utama di industri ini, dikenal karena layanan yang unggul, inovasi, dan komitmen kami terhadap pelanggan. Sebagai organisasi yang terus tumbuh, kami menawarkan peluang karier yang menarik bagi profesional berbakat yang ingin berkontribusi pada kesuksesan kami dan mengembangkan karier mereka dalam lingkungan yang dinamis dan inovatif.

metadata.original_description:
Tentang PT Cielco Ivin Anugerah Perkasa :
PT Cielco Ivin Anugerah Perkasa adalah perusahaan yang bergerak dibidang Distributor dan Retail Rokok Elektrik dan berdiri sejak tahun 2014. Kami memiliki Dua Brand yaitu CMW Distribution dan Indovaping. Kantor pusat kami berada di Jakarta Utara, memiliki strata dan jenjang karir yang jelas serta lingkungan kerja yang fun dan bersahabat namun produktif. Bagi Kamu yang berjiwa muda menyukai tantangan dan berambisi, bergabunglah dengan kami sebagai :
Area Sales Supervisor
Untuk dapat bergabung dengan kami sebagai
Area Sales Supervisor
, kamu harus memenuhi syarat sebagai berikut yaa :
Pendidikan Min S1 semua jurusan
Memahami pengetahuan penjualan retail
Pengalaman min. 3 tahun sebagai Supervisor Sales Area (lebih diutamakan)
Komunikatif dan responsif
Memiliki skill leadership, negosiasi, dan analisa yang baik
Memiliki skill problem solving dan time management yang baik
Menguasai Ms. Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
Mempunyai SIM C
Tentang Perusahaan
PT. Cielco IVIN Anugerah Perkasa' adalah perusahaan ritel terkemuka di Indonesia yang menyediakan beragam produk konsumen berkualitas. metadata.original_description:
Sales Marketing
Kamu memiliki pengalaman dalam berkomunikasi, bernegosiasi, dan sebagai sales? Saat ini, kami membuka lowongan untuk calon-calon yang berbakat dan bertalenta seperti Anda untuk bergabung di tim kami sebagai sales.
Kami tengah mencari Sales yang bersemangat, komunikatif, dan berorientasi pada hasil untuk bergabung bersama tim kami!

Riset Pasar: Melakukan riset pasar di Indonesia, menganalisis pesaing, dan membantu mengoptimalkan produk perusahaan
Mencapai target penjualan bulanan
Melakukan perjalanan dinas sesuai kebutuhan
Benefit:
BPJS Ketenagakerjaan dan Kesehatan
Mendapatkan bonus bila mencapai target
Makan siang
Penempatan: PIK2
PT ULTRA DRY INDONESIA didirikan pada tahun 2025 di Indonesia (bagian dari Shenzhen Ensobo Technology Co., Ltd yang berdiri sejak tahun 2007) dengan merek "AbsorbKing", merupakan perusahaan industri dan perdagangan. Berfokus pada pengembangan, produksi, dan perdagangan desikan, produk utama kami adalah desikan silika gel white, silka gel natural, /oxygen absorber/,desikan kalsium klorida, desikan kontainer, dan sebagainya. Kami telah bersertifikasi ISO9001, ROHS, REACH, DMF FREE, FDA, MSDS, dan lain-lain.
AbsorbKing berfokus pada pengembangan dan produksi desikan selama lebih dari 17 tahun dan menyediakan solusi pencegahan kelembapan dan jamur profesional untuk berbagai industri dengan tingkat pembelian kembali lebih dari 95%.

page_content:
Posisi: Sales & Marketing Manager (FMCG)
Perusahaan: PT PIM Pharmaceuticals
Skill Dibutuhkan: Strategi Penjualan, Pemasaran, Analisis Tren Pasar, Forecasting Penjualan, Manajemen Tim, Coaching, Trade Marketing, Channel Management, Negosiasi, Brand Management, Kampanye Marketing, Monitoring & Reporting, Analisis Data, Keterampilan Komunikasi, Kepemimpinan
Pengalaman: Pengalaman minimal 5 tahun di bidang sales dengan level manajerial pada industri FMCG atau Farmasi.
Pendidikan: Pendidikan minimal S1 (Manajemen, Bisnis, Marketing, atau bidang terkait).
Tugas Utama: Menyusun strategi penjualan dan rencana pemasaran, memimpin tim, mengembangkan program trade marketing, membangun hubungan dengan retailer, mengelola kampanye marketing, serta menyusun laporan penjualan dan analisis pasar.

metadata.original_description:
Tanggung Jawab Utama :
1. Strategi Penjualan & Pemasaran
• Menyusun strategi penjualan tahunan dan rencana pemasaran berdasarkan target perusahaan.
• Menganalisis tren pasar, kompetitor, dan peluang pertumbuhan di modern trade, general trade, dan e-commerce.
• Mengatur forecasting penjualan, mengelola anggaran marketing, dan memonitor realisasi penjualan.
2. Manajemen Tim & Kinerja
• Memimpin tim Sales, Trade Marketing, dan Marketing.
• Memberikan coaching, training produk, dan evaluasi kinerja berdasarkan KPI.
• Mengatur pembagian area / channel serta memastikan ketepatan eksekusi strategi di lapangan.
3. Trade Marketing & Channel Management
• Mengembangkan program trade marketing untuk meningkatkan distribusi, penetrasi, dan visibility produk.
• Mengelola kerjasama dengan distributor, wholesaler, dan key accounts modern trade.
• Menyusun strategi display, planogram, POSM, promo bundling, price-off, dan aktivitas in-store.
• Memastikan efektivitas program promosi dan melakukan analisis ROI.
4. Key Account Management
• Membangun hubungan strategis dengan retailer besar
• Menangani negosiasi harga, listing fee, promo funding, dan perjanjian kerja sama.
• Memantau performa penjualan per key account dan menyusun strategi pengembangan bisnis.
5. Brand Management & Marketing Execution
• Mengembangkan strategi branding dan positioning untuk meningkatkan brand awareness dan market share.
• Mengelola kampanye marketing (ATL, BTL, digital) termasuk konten media sosial, pemasangan iklan, dan brand activation.
• Mengawasi pembuatan materi promosi dan memastikan konsistensi brand.
6. Monitoring & Reporting
• Menyusun laporan penjualan mingguan/bulanan dan analisis pasar.
• Mengidentifikasi peluang perbaikan strategi berdasarkan data.
• Melaporkan kinerja, pencapaian KPI, dan rekomendasi strategi kepada manajemen.
Kualifikasi
• Pendidikan minimal S1 (Manajemen, Bisnis, Marketing, atau bidang terkait).
• Pengalaman minimal 5 tahun di bidang sales dengan level manajerial pada industri FMCG atau Farmasi.
• Memiliki pengalaman memimpin tim dan mengelola channel modern trade, general trade, dan e-commerce.
• Memahami strategi marketing, trade marketing, dan channel management.
• Keterampilan analitis, negosiasi, leadership, dan komunikasi yang sangat baik.
• Mampu bekerja dengan target dan di lingkungan cepat (fast-moving & high-demand).
• Pemahaman regulasi BPOM.
• Menguasai data analysis (Excel, dashboard, atau tools lainnya) menjadi nilai tambah.

page_content:
Posisi: Direktur Sales & Marketing Alat Kesehatan
Perusahaan: Pengiklan Anonim
Skill Dibutuhkan: Analisis data pasar, Strategic planning, Business development, Kemampuan komunikasi verbal dan tertulis, Keterampilan negosiasi, Pengelolaan tim, Coaching dan mentoring, Pengawasan KPI, Pengelolaan anggaran, Pengendalian biaya promosi
Pengalaman: Minimal 8 tahun pengalaman kepemimpinan di bidang penjualan dan pemasaran alat kesehatan atau industri sejenis, dengan pengalaman 3 - 5 tahun di posisi manajerial/direktur.
Pendidikan: Gelar Sarjana / Master di bidang Bisnis, Pemasaran, atau bidang terkait.
Tugas Utama: Mengelola tim sales dan marketing, menyusun dan mengeksekusi strategi pemasaran dan penjualan, menentukan target penjualan, memimpin tim untuk mencapai target, menyusun strategi branding dan komunikasi pemasaran, memberikan pelatihan dan evaluasi kinerja, mengelola anggaran, dan menyusun laporan analisis penjualan.

metadata.original_description:
Kualifikasi :
1. Gelar Sarjana / Master di bidang Bisnis, Pemasaran, atau bidang terkait.
2. Minimal 8 tahun pengalaman kepemimpinan dibidang penjualan dan
pemasaran alat kesehatan
atau industri sejenis (farmasi, diagnostik, hospital equipment) dan pengalaman 3 - 5 tahun di Managerial/Direktur.
3. Rekam jejak yang terbukti dalam memimpin dan mencapai target penjualan serta pertumbuhan pendapatan
4. Menguasai analisis data pasar dan performa penjualan untuk merancang strategi yang efektif.
5. Mampu memimpin, mengarahkan, dan memotivasi tim penjualan dan pemasaran untuk mencapai target yang ditetapkan.
6. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi verbal dan tertulis yang sangat baik untuk berinteraksi dengan tim, klien, dan pihak lain.
7. Mampu mengembangkan visi strategis yang jelas dan menerjemahkannya menjadi langkah-langkah taktis yang dapat dieksekusi tim.
8. Kemampuan strategic planning dan business development.
9. Keterampilan Negosiasi dengan rumah sakit, distributor, pemerintah (e-katalog), dan vendor internasional.
10. Fasih berbahasa Inggris.
11. Memahami serta berpengalaman dalam system penjualan melalui e-catalog, tender dan bantuan luar negri
Tanggung Jawab:
1. Mengelola tim sales dan marketing secara nasional atau regional agar berorientasi pada hasil dan pelayanan.
2. Menyusun dan mengeksekusi strategi pemasaran dan penjualan.
3. Menentukan target penjualan nasional, segmentasi pasar, dan strategi penetrasi sesuai dengan potensi wilayah.
4. Memimpin tim sales nasional untuk mencapai atau melampaui target omzet dan margin.
5. Menyusun dan mengawasi strategi branding, promosi, dan komunikasi pemasaran (offline dan digital).
6. Memberikan pelatihan, coaching, dan mentoring untuk meningkatkan kompetensi tim.
7. Menetapkan KPI individu dan tim, serta melakukan evaluasi kinerja secara berkala.
8. Menyusun dan mengelola anggaran (budget) departemen sales & marketing.
9. Mengontrol efisiensi biaya promosi, perjalanan dinas, dan kegiatan penjualan.
10. Menyusun laporan analisis penjualan dan ROI kegiatan pemasaran untuk manajemen puncak.

metadata.original_description:
Our client, a Japanese trading company in the building materials industry, is looking for a Sales & Marketing Executive with the following requirements:
Requirements :
• Develop and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders: contractors, developers, interior design consultants, and architectural firms.
• Identify and pursue new business opportunities and project leads within the building and construction industry.
• Present and promote SKK KAKEN products to clients through product demonstrations, technical consultations, and sales presentations.
• Achieve monthly and annual sales targets in line with company objectives.
• Collaborate with the marketing team to execute promotional activities, campaigns, and events.
• Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer feedback to adjust sales strategies accordingly.
• Provide accurate sales forecasting and regular reporting to management.
• Coordinate with the technical and operations team to ensure smooth project execution and after sales support.
• Represent the company at trade shows, exhibitions, and industry networking events.
• Continuously expand product and industry knowledge to better serve clients and offer innovative solutions.
Job Description :
• Minimum bachelor’s degree in any major
• Owns transportation (car preferred)
• Fluent in English, both spoken and written
• Motivated, hardworking, and able to work in a team
• Contract for 1 year
• Experience as Sales/Marketing, experience in building material/construction/architect are preferable (but not a mandatory)
• Proven experience in sales or marketing, preferably in architectural coating, paint, or building materials industry.
• Strong network within the construction, property development, and design industry is an advantage.
• Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
• Self-driven, target-oriented, and able to work both independently and in a team.

Tugas Utama: Bertanggung jawab untuk menyediakan dukungan administratif, logistik, dan koordinasi yang diperlukan agar tim Marketing dan Sales dapat mencapai target penjualan dan pemasaran secara efektif.

metadata.original_description:
Kami adalah perusahaan yang mengimpor dan mendistribusikan produk dental dari Korea ke Indonesia
(Implant / GBR / Clear Aligner / Custom Abutment / Zirconia Crown / Digital Dentistry)
Misi kami adalah membangun “Digital Dental Innovation” terkuat di Indonesia.
Ringkasan Pekerjaan
Marketing/Sales Support akan memainkan peran penting dalam memastikan kelancaran operasional tim Marketing dan Sales. Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk menyediakan dukungan administratif, logistik, dan koordinasi yang diperlukan agar tim dapat mencapai target penjualan dan pemasaran secara efektif.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
Dukungan Administrasi Penjualan:
Mengelola dan memperbarui database pelanggan/prospek (CRM).
Membuat, memproses, dan memantau dokumen penjualan (penawaran harga, kontrak, invoice, laporan penjualan, perjanjian dengan pihak ke 3, proposal event).
Mengarsip semua dokumen terkait penjualan dengan rapi.
Dukungan Logistik dan Acara:
Mengkoordinasikan pengiriman materi promosi, sampel produk, atau kebutuhan logistik untuk tim penjualan.
Membantu persiapan dan pelaksanaan acara pemasaran (pameran, webinar, gathering).
Membantu pemesanan akomodasi dan membuat bugeting acara.
Koordinasi Internal:
Bertindak sebagai penghubung utama antara tim Sales, Marketing, dan departemen lain (Finance, Logistik).
Membantu menyusun jadwal pertemuan, presentasi, atau kunjungan lapangan untuk tim Sales.
Dukungan Materi Pemasaran:
Memastikan ketersediaan materi pemasaran yang relevan (brosur, katalog, slide presentasi).
Memastikan ketersediaan materi untuk handson (model, dummy, dll).
Memastikan ketersediaan dan kontrol keberadaan barang sample / Demo.
Membantu dalam pembuatan laporan mingguan/bulanan mengenai performa penjualan dan kampanye pemasaran.
Kualifikasi yang Dibutuhkan
Pendidikan Minimal D3/S1 dari semua jurusan, diutamakan dari Manajemen, Pemasaran, atau Administrasi Bisnis.
Pengalaman Minimal 2 tahun pengalaman di bidang Sales Support Dental / Medis / Healthcare, Marketing Administration, atau posisi sejenis. Fresh Graduate dipersilakan melamar jika memiliki pengalaman magang yang relevan.
Keterampilan Teknis
Mahir menggunakan Microsoft Office (terutama Excel dan PowerPoint).
Familiar dengan sistem CRM (Customer Relationship Management) merupakan nilai tambah.
Keterampilan Non-Teknis
Kemampuan komunikasi dan interpersonal yang sangat baik.
Mampu berbahasa inggris dan indonesia dengan baik
Sangat gesit, terorganisir, teliti, dan mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan waktu.
Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim.
Proaktif, komunikatif dan memiliki inisiatif tinggi dalam menyelesaikan masalah.
Keuntungan Bergabung dengan Kami
Gaji dan Tunjangan yang kompetitif.
Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan suportif.
Peluang pengembangan karir dan pelatihan profesional.

metadata.original_description:
Gambaran Umum Pekerjaan
Kami dari Brilliant Think Center, perusahaan Digital Marketing FMCG berpusat di Palembang, dengan brand Wookey Wight & So Honey Jr yang terkemuka di Indonesia. Saat ini mencari Leader Team Penjualan yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim kami.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
Mengembangkan dan mengimplementasikan strategi CRM yang inovatif untuk meningkatkan kepuasan, retensi, dan loyalitas pelanggan.
Mengelola tim Sales / CRM, mengkoordinasikan dan mengawasi kegiatan pemasaran langsung dan manajemen hubungan pelanggan.
Menganalisis data pelanggan dan membuat laporan untuk mengidentifikasi tren dan wawasan yang dapat digunakan untuk meningkatkan strategi pemasaran.
Berkolaborasi dengan tim pemasaran dan penjualan untuk mengembangkan kampanye dan program yang targetkan dan personalisasi.
Memantau dan mengevaluasi kinerja program CRM, membuat penyesuaian strategis untuk meningkatkan efektivitas.
Memastikan tercapainya target penjualan harian, mingguan, dan bulanan.
Menjadi teladan dalam hal kepemimpinan dan kolaborasi, memotivasi tim untuk mencapai tujuan bisnis.
Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan
Minimal 2 tahun pengalaman pada posisi Sales Supervisor / Leader Sales
Pemahaman yang mendalam tentang strategi dan praktik Manajemen Hubungan Pelanggan (CRM)
Kemampuan untuk menganalisis data penjualan dan perilaku pelanggan, serta membuat rekomendasi strategis
Keterampilan kepemimpinan dan kemampuan untuk memotivasi serta mengembangkan tim
Kemampuan komunikasi yang kuat, baik secara lisan maupun tertulis
Pengetahuan tentang tren dan praktik terbaik di industri ritel
Manfaat Utama Perusahaan
Paket kompensasi yang kompetitif, termasuk gaji tetap dan insentif penjualan yang menarik
Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis, kolaboratif, dan mendukung inovasi
Kesempatan untuk mengembangkan karier dalam lingkungan yang dinamis dan berorientasi pada pertumbuhan
Budaya kerja yang kolaboratif dan mendukung, dengan fokus pada keseimbangan kehidupan kerja
Berbagai program pengembangan professional dan pelatihan yang memungkinkan Anda untuk terus berkembang
Lingkungan kerja yang ditandai dengan inovasi, kreativitas, dan semangat kewirausahaan
Jika Anda tertarik dan memenuhi persyaratan, silakan lamar sekarang untuk kesempatan yang menarik ini.

Perusahaan: PT Eusu Logistics Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: B2B sales, Communication skills, Negotiation skills, Problem-solving skills, MS-Office proficiency (Word, Excel, Power Point)
