Pendidikan: Diploma degree in any major
Tugas Utama: Assist in developing and executing sales and marketing strategies, supervise sales team, contribute to business development, coordinate with internal teams, track market trends, address customer inquiries, maintain relationships with Liner, Coloader, Vendor, NVO.

metadata.original_description:
Responsibilities :
1.      Assist in developing and executing sales and marketing strategies to achieve business goals.
2.      Supervise and support the sales team in reaching sales targets and build good relationships with customers.
3.      Contribute to business development by identifying potential clients and maintaining a strong market presence.
4.      Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth operations and effective collaboration.
5.      Track and report on market trends, competitor activities, and customer insights to optimize strategies.
6.      Address customer inquiries and assist in resolving issues to ensure satisfaction and maintain relationships.
7.      Having strong relationsship with Liner, Coloader, Vendor, NVO to supproting in getting competitive rate.
Requirements :
1.      Diploma degree in any major, with minimum 3 years’ experience in a freight forwarding company (handling international ocean freight or air freight), and familiar with export-import procedures as well as industry terms (FOB, CIF, DDP, etc).
2.      Strong understanding of B2B sales, with proven ability to identify opportunities and achieve sales targets.
3.      Skilled in preparing quotations and ensuring effective coordination with clients and internal teams.
4.      Fluent in English written and spoken.
5.      Strong communication, negotiation, and problem-solving skills, with the ability to perform well in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
6.      Proficient in MS-Office applicants (Word, Excel and Power Point)

page_content:
Posisi: ADMINISTRASI MARKETING/SALES
Perusahaan: CV Mycon Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Administrative skills, Organizational skills, Attention to detail, Communication skills, Interpersonal skills, Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint), Customer service skills, Teamwork, Proactive mindset, Solution-oriented mindset
Pengalaman: Experience in a customer service or administrative role, preferably in a marketing or sales environment
Pendidikan: Preferably Civil Engineering or Architecture (S1/D3)
Tugas Utama: Providing administrative support to the marketing and sales teams, assisting with marketing campaigns, preparing marketing materials, maintaining customer databases, handling customer inquiries, and supporting various ad-hoc administrative tasks.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
We are seeking a talented and motivated Marketing/Sales Administrator to join our dynamic team at CV Mycon Indonesia, a growing company in the Building material industry based in Central Jakarta, Jakarta. This full-time position will play a vital role in supporting our marketing and sales operations, ensuring efficient and effective administration to drive business growth.
What you'll be doing
Providing administrative support to the marketing and sales teams, including data entry, filing, and document management
Assisting with the coordination and planning of marketing campaigns and sales activities
Preparing and distributing marketing materials, such as presentations, brochures, and flyers
Maintaining customer and prospect databases, ensuring accurate and up-to-date information
Handling customer inquiries and providing excellent customer service
Supporting the team with various ad-hoc administrative tasks as needed
What we're looking for
Strong administrative and organisational skills with attention to detail
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, both written and verbal
Proficient in using Microsoft Office suite, particularly Excel and PowerPoint
Experience in a customer service or administrative role, preferably in a marketing or sales environment
Ability to work independently and as part of a team
Proactive and solution-oriented mindset
Preferably Civil Engineering or Architecture (S1/D3)
What we offer
At CV Mycon Indonesia, we are committed to providing a supportive and rewarding work environment for our employees. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer a range of benefits, including:
Comprehensive health insurance coverage
Opportunities for professional development and career advancement
Flexible work arrangements to support work-life balance
Team-building activities and social events
Discounts on our products and services
About us
CV Mycon Indonesia is a growing provider of integrated building material solutions, serving clients across various industries. With a strong focus on innovation and customer satisfaction, we strive to deliver exceptional results that drive the success of our clients. Join our team and be a part of our continued growth and success.
Apply now to become our next Marketing/Sales Administrator!

page_content:
Posisi: Sales and Marketing
Perusahaan: PT. CENTRAM
Skill Dibutuhkan: Sales strategies, Market research, Customer relationship management, Communication skills, Interpersonal skills, Analytical skills, Customer service, Team collaboration, Fluency in English, Fluency in Japanese
Pengalaman: Minimum 3 years experience in sales and marketing
Pendidikan: Minimum bachelor degree from reputable university
Tugas Utama: Developing and executing effective sales strategies, building and maintaining customer relationships, conducting market research, collaborating with the marketing team, providing performance reports, enhancing customer experience.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
As a Sales and Marketing professional at PT. CENTRAM', you will play a vital role in driving the growth and success of this dynamic company. Based in Surabaya, East Java, this full-time position will see you utilising your exceptional sales and marketing skills to promote the company's offerings and secure new business opportunities.
What you'll be doing
Developing and executing effective sales strategies to target new clients and maximise revenue growth
Building and maintaining strong relationships with both existing and prospective customers
Conducting market research to identify new opportunities and trends within the industry
Collaborating with the marketing team to develop and implement impactful campaigns
Providing regular performance reports and insights to the leadership team
Continuously seeking ways to enhance the customer experience and drive customer satisfaction
What we're looking for
Proven track record of success in sales and/or marketing within the food and beverages industry
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to build strong relationships with clients
Strong commercial acumen and analytical skills to identify and capitalise on market opportunities
Passion for delivering exceptional customer service and a commitment to driving results
Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team environment
Fluent in english and Japanese is priority
Minimum have 3 years experience in sales and marketing
Minimum bachelor degree from reputable university
What we offer
At PT. CENTRAM', we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and rewarding work environment. In addition to a competitive salary, you will have access to a range of benefits and professional development opportunities to help you reach your full potential. We also prioritise work-life balance and offer flexible working arrangements to support your personal and professional goals.
About us
PT. CENTRAM' is a leading carrageenan manufacturer with a strong presence in Pasuruan East Java. Our mission is to deliver customer satisfaction that drive success for our clients. With a talented and dedicated team, we have established a reputation for excellence and are poised for continued growth and expansion.
If you are excited about the prospect of joining our team and contributing to our success, we encourage you to apply now.

page_content:
Posisi: Sales & Marketing Officer
Perusahaan: NCR Group
Skill Dibutuhkan: Kreatif, Komunikatif, Inisiatif tinggi, Familiar dengan Notion, Familiar dengan Meta, Familiar dengan Tiktok, Menguasai Canva, Menguasai CapCut, Menguasai Adobe Photoshop
Pengalaman: Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman yang relevan di Sales/Marketing. Terbuka juga untuk fresh graduate.
Pendidikan: Minimal pendidikan S1 dari jurusan yang relevan.
Tugas Utama: Merencanakan, mengelola, dan mengoptimalkan kanal penjualan online/offline serta jaringan reseller; melakukan riset dan analisis tren gaya hidup sehat dan olahraga; mengimplementasikan campaign marketing; memantau dan mengevaluasi kinerja Instagram; membuat dan mengeksekusi content plan; membangun kerjasama dengan KOL; menjawab pesan dan komentar dari pelanggan; membantu tim Marketing dalam mengelola komunitas olahraga.

metadata.original_description:
Kami adalah NCR Group (NCR Sport, Starting Lane, Rechampx, Hoops Point), perusahaan multi-brand di bidang perlengkapan, pakaian, dan sepatu olahraga kekinian. Berdiri sejak 2012, kami telah membantu jutaan keluarga Indonesia dalam memilih perlengkapan olahraga yang mendukung gaya hidup aktif dan sehat.
Data dari DataBridge Market Research memproyeksikan pertumbuhan 7,16% untuk industri perlengkapan olahraga di Indonesia dari tahun 2025 hingga 2032. Industri ini sendiri secara keseluruhan bernilai USD 3,25 miliar di tahun 2024. Industri perlengkapan olahraga tumbuh subur, dan dengan demikian, kami juga ikut berkembang pesat.
Kami telah memiliki 13 store di Bandung (Gandapura, Paskal, Gatsu, PVJ, KBP), Jakarta (PP, Kokas, PIM), Bogor, Sentul, Tangerang (Serpong), dan Bekasi. Kami berencana untuk terus berekspansi ke kota-kota lainnya di Indonesia dalam 1-2 tahun ke depan.
Kami mencari orang-orang yang ingin bergabung dengan tim kami yang diisi oleh anak muda yang ambisius, kreatif, dan dinamis. Sebagai Sales & Marketing Officer, Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk brand Rechampx; menjadi jembatan antara brand dengan customer.
Tanggung Jawab
Merencanakan, mengelola, dan mengoptimalkan kanal penjualan online/offline serta jaringan reseller.
Melakukan riset dan analisis tren gaya hidup sehat dan olahraga untuk mengidentifikasi peluang baru dan meningkatkan exposure brand.
Mengimplementasikan campaign marketing (konten, promo, dan aktivasi online/offline).
Memantau dan mengevaluasi kinerja Instagram, menyusun laporan, dan memberikan rekomendasi perbaikan.
Membuat dan mengeksekusi content plan.
Membangun kerjasama dengan KOL dan memastikan kolaborasinya berjalan lancar.
Menjawab pesan dan komentar yang masuk dari pelanggan di Instagram.
Membantu tim Marketing dalam mengelola komunitas olahraga, khususnya komunitas lari.
Persyaratan
Minimal pendidikan S1 dari jurusan yang relevan.
Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman yang relevan di Sales/Marketing. Terbuka juga untuk fresh graduate.
Aktif dan memiliki minat kuat di bidang lari atau komunitas olahraga lebih diutamakan.
Familiar dengan Notion, Meta, dan Tiktok.
Menguasai Canva, CapCut, atau Adobe Photoshop menjadi nilai plus.
Memiliki SIM A & C menjadi nilai plus.
Kreatif, komunikatif, dan memiliki inisiatif tinggi.
Bersedia bekerja di kantor kami (WFO) di Bandung, Jawa Barat.
Bersedia bekerja Senin-Jumat dan fleksibel untuk bekerja di akhir pekan (Sabtu/Minggu) jika ada event, dengan sistem tukar hari libur.
Benefit
Gaji pokok dan tunjangan yang kompetitif.
BPJS Ketenagakerjaan dan Kesehatan.
Employee Shoe Program: fasilitas pinjaman dan diskon karyawan.
Program training, coaching, dan konseling bagi yang membutuhkan.
Jenjang karir dan program promosi yang jelas.
Employee Engagement: Sports Day tiap Rabu (running).

metadata.original_description:
Peran Personal Assistant di PT Dinamika Polimerindo
Kami mencari seorang Personal Assistant berpengalaman yang teliti, komunikatif, dan memiliki kemampuan analisis yang kuat untuk mendukung aktivitas operasional Direksi dan Marketing Manager di PT Dinamika Polimerindo, perusahaan manufaktur plastik terkemuka di Jakarta Barat. Posisi ini membutuhkan seseorang yang
terorganisir, cepat tanggap, serta mampu mengelola data dan laporan keuangan/marketing menggunakan Excel secara profesional.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
Proaktif, dapat diandalkan, teliti, serta memiliki kemampuan pemecahan masalah yang baik dan efektif.
Mendukung kegiatan administratif dan operasional Direksi/Marketing Manager.
Menyiapkan dan mengelola laporan data penjualan, performa marketing, serta KPI tim menggunakan
Microsoft Excel (pivot, vlookup, formula, chart, dll)
.
Dapat mengelola arsip dan dokumentasi secara rapi, teratur, dan sistematis baik melalui sistem fisik maupun platform digital.
Membuat dan memantau jadwal kegiatan, rapat, serta agenda harian Direksi.
Menyusun notulen rapat, follow-up hasil meeting, dan memastikan setiap tindak lanjut berjalan tepat waktu.
Menangani korespondensi, dokumen internal, serta koordinasi dengan pihak eksternal bila diperlukan.
Keterampilan dan Kualifikasi yang Dibutuhkan
Pendidikan minimal S1 dari semua jurusan, diutamakan Administrasi Bisnis, Ekonomi atau Manajemen, Kemampuan berkomunikasi dalam bahasa Inggris akan menjadi nilai tambah.
Pengalaman kerja minimal 3 tahun sebagai Personal Assistant / Secretary / Data Analyst / Marketing Support, serta memiliki keterampilan pengelolaan waktu dan organisasi yang efisien.
Menguasai Microsoft Excel secara advanced (Pivot Table, VLOOKUP, SUMIFS, Charts, dan Dashboard).
Terbiasa bekerja dengan angka, laporan keuangan sederhana, dan analisis data marketing.
Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan organisasi yang baik.
Teliti, disiplin, dan mampu bekerja dengan tenggat waktu ketat.
Bersedia bekerja dengan mobilitas tinggi dan waktu kerja fleksibel.
Jika Anda tertarik untuk menjadi bagian dari tim kami yang berdedikasi, lamar posisi ini sekarang juga!

PT. Jaya Kelana Abadi Indonesia
telah berdiri 32 tahun menyediakan alat bantu pengajaran untuk Sekolah Keperawatan, Sekolah Kebidanan, Rumah Sakit, Fakultas Kedokteran, Fakultas Keperawatan, Diklat Kesehatan, Departemen Kesehatan, Puskesmas, Asosiasi Pelatihan Kesehatan, BKKBN, Fakultas Kesehatan Masyarakat, Militer, Rumah Sakit Militer, Klinik Swasta, dan lainnya. Visi Untuk terus menjadi perusahaan terkemuka di bidang pendidikan kesehatan dengan memberikan layanan prima dan produk berkualitas yang memuaskan pelanggan, pemegang saham, mitra, dan karyawan kami. Misi Berpartisipasi aktif dalam pembangunan Indonesia, khususnya di bidang pendidikan, dengan menyediakan alat peraga berkualitas dengan harga terjangkau. Kami siap menghadapi segala bentuk tantangan baik di pasar lokal maupun global.

metadata.original_description:
ANDA SENANG KOMUNIKASI DENGAN BANYAK ORANG ? DAN MAU MENDAPATKAN PENGHASILAN LEBIH DARI GAJI POKOK?
Bergabunglah sebagai Management Trainee - Sales and Marketing di Mentari Group hanya jika Anda :
Pandai berkomunikasi dan senang bertemu dengan banyak orang.
Aktif dan ceria serta merasa dunia sales dan marketing adalah pilihan yang tepat untuk karir anda.
Ingin ikut membangun negara tercinta Indonesia, melalui jalur pendidikan.
Percaya diri untuk berbicara dengan para customer.
Mentari Group adalah pelayanan satu atap untuk pendidikan yang berkualitas melalui 7 unit usaha berupa penyediaan text book dari penerbit terkemuka dunia, jaringan toko buku, penerbit, pusat pelatihan guru, sertifikasi, pembelajaran digital dan E- Commerce.
Distributor tunggal dari beberapa penerbit terbaik dan terbesar dunia diantaranya : Cambridge University Press, Oxford University Press, Marshall Cavendish Education,ASTA Ilmu, SAP dan SL Educations.
Melayani selama lebih dari 24 tahun, pendidikan di Indonesia dengan kualitas dan komitmen yang sudah teruji dan diakui oleh dunia pendidikan di Indonesia .
Memiliki budaya organisasi yang kuat dalam membentuk karakter, keahlian dan kompetensi yang baik sehingga Mentari Group dapat melahirkan generasi muda yang unggul untuk Indonesia.
Jika Anda tidak hanya ingin sekedar bekerja, namun juga belajar dan bertumbuh bersama di Sekolah Kehidupan ini, kami tunggu resume Anda.
Deskripsi pekerjaan:
Mengunjungi sekolah/lembaga pendidikan dan menjaga relasi yang balk dengan memberikan kualitas pelayanan terbaik sesuai standard Mentari Group.
Menjelaskan produk-produk Mentari Group dan memberikan solusi terbaik untuk kebutuhan pelanggan.
Mencari pelanggan baru dan mencapai target-target pekerjaan yang diberikan.
Menjadi Manusia Pembelajar dan terus kembangkan diri sehingga siap menjadi Leader sesuaí perkembangan perusahaan yang cepat
Persyaratan:
Minimum pendidikan S1.
Memiliki pengalaman 1-2 tahun di dalam bidang penjualan.
Memiliki semangat tinggi, siap kerja keras, mau belajar dan diajar, senang bersosialisasi dan percaya diri.
Mahir dalam penggunaan Microsoft Office (PowerPoint, Excel & Word).
Penempatan :
Jakarta, Purwokerto, Jambi, Palembang, Surabaya, Makassar.
Benefits:
Monthly salary
: jumlah yang terbaik berdasarkan kompetensi pribadi.
Monthly and annual commission:
Berdasarkan kinerja pribadi.
Allowances:
Termasuk transport, tunjangan komunikasi, tunjangan kesehatan, tunjangan sembako.
Annual Bonus:
Berdasarkan kinerja perusahaan & pribadi.
Training and Professional Development :
Rutin dilakukan, diantaranya Attitude Skill Knowledge (ASK) Training,  Self Transformation Training  - 7 Habits, dll.
Mentari’s Annual Award :
penghargaan tahunan dengan lebih dari 10 kategori untuk insan Mentari yang berprestasi.
Gathering and Year End Party:
minimal 1x acara Outing dan Year End Party.
Apply secepatnya sebelum
17 Desember 2025
All resumes will be handled strictly confidential and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

Dapat Segera Bergabung.

Paket kompensasi yang kompetitif dan sesuai dengan kinerja
Kesempatan untuk pengembangan karier yang jelas dan terstruktur

Tunjangan dan fasilitas menarik, termasuk asuransi kesehatan dan cuti tahunan
Our company was first established in 1974 under the name of PT. NTN Bearing Indonesia. We started off as a joint venture company with NTN Bearing - Singapore (Pte) Ltd. Each company held 50% capital shares. Our main business was representing NTN Toyo Bearing Co. Ltd. - Japan as their sole agent for Indonesia territory.
In 1989, our company changed its name to PT. Teknindopuri Ampuhperkasa. At the same time we also bought over the shares of NTN Bearing - Singapore (Pte) Ltd.
Jika Anda tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami yang dinamis, lamar sekarang dan jadilah bagian dari kisah sukses PT Teknindopuri Ampuhperkasa'!

1. Perencanaan & Strategi Penjualan
Mengembangkan rencana dan strategi penjualan untuk mencapai target.
Menetapkan target penjualan tahunan, bulanan, dan mingguan.
2. Pengelolaan Tim Penjualan
Merekrut, melatih, dan mengawasi tim sales.
Memberikan arahan, motivasi, dan evaluasi kinerja.
Membangun kerja sama tim yang solid untuk mencapai target.
3. Pengembangan Keterampilan Penjualan
Melatih tim sales mengenai teknik penjualan efektif.
Memastikan tim memahami produk/layanan dengan baik.

Mengelola proses penjualan dari prospek hingga closing.

Mengumpulkan dan menganalisis data penjualan untuk melihat tren pasar.

6. Interaksi dengan Pelanggan
Menjalin hubungan dengan pelanggan kunci.
Menangani keluhan pelanggan dengan profesional.

Memimpin inisiasi promosi produk.

Mengelola anggaran kampanye dan iklan.
Memonitor pertumbuhan perusahaan.
Bereksperimen dengan metode marketing baru untuk meningkatkan performa.

Perusahaan: PT Mid Solusi Nusantara (MEKARI)
Skill Dibutuhkan: Modern front-end frameworks (Vue.js, React.js), Back-end frameworks (Ruby on Rails, Go, Laravel), TDD (Test-Driven Development), Continuous integration, Code review, Microservices design patterns, Containers and container orchestration (Kubernetes), Agile methodologies, Scrum, Excellent communication skills
Pengalaman: Minimum 1-year software engineering experience in a team setting
Pendidikan: Not specified
Tugas Utama: Develop front-end & back-end components on the product or service that will impact thousands of businesses and millions of users. Work closely with Product Manager and other business stakeholders to develop solutions that delight our customers. Work with Technical Program Manager to run development lifecycle (concept, design, test, release, support). Work closely with DevOps to maintain the application in our infrastructure. Manage knowledge within the team in the form of written documentation surrounding technical requirements, deployments, and post-mortems.

metadata.original_description:
Mekari is Indonesia's no. 1 Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) company. With our ecosystem of software solutions—including Mekari Jurnal, Mekari Talenta, Mekari Qontak, and Mekari Flex, we aim to facilitate entrepreneurs and leaders as they accelerate the digital transformation of their businesses.
In our 10+ years of journey we have reached over 1 Million platform users, and we're not planning to stop any time soon. We need more people like you: builders and owners with calculated ambition who are ready to
#ElevateThroughImpact
and raise Indonesia's software standard.
Job Description:
Develop front-end & back-end components on the product or service that will impact thousands of businesses and millions of users.
Work closely with Product Manager and other business stakeholders to develop solutions that delight our customers.
Work with Technical Program Manager to run development lifecycle (concept, design, test, release, support).
Work closely with DevOps to maintain the application in our infrastructure.
Manage knowledge within the team in the form of written documentation surrounding technical requirements, deployments, and post-mortems.
Requirements:
Minimum 1-year software engineering experience in a team setting
Strong knowledge and experience both in modern front-end frameworks (Vue.js, React.js, etc) and back-end frameworks (Ruby on Rails, Go, Laravel, etc)
Good understanding of modern software engineering practices such as TDD, continuous integration, code review, and microservices design patterns
Familiarity with containers and container orchestration (i.e Kubernetes)
Familiarity with software development methodologies and frameworks such as Agile or Scrum
Excellent communication skills, written and verbal, with a focus on collaboration, understanding, and information sharing between team members and stakeholders
What You Will Get:
1. Competitive salary + daily allowance.
2. Premium private health insurance (outpatient, inpatient, maternity, dental).
3. Early access to salary + flex installment (employee loan) via Mekari Flex.
4. Allowance for sports activities and glasses/contact lenses.
5. Flexible working hours with a hybrid work culture.
6. Annual and unpaid leaves from day 1 of join date + unlimited sick leave with doctor note.
7. Notebook Ownership Program.
8. Strategic office location, accessible by MRT.
9. Friendly and dynamic work environment.
10. Opportunity to build impactful solutions with Indonesia's no. 1 SaaS company.
Our team will review your application and will be in touch if your application is shortlisted to the next stage. If you do not hear from us in 30 days, we will keep your resume on file in case a relevant opportunity opens up.
Don't forget to check our Recruitment FAQ at
bit.ly/RecruitmentFAQ-Mekari
[ENG] or
bit.ly/RekrutmenMekari-FAQ
[INA] to find the answers to commonly-asked questions regarding our recruitment process.
We wish you the best. Hope to see you around soon!

Perusahaan: PT Formulatrix Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Python, C#, C++, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, Data Preparation, Model Training, Model Deployment, TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, Scikit-image, ONNX Runtime, LLM Architecture, Cloud Platforms (AWS, Google Cloud), MLops Principles, Software Design Patterns, Mathematics, Physics
Pengalaman: Previous industry experience is a plus but not required. Fresh graduates are welcome.
Pendidikan: At least Bachelor’s (S1/D4) degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent professional experience in CV/ML software development.
Tugas Utama: Study and implement machine learning and computer vision algorithms, develop understanding of the problem domain and propose innovative solutions, define and evaluate objective metrics of system performance, write modular proof-of-concept code designed for easy integration into parent projects, write reports and present findings, be a thought partner for other engineers.

metadata.original_description:
Role:
Software Research Engineer (Computer Vision / Machine Learning Specialization)
FORMULATRIX is expanding its Bandung team! As a Creative City of Design, Bandung has been renowned for its smart people and creative communities. We're looking for enthusiastic individuals with a passion for exploring cutting-edge technology, particularly in laboratory automation.
As a Software Research Engineer in the FORMULATRIX Innovation Lab team, you will study and implement algorithms from research papers, adapt them to solve the problem at hand, and develop modular code that can be easily integrated into parent projects. For this particular role, you will focus on solving machine learning and computer vision (CV/ML) problems. You’ll be working on the technology that will be deployed to our liquid handling robots and laboratory automation products.
What Will You Do:
Study and implement machine learning and computer vision algorithms.
Develop understanding of the problem domain and propose innovative solutions.
Define and evaluate objective metrics of system performance.
Write modular proof-of-concept code designed for easy integration into parent projects.
Write reports and present findings.
Be a thought partner for other engineers, supporting them with your skillset.
What We Look For:
At least Bachelor’s (S1/D4) degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent professional experience in CV/ML software development.
Previous industry experience is a plus but not required.
Fresh graduates are welcome.
Solid coding skills in modern programming languages, preferably Python, C#, or C++.
Strong background in machine learning tasks and algorithms (image classification, object detection, language models, etc.).
Well versed in data preparation, training, deployment, and maintenance of machine learning models.
Enjoys reading research papers and learning the latest advances in the field. Previous experience in research is very much appreciated.
Familiar with relevant libraries: TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, Scikit-image, ONNX Runtime, etc.
A passion for learning new technical skills.
Highly motivated and strong team player.
Excellent communication skills in both written and spoken English.
Nice to Have
Experience with LLM architecture (transformer, attention, tokenizer, etc.), and prompting techniques (RAG, chain of thought, agentic workflow, etc.).
A good understanding of what constitutes a high-quality datase, and how to gather such datasets.
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, etc.) for machine learning training and/or deployment.
Experience training with GPU and Google TPU
Familiarity with MLops principles.
Knowledge of computer vision algorithms: filters, histogram, contour, blob, edge detection, SIFT, ORB, camera calibration, etc.
Knowledge of Software design patterns and best practices in programming.
Not afraid of hardware.
Good command of math and physics.

metadata.original_description:
JOB SUMMARY
Petrolink is a global company that specializes in user-driven technology for the Oil and Gas Industry.
We are looking for a QA Engineer with at least 2 years of experience in manual testing and a minimum of 1 year in automation testing. The candidate should have a solid understanding of SDLC processes, QA methodology, defect tracking, and reporting. They should be capable of working independently in a fast-paced, time-critical environment to deliver high-quality, stable software.
Experience in automating test scripts for applications built on WPF, .NET, Java, or web-based platforms is an advantage. Familiarity with Katalon Studio or other automation tools is desirable but not mandatory.
DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES:
Analyze requirements and design effective test strategies
Participate in preparing and reviewing test plans
Create detailed test scenarios and test cases for module, integration, and system testing
Prepare and maintain test data and environments
Review and validate test cases prepared by other team members
Execute test cases and document results
Log, track, and validate defects through resolution
Communicate effectively with developers and test leads regarding issues and fixes
Prepare summary reports and maintain test documentation
Capture lessons learned and contribute to process improvements
Provide feedback and suggestions to enhance product quality
Oil and Gas domain knowledge is preferred.
SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:
B Tech/MCA/M Tech in Computer Science or related field.
Minimum 2 years in manual testing and more than 1 year in automation testing experience.
Good knowledge of SQL and relational databases (SQL Server, Cassandra, etc.)
Strong understanding of Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC)
Experience in creating and maintaining test cases and test documentation
Proficiency in defect management and reporting tools (e.g., JIRA, Azure DevOps, etc.)
Good communication and collaboration skills
Attention to detail and strong analytical mindset
Experience with Katalon Studio or other automation tools (Selenium, TestComplete, JMeter)
Familiarity with scripting languages (e.g., Groovy, Python, JavaScript)
Exposure to cloud-based applications or distributed systems
Experience working on Linux environments
Knowledge of Oil and Gas industry systems or real-time data applications is desirable
The above statements are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed. They are not intended to be construed as an exhaustive list of all responsibilities, duties, and skills.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
We are looking for an experienced Software Engineer to join our team at PT Formulatrix Indonesia, a leading technology company based in Salatiga, Central Java. In this full-time role, you will play a crucial part in the development and implementation of cutting-edge software solutions that power our innovative products.
What you'll be doing
Design, develop and maintain high-quality, scalable software applications and systems
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions
Write clean, efficient and well-documented code using the latest software engineering best practices
Identify and resolve complex technical issues, bugs and bottlenecks
Contribute to the continuous improvement of our software development processes and tools
What we're looking for
2+ years of experience as a Software Engineer or Developer, preferably in a similar role
Demonstrable expertise in programming languages such as C#, Java, or C++
Strong understanding of software architecture, design patterns, and object-oriented programming principles
Proficient in developing and maintaining scalable, high-performance applications
Experience with software testing frameworks and continuous integration/deployment processes
Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking and analytical skills
Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams and communicate technical concepts clearly
What we offer
At PT Formulatrix Indonesia, we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and rewarding work environment. As a Senior Software Engineer, you can expect:
Competitive remuneration
and a
comprehensive benefits package
, including health insurance, flexible working hours, and modern office facilities.
Opportunities for
professional development and career growth
through training, mentorship, and exposure to cutting-edge technologies.
A
collaborative and innovative
work culture that encourages creativity, teamwork, and work-life balance.
About us
FORMULATRIX is a global leader in robotic automation and software solutions, serving top pharmaceutical companies and research institutions worldwide. Our mission is to push the boundaries of what's possible through the power of software engineering. With a talented team of professionals and a track record of success, we are well-positioned to continue our growth and success in the years ahead.
If you're excited by the prospect of joining a dynamic, forward-thinking company and contributing to the development of cutting-edge software solutions, we encourage you to apply now.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
Soedarpo Informatika, a leading provider of innovative software solutions, is seeking an exceptional Application Engineering & Tech Division Head to join our dynamic team. This is a full-time position based in West Jakarta, Jakarta.
What you'll be doing
Lead and manage a team of talented application engineers to design, develop, and maintain cutting-edge software applications
Define and implement the technical strategy for the Application Engineering & Tech Division, aligning it with the overall business objectives
Oversee the development lifecycle, ensuring the delivery of high-quality, scalable, and secure software solutions
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product management, business analysis, and quality assurance, to drive innovation and deliver exceptional customer experiences
Foster a culture of continuous improvement, encouraging team members to explore new technologies and best practices
Provide technical guidance, mentorship, and support to the engineering team, helping them to grow and develop their skills
Represent the division and the company in technical discussions with clients, partners, and industry stakeholders
What we're looking for
Extensive experience (8+ years) in application engineering, software development, or a related technical field
Proven track record of leading and managing high-performing engineering teams
Strong technical expertise in software architecture, design patterns, and development best practices
Proficient in modern programming languages, frameworks, and emerging technologies
Excellent problem-solving and critical-thinking skills, with the ability to think strategically
Effective communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams
Experience in the Information & Communication Technology industry, with a focus on Software Engineering, is preferred
What we offer
At Soedarpo Informatika, we are committed to providing our employees with a fulfilling and rewarding work environment. As the Application Engineering & Tech Division Head, you can expect:
Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package
Opportunities for career advancement and professional development
Collaborative and supportive team culture that encourages innovation and growth
About us
Soedarpo Informatika is a leading provider of innovative software solutions, serving clients across a wide range of industries. Our mission is to empower businesses with cutting-edge technology that drives growth and improves efficiency. With a team of talented professionals and a commitment to excellence, we are dedicated to delivering exceptional results for our clients.
If you are passionate about leading a dynamic team of application engineers and contributing to the success of a thriving technology company, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.
Apply now
to join the Soedarpo Informatika team!

Pengalaman: 5+ years of experience in Java development
Pendidikan: Not specified

metadata.job_title: Senior Java Software Engineer - Indonesia - Remote (29155)
metadata.original_description:
About CSG
CSG is a multinational organization headquartered in the United States with more than 5000 employees in countries around the world.
We’re a SaaS platform company that helps some of the world’s most recognizable brands solve their toughest business challenges. Our innovative solutions and trusted experts enable companies to create customer experiences that set them apart.
At CSG, you're more than your resume. We want your diverse perspective and unique background to help us enrich the work we do together. We believe that by channelling the power of all, we make ordinary customer and employee experiences extraordinary. This is your opportunity to join one of our high-performing teams. Channel the power of YOU and begin the journey to becoming a CSGer.
About the role
Joining our team as a Senior Java Developer you will collaborate with our cross-functional team to design, build, and optimize features/technology for the CSG Quote & Order product.
In your first 90 days, you’ll get comfortable with our system, build strong relationships with the team, and kick-off new feature development to deliver awesome outcomes for our customers.
What you will do
Champion clean, efficient code by giving thoughtful PR feedback and holding the team to high standards.
Mentor and inspire the team by sharing your expertise and helping others level up their skills.
Collaborate with product and design teams to translate customer needs into impactful, user-friendly features.
Take ownership across our systems. Spot inefficiencies, resolve bottlenecks and keep everything running like clockwork.
Evaluate new tools, frameworks, and trends to keep us at the forefront of innovation and productivity.
You Should Have
You’ve been building with modern Java SE (17+) for 5+ years and know your stuff.
You thrive on teamwork, can communicate and collaborate easily with your teammates.
Linux and Docker are your natural habitat. You’re completely at home in this environment.
You know your way around the development tools like GitHub, Maven and Kubernetes
Bonus points if you’ve dabbled in: AWS/Azure, PL/PGSQL, MyBatis, Camunda BPMN Engine, REST API frameworks and other parts of our technology stack.
Perks & benefits
Work from anywhere: CSG has a global policy called "Flexibility First" that allows employees to work from wherever they feel most productive. The Quote & Order team does not maintain a dedicated office space, so your position will be 100% remote with the exception of several in-person workshops during the year (in Bali – see below – and Melbourne).
Twice-yearly workshops in Bali: Twice a year the whole Quote & Order team gets together in Bali, Indonesia for dedicated in-person time including team presentations, hackathon sessions, training and team-building activities.
Paid volunteer days: Everyone at CSG gets two paid days per year to volunteer at a community organization of your choice.

We are seeking a highly skilled and versatile
Full-Stack Software Engineer / Developer
with specialized expertise in
Artificial Intelligence (AI)
and the capability to operate as a
Solution Architect
. The ideal candidate will design, develop, and deploy scalable end-to-end software systems — integrating cutting-edge AI solutions — while collaborating closely with clients to deliver innovative, business-driven technology solutions.
This role requires a balance of
front-end and back-end development skills
, deep understanding of
AI technologies
, and the strategic thinking of a
solution architect
.
Qualifications
Core Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or related field.
2–5 years of professional experience in full-stack software development.
Proficiency in front-end technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks such as React.js (preferred), Vue.js, or Angular.
Proven experience in back-end development using Node.js (preferred), Python, Java, Ruby, or similar languages.
Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases, including schema design and query optimization.
Experience in RESTful API development and integration.
Strong understanding of OOP principles and modern software development practices.
Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines, Git, and deployment to production environments.
Familiarity with Agile / Scrum development methodologies.
AI & Solution Architecture Skills
Experience implementing and deploying machine learning models and integrating AI into production systems.
Knowledge of LLM fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and AI deployment workflows.
Understanding of RAG pipelines, vector databases, and cloud-based AI architectures.
Ability to design, document, and present system architectures to both technical and non-technical audiences.
Additional Qualifications
Experience building LLM-based chatbots, AI automation platforms, or intelligent SaaS products.
Knowledge of LangChain, Pinecone, Weaviate, or other vector database solutions.
Familiarity with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
Certifications such as AWS Machine Learning, Google Cloud AI Engineer, or Solution Architect Professional.
Responsibilities
Translate business requirements into technical system designs and end-to-end AI-driven solutions.
Develop and implement AI models and integrate them into full-stack applications.
Manage the entire software development lifecycle (SDLC) — from design to deployment.
Provide technical support and guidance during implementation and post-deployment phases.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (data engineers, frontend developers, DevOps) to deliver complete solutions.
Advise the business team on AI trends, opportunities, and strategic innovation.
Design solutions with scalability, maintainability, and security in mind.
Recommend appropriate technologies, architectures, and frameworks based on client needs and project goals.
• Serve as a technical consultant for stakeholders, presenting solutions and guiding decision-making.

page_content:
Posisi: HR Generalist Senior Staff (Industrial)
Perusahaan: PT Lawencon Internasional
Skill Dibutuhkan: Industrial relations, Employee administration, HR policy development, Training and development, Legal compliance, Communication skills, Interpersonal skills, Problem-solving, Administrative software proficiency (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Slack)
Pengalaman: 4 years of proven experience as an HR Generalist, with a focus on industrial relations and HR operations. Minimum of 2 years in a supervisory HR role preferred.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Engineer, Science or a related field.
Tugas Utama: Handle industrial relations matters, develop and implement HR policies, manage employee administration, facilitate onboarding and training, ensure compliance with labor laws, provide strategic HR insights, and act as a communication bridge between employees and management.

metadata.original_description:
We are looking for an experienced HR Generalist who is dynamic, proactive, and ready to work in both South Jakarta and North Sumatera (if needed). This position is responsible for handling a wide range of HR functions with a strong focus on industrial relations, employee administration, HR policy development, training, and legal compliance.
This is a hands-on role ideal for someone who enjoys working in a flat organizational structure, thrives in field-based environments, and is open to relocation or travel as part of their responsibilities.
Key Responsibilities:
Handle industrial relations matters, including drafting employment agreements (PKWT/PKWTT), internal regulations, and managing employee disputes or disciplinary issues.
Develop and implement HR policies, SOPs, and internal guidelines in alignment with operational needs.
Manage all aspects of employee administration: attendance, leave, contracts, insurance (BPJS), performance appraisal, people development and general HR documentation.
Facilitate employee onboarding, basic training, and skills development programs.
Ensure full compliance with Indonesian labor law
Provide strategic insights on HR improvements that align with field operations and business objectives.
Act as a communication bridge between employees and management to maintain a positive work environment.
Willing to work on-site at either South Jakarta or North Sumatera depending on business needs
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Engineer, Science or a related field.
4 years of proven experience as an HR Generalist, preferably with a focus on industrial relations and HR operations.
Minimum of 2 years of experience in a supervisory HR role will be given preference and may be prioritized during the selection process.
Preference for candidates from outside the area (out-of-town/“anak rantau”) who are independent and adaptive to new environments.
Demonstrates a humble, creative, open-minded, and collaborative mindset.
Strong knowledge of Indonesian labor laws, employee rights, and BPJS regulations.
Comfortable working in a flat organization with minimal hierarchy.
Willing to travel and work on-site in field locations North Sumatera as needed.
Proficient in administrative software (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Slack, etc.).
Strong interpersonal and communication skills; able to resolve issues diplomatically and build trust across teams.

metadata.original_description:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!
‎
‎
Job Description
We are hiring Software Engineers across multiple platforms: Backend, Web, iOS, and Android
. You will be matched with a team based on your expertise and interests.
As a Software Engineer, you will be part of a cross-functional team building scalable and high-impact products. Depending on your area of expertise, you will take ownership of designing, developing, testing, and maintaining features end-to-end, ensuring performance, reliability, and user satisfaction.
In this role, you will:
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and deliver new features
Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code
Participate in code reviews and design discussions to ensure best practices
Troubleshoot and debug production issues, and continuously improve system performance
Stay up to date with emerging technologies and industry trends
Contribute to internal tools, documentation, and technical processes
‎
Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience
Solid understanding of computer science fundamentals such as data structures, algorithms, and software design principles
Proficiency in at least one general-purpose programming language (e.g., Java, Kotlin, Swift, Go, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, etc.)
Experience in building, testing, and maintaining production-level software
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Comfortable working in a collaborative, agile development environment
Preferred Qualifications (depending on specialization):
Backend:
Familiar with Java or other backend languages; experienced in server-side development, APIs, databases, and cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP)
Web:
Familiarity with frontend frameworks like React or Typescript
iOS:
Proficiency in Swift or Objective-C and understanding of iOS frameworks and architecture
Android:
Proficiency in Kotlin or Java, and knowledge of Android SDK, Jetpack components, and app lifecycle
‎
If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!

metadata.original_description:
Capek jadi developer yang cuma kebagian fix bug tanpa tantangan nyata? Jenuh ngerjain fitur yang gak pernah dipakai user? Atau stuck di comfort zone tanpa ruang untuk eksplorasi teknologi baru? Saatnya gabung bareng tim
SEVIMA
sebagai Fullstack Developer! Setiap baris kode yang kamu bangun di sini bukan cuma numpuk di repo, tapi langsung berdampak buat 3.5 juta+ pengguna di platform pendidikan digital terbesar di Indonesia. Kamu nggak cuma ngulik frontend atau backend aja, tapi berperan penuh sebagai problem solver buat menciptakan solusi teknologi bagi ribuan institusi pendidikan.
🚀 Eksplorasi teknologi cutting-edge bersama kami! Dari implementasi Generative AI dan NLP, hingga arsitektur microservices yang scalable menggunakan mulai dari yang sederhana seperti PHP Framework modern, DB PostgreSQL, Phyton, Clickhouse Data Warehouse, Vue.js, dan Node.js sampai pemanfaatan infrastruktur cloud computing modern dengan Docker, Redis, RabbitMQ, GoogleBigQuery, dan Generative AI (LLM). Mentor-mentor berpengalaman siap mendorong Anda keluar dari zona nyaman, mengasah leadership skill melalui code review, tech sharing, dan architecture discussion. Bergabunglah dengan #Sevima Engineering Tim dan jadilah bagian dari revolusi teknologi pendidikan Indonesia! 🎯
#BuildForImpact #TechForEducation #FutureOfLearning
Kualifikasi:
Minimal 2 tahun pengalaman sebagai PHP Programmer
Memiliki idealisme tinggi terhadap kode yang berkualitas dan clean
Proaktif dalam mengidentifikasi masalah dan mengusulkan solusi
Komitmen kuat dalam delivery dan pencapaian target
Menguasai Framework PHP Modern (Laravel)
Familiar dengan PostgreSQL dan Data Warehouse
Pengalaman dengan Vue.js dan TypeScript
Memahami konsep Microservices Architecture
Pengalaman dengan Docker dan tools DevOps adalah nilai plus
Problem solver dan fast learner dengan inisiatif tinggi
Mampu bekerja dalam tim dan berkomunikasi dengan baik
Yang Akan Anda Kerjakan:
Mengembangkan fitur-fitur baru untuk platform SEVIMA
Merancang dan mengimplementasi arsitektur sistem yang scalable
Melakukan code review dan mentoring untuk junior programmer (jika dibutuhkan)
Berkolaborasi dalam squad untuk delivering high-quality solutions
Mengeksplorasi dan mengimplementasi teknologi baru
Yang Kami Tawarkan:
Competitive salary & benefits
Makan siang
Mentor berpengalaman untuk pengembangan karir
Akses ke tech conference dan workshop
Program continuous learning
Lingkungan kerja yang mendukung inovasi
Work-life balance

page_content:
Posisi: Digital Marketing & Growth Manager
Perusahaan: PT JNJ Estetika Utama
Skill Dibutuhkan: Digital Marketing Strategy, Content Creation, Social Media Management, Performance Advertising, Funnel Optimization, Lead Management, Team Leadership, Data Analysis, Sales Psychology, AI Tools Utilization, Analytical Skills, Organizational Skills, Target-Oriented
Pengalaman: 3–6 tahun pengalaman di digital marketing, pengalaman di industri klinik estetika/beauty/wellness/dental menjadi nilai tambah.
Pendidikan: Tidak disebutkan secara spesifik, namun diharapkan memiliki latar belakang yang relevan dengan digital marketing.
Tugas Utama: Menyusun dan mengeksekusi strategi digital marketing, mengarahkan konten dan media sosial, menjalankan dan mengoptimalkan iklan, mengelola funnel dan lead, memimpin tim, serta memonitor KPI dan membuat laporan performa.

metadata.original_description:
Tanggung Jawab Utama
1. Marketing Growth Strategy
Menyusun dan mengeksekusi strategi digital untuk meningkatkan leads, konsultasi, dan booking.
Menjaga brand tone premium yang mencerminkan trust, expertise, dan confidence.
Mengarahkan strategi marketing untuk 3 cabang: Pondok Indah, PIK, dan Bali.
2. Content & Social Media Direction
Menyetujui dan mengarahkan weekly content calendar (reels, TikTok, posting, YouTube).
Mengawasi kualitas storytelling, before-after, edukasi, dan patient journey content.
3. Performance Ads Execution
Menjalankan dan mengoptimalkan Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Google Ads, YouTube Ads.
Melakukan A/B testing untuk creative, audience, dan landing page.
Mengelola dan scaling ads untuk menghasilkan leads berkualitas.
4. Funnel Optimization & Lead Management
Mengoptimalkan funnel dari awareness → leads → follow-up → appointment → closing.
Meningkatkan kualitas follow-up CSR, appointment rate, dan closing rate melalui script, training, dan evaluasi rutin.
5. Leadership & Team Management
Memimpin dan mengembangkan tim CSR dan content creator.
Mengelola kerja sama KOL/influencer serta mengevaluasi ROI-nya.
Menggunakan AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Canva AI) untuk meningkatkan efisiensi kerja tim.
6. KPI Monitoring & Reporting
Monitoring KPI utama: Leads, CPL, CTR, Lead Quality, Appointment Rate, Closing Rate, Revenue.
Membuat laporan mingguan & bulanan berisi analisis performa dan rekomendasi scaling.
Bekerja untuk mencapai target sales bulanan klinik.
Kualifikasi
3–6 tahun pengalaman di digital marketing.
Sangat kuat di Meta Ads & TikTok Ads.
Pengalaman di industri klinik estetika/beauty/wellness/dental menjadi nilai tambah besar.
Leadership kuat, mampu membimbing tim dan bekerja berbasis data.
Paham sales psychology, funnel optimization, dan retargeting.
Terbiasa menggunakan AI untuk efisiensi eksekusi marketing.
Analitis, disiplin, terorganisir, dan berorientasi pada target.
Fluency in English (spoken and written) is an advantage.
Compensation – Benefits:
Competitive Salary (Negotiable depending on qualifications) + Bonus KPI
Tunjangan Hari Raya (THR)
BPJS Kesehatan & Ketenagakerjaan
Other benefits as per company policy

metadata.original_description:
Peran Digitial Marketing & Social Media Specialist
Kami sedang mencari Digital Marketing & Social Media Specialist yang berpengalaman dan kreatif untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di PT Mandiri Bangun Sukses Sejahtera. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memainkan peran penting dalam mengembangkan dan mengeksekusi strategi pemasaran digital dan aktivitas media sosial yang efektif untuk memperluas jangkauan merek kami dan menarik target audiens yang relevan.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
Mengelola dan mengoptimalkan kampanye iklan berbayar di platform media sosial seperti Facebook, Instagram, dan LinkedIn
Mengembangkan konten media sosial yang menarik dan terlibat, termasuk posting, cerita, dan video, serta menganalisis kinerja untuk terus meningkatkan efektivitas
Mengumpulkan dan menganalisis data dan analitik pemasaran digital untuk membuat rekomendasi strategi dan taktik yang diinformasikan
Berkolaborasi dengan tim pemasaran lainnya untuk mengintegrasikan upaya pemasaran digital dengan inisiatif pemasaran lainnya
Memantau tren industri dan kompetitor untuk mengidentifikasi peluang pemasaran dan konten yang inovatif
Membantu dalam peluncuran produk dan kampanye pemasaran baru
Keterampilan dan Kualifikasi yang Dibutuhkan
Gelar sarjana atau setara dalam bidang Pemasaran, Komunikasi, Periklanan, atau bidang terkait
Pemahaman yang kuat tentang platform media sosial, tren, dan strategi yang efektif
Kemampuan menganalisis data dan membuat rekomendasi yang diinformasikan
Keterampilan kreatif dan kemampuan untuk mengembangkan konten visual yang menarik
Kemampuan untuk bekerja dalam lingkungan yang berubah-ubah dan menghadapi batas waktu yang ketat
Kemahiran dalam menggunakan alat pemasaran digital seperti Google Analytics, Facebook Ads Manager, dan lainnya
Tentang PT Mandiri Bangun Sukses Sejahtera
PT Mandiri Bangun Sukses Sejahtera adalah perusahaan pengembangan properti terkemuka di Indonesia yang berfokus pada pembangunan perumahan modern dan proyek komersial. Dengan lebih dari 20 tahun pengalaman, kami dikenal karena komitmen kami pada inovasi, keberlanjutan, dan memberikan pengalaman terbaik bagi pelanggan kami. Budaya kami didasarkan pada keunggulan operasional, integritas, dan rasa tanggung jawab sosial. Kami bangga menjadi tempat kerja yang inklusif dan beragam, serta mendukung pengembangan profesional karyawan kami.
Tertarik untuk bergabung dengan kami? Lamar sekarang untuk peran Digital Marketing & Social Media Specialist yang menarik ini.

Our restaurant group in Jakarta is expanding, and we’re looking for a creative, data-driven Social Media Specialist to lead the online presence of our F&B brands. If you live and breathe food, storytelling, and social media trends - this role is for you.
Your Key Responsibilities :

Build monthly content plans and campaign calendars for brand's Instagram & TikTok accounts
Work closely with the design and marketing team to ensure cohesive messaging
Content Creation & Publishing

Oversee photoshoots, store visits, and on-ground content gathering
Ensure content is high-quality, on-brand, and optimized for each platform
Community Management
Monitor daily audience interactions (comments, DMs, mentions) across channels
Engage with followers proactively and build a strong brand community
Manage community growth and UGC (user-generated content)
Research & Insights
Research social media trends, viral formats, competitor activities, and F&B content patterns
Track, analyze, and report performance metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth, CTR, conversion)
Campaigns, KOLs & Paid Ads
Support influencer/KOL collaborations and campaign executions
Work with the marketing team on paid social ads and content amplification

Familiar with social media trends, reels, storytelling formats, and community-building
Basic photo/video taking and editing skills (CapCut, Canva, or similar)
Good analytical skills with ability to turn data into action points
Organized and proactive
Excellent communication skills (Bahasa Indonesia & English)
Experience working with KOLs/influencers will be key
Knowledge of Jakarta’s F&B scene and dining trends

metadata.original_description:
About the role
As a Digital Marketing Specialist, you will play a crucial role in driving the digital marketing strategy for Midea Electronics Indonesia, a leading consumer electronics brand. In this full-time position based in the heart of Jakarta, you will be responsible for developing and executing innovative digital campaigns to enhance the brand's online presence and engagement with customers.
What you'll be doing
Execute and monitor digital marketing campaigns across social media, email, and web platforms.
Manage marketing tools/platforms (e.g., CRM, marketing automation, analytics dashboards).
Track campaign performance and prepare regular reports (KPIs, leads, conversions, ROI).
Ensure accurate tagging, tracking, and data management for all digital marketing activities.
Coordinate with internal teams and vendors to ensure timely delivery of campaign assets.
Support process improvement and automation to increase efficiency in campaign execution.
Maintain consistency of brand and messaging across all digital channels.
What we're looking for
Minimum 3 years of experience in digital marketing, with a proven track record of successful campaign execution
Strong understanding of search engine optimisation (SEO), search engine marketing (SEM), social media marketing, and data analytics
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
Ability to think creatively and develop innovative digital marketing solutions
Proficiency in using digital marketing tools and platforms, such as Google Ads, Google Analytics, and social media management tools
Degree in marketing, communications, or a related field
What we offer
At Midea Electronics Indonesia, we believe in creating a work environment that fosters growth, collaboration, and work-life balance. We offer competitive salaries, comprehensive benefits, and opportunities for professional development. Our team is passionate about innovation and delivering exceptional customer experiences, and we're excited to welcome a talented Digital Marketing Specialist to join our dynamic organisation.

A collaborative and forward-thinking culture that values creativity, accountability, and continuous improvement.

Contribute ideas that match current trends and brand positioning.

Female
Bachelor’s degree from related majors
Having 1–2 years of experience in Social Media/Creative Design role

Camera-friendly appearance, suitable for a premium educational brand image.

Ideally, a boy and girl duo to balance representation and increase content versatility.
Note: Please attached your CV and Portfolio
✨
Apply now and e part of TRAIN Edu’s mission to empower students and shape the future of global education!

metadata.original_description:
Responsibilites :
Mengembangkan strategi marketing dan memimpin arah kreatif dan identitas visual brand di semua platform online maupun offline.
Mengembangkan serta mengeksekusi konsep desain untuk kampanye, iklan, media sosial, konten digital, kemasan, hingga materi cetak.
Berkolaborasi dengan copywriter, tim marketing, dan departemen lain untuk menciptakan solusi kreatif yang kuat dan selaras.
Membimbing, mengarahkan, dan memberikan feedback kepada tim desain agar menghasilkan karya berkualitas tinggi.
Memantau tren industri, teknologi, serta praktik terbaik dalam desain.
Menyajikan ide dan konsep kreatif kepada manajemen atau klien dengan argumentasi yang jelas.
Mengawasi proses kreatif dari brainstorming, pengembangan konsep, eksekusi, hingga finalisasi.
Requirements :
Pendidikan minimal S1 Desain, Komunikasi Visual, Periklanan, atau bidang terkait.
Menguasai Strategi Marketing dan Branding.
Pengalaman kerja sebagai Art Director, Senior Graphic Designer, Marketing Spv, atau posisi sejenis (minimal 3 tahun di bidang kreatif).
Memiliki portofolio yang kuat dan beragam (digital, cetak, branding, kampanye).
Menguasai Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign; After Effects menjadi nilai tambah).
Pemahaman mendalam tentang tipografi, teori warna, komposisi, dan layout.
Kemampuan komunikasi dan kepemimpinan yang baik.
Mampu bekerja dalam tekanan dan mengelola beberapa proyek sekaligus.
Pengalaman dalam motion graphics, video editing, atau fotografi.
Familiar dengan prinsip desain UI/UX.
Mampu mempresentasikan ide kreatif secara meyakinkan.
Bersedia ditempatkan di Jakarta Utara.

page_content:
Posisi: Marketing Manager
Perusahaan: PT Richeese Kuliner Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Digital marketing, Print advertising, Outdoor advertising, Content creation, Market analysis, Budget management, Data analysis, Performance monitoring, Collaboration, Communication, Interpersonal skills, SEO, Google Analytics, Creativity, Innovative thinking
Pengalaman: Minimum 5 years of experience in a marketing or brand management role, preferably within the food and beverage industry
Pendidikan: Bachelor's or Master's degree in business, marketing, communication or related field
Tugas Utama: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies, implement marketing campaigns across various channels, collaborate with teams for content creation, analyze market trends and sales data, manage marketing budget, monitor marketing performance, liaise with external partners, stay updated with marketing technologies, drive brand-building activities.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
As a Marketing Manager at PT Richeese Kuliner Indonesia, you will be responsible for developing and executing comprehensive marketing strategies to promote the company's diverse range of food products across the Bandung West Java region. This full-time role is a key position within the Marketing & Communications team, driving brand awareness, customer engagement, and sales growth.
What you'll be doing
Devise and implement effective marketing campaigns across various channels, including digital, print, and outdoor advertising
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to create compelling content and promotional materials that align with the company's branding and positioning
Analyse market trends, consumer insights, and sales data to identify opportunities and inform strategic decision-making
Manage the marketing budget and ensure efficient allocation of resources to achieve the desired business outcomes
Monitor and report on the performance of marketing initiatives, using data-driven insights to optimise and refine campaigns
Liaise with external partners, such as advertising agencies and media outlets, to ensure the successful delivery of marketing activities
Stay up-to-date with industry best practices and emerging marketing technologies to continuously enhance the company's marketing efforts
Proactively involve and drive any brand-building activities assigned, including but not limited to PR, offline activations/BTL, and brand-centric campaigns.
Proven success in ATL&BTL development and execution.
What we're looking for
Bachelor's or Master's degree in business, marketing, communication or related field.
Minimum 5 years of experience in a marketing or brand management role, preferably within the food and beverage industry
Proven track record of developing and executing successful, integrated marketing campaigns that drive brand awareness and sales
Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to interpret data and use insights to inform strategic decisions
Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
Proficiency in digital marketing tools and platforms, including social media, SEO, and Google Analytics
Creativity and innovative thinking to develop unique and impactful marketing campaigns
Willing to be placed in Bandung.
Apply now for this exciting opportunity to join our talented team and contribute to the continued success of PT Richeese Kuliner Indonesia.

page_content:
Posisi: Social Media Specialist
Perusahaan: PT. Jelita Abadi Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Content creation, Digital storytelling, Copywriting, Editing, Social media management, Analytics, A/B testing, Content strategy, Community engagement, Influencer management
Pengalaman: 1–2 years of experience as a Content Specialist, Social Media Specialist, or similar.
Pendidikan: Not specified, but relevant experience is emphasized.
Tugas Utama: Lead the full content creation process, build and execute content strategy, craft strong hooks and storylines, manage client social media accounts, track performance using insights and analytics, plan and execute content campaigns, collaborate with teams, conduct A/B testing, benchmark competitors for growth opportunities.

metadata.original_description:
Responsibilities :
- Lead the full content creation process: from ideation, scripting, filming direction, editing coordination, to publishing, ensuring every piece is high-quality, on-brand, and optimized for engagement across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube
- Build and execute content strategy, including pillars, calendars, and brand tone.
- Craft strong hooks, storylines, short-form scripts, captions, and creative formats that drive reach, retention, and conversions.
- Manage and grow client social media accounts end-to-end: posting cadence, community interactions, platform hygiene, and KPI delivery (engagement rate, reach, follower growth, CTR, saves, shares, video views).
- Use insights and analytics dashboards to track performance, identify trends, optimize content, and develop monthly reports with clear recommendations.
- Plan and execute content campaigns aligned with marketing objectives, including optional influencer/KOL management when relevant (outreach, negotiation, briefing, and performance reporting).
- Collaborate with strategists, designers, and creators to ensure content consistency, quality, and impact across all channels.
- Conduct simple A/B testing (hooks, thumbnails, posting times) and apply learnings to improve ongoing performance.
- Benchmark competitors and spot opportunities for growth, trend adoption, and new content ideas.
What You Bring :
- 1–2 years of experience as a Content Specialist, Social Media Specialist, or similar.
- Strong understanding of digital storytelling, how to hook, hold, and convert attention.
- A portfolio or track record of content that performed well (viral, high engagement, strong CTR, etc.).
- Deep knowledge of social media trends, algorithms, and best practices.
- Strong copywriting and editing skills in English and Bahasa
- Experience working with creative teams and briefing visual content (graphic, photo, video).
- Familiar with tools like analytics dashboards.
Key Skills & Metrics You’ll Own
- Storytelling & content structure.
- Writing strong hooks and CTAs.
- Engagement rate, reach, impressions, saves, shares, and video views.
- Viral content creation and trend adaptation.
- Influencer ROI and campaign performance.
- Follower growth, link clicks, and traffic from content.

page_content:
Posisi: Digital Marketing Specialist
Perusahaan: MVP Group
Skill Dibutuhkan: Digital marketing strategies, Social media management, Content creation, Digital advertising (Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads), Copywriting, Digital analytics, Creative collaboration, Partnership management
Pengalaman: Minimum of 3 years experience in digital marketing (preferably in sports, fitness, or lifestyle industries).
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Communication, Marketing, Management, DKV or a related field.
Tugas Utama: Develop and execute digital marketing strategies, manage digital channels, create engaging content, plan and run digital advertising campaigns, collaborate with creative teams, build partnerships, analyze campaign performance.

metadata.original_description:
Key Responsibilities
• Develop and execute digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness and engagement.
• Manage all digital channels (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube, Website).
• Create engaging and relevant content, including videos, reels, captions, testimonials, and event campaigns.
• Plan and run digital advertising campaigns (Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads) with precise audience targeting.
• Collaborate with the creative team, photographers, and videographers to produce high-quality visual content.
• Build and manage partnerships with influencers, sports communities, and brand partners.
• Analyze digital campaign performance, prepare regular reports, and provide insights for optimization.
Qualifications
• Bachelor’s degree in Communication, Marketing, Management, DKV or a related field.
• Minimum of 3 years experience in digital marketing (preferably in sports, fitness, or lifestyle industries).
• Proficient in social media management and digital advertising platforms (Meta Ads, Google Ads).
• Strong copywriting skills aligned with Jungle Padel’s tone — energetic, active, and lifestyle-oriented.
• Understanding of digital analytics (engagement rate, reach, conversions).
• Creative, communicative, and genuinely passionate about sports and social media.
• Ability to create and edit short-form content (Reels/TikTok).

Skill Dibutuhkan: SEO, SEM, Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, tools analitik, marketing automation tools (HubSpot, Mailchimp, Marketo), basic HTML/CSS, A/B testing, conversion rate optimization (CRO), tools desain (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite), marketing funnel, customer journey mapping, attribution modeling, multi-touch attribution, competitor analysis, benchmarking, KPI measurement, ROI measurement, copywriting, komunikasi, design grafis, project management, time management, adaptabilitas, problem-solving

Pendidikan: Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Marketing, Komunikasi, atau setara
Tugas Utama: Merancang, mengimplementasikan, dan mengoptimalkan strategi pemasaran digital di berbagai kanal online untuk meningkatkan brand awareness, traffic, serta konversi penjualan.

metadata.original_description:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan
Digital Marketing Specialist bertanggung jawab untuk merancang, mengimplementasikan, dan mengoptimalkan strategi pemasaran digital di berbagai kanal online guna meningkatkan brand awareness, traffic, serta konversi penjualan. Posisi ini membutuhkan kemampuan analisis data yang kuat, pemahaman mendalam tentang perilaku konsumen digital, dan kreativitas dalam mengembangkan kampanye yang efektif.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
Strategi & Perencanaan
• Menyusun dan melaksanakan strategi digital marketing sesuai dengan tujuan bisnis perusahaan
• Melakukan riset pasar dan analisis tren digital untuk menemukan peluang pertumbuhan baru
• Mengikuti perkembangan teknologi digital dan tren marketing terbaru
Kampanye Digital
• Mengelola kampanye berbayar (Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, dll.)
• Mengoptimalkan SEO dan SEM untuk meningkatkan visibilitas situs web
• Mengatur email marketing dan marketing automation
Konten & Media Sosial
• Membuat materi promosi (artikel, video, infografis, dll.)
• Menjadwalkan dan mengelola postingan di platform media sosial (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok, dsb)
• Memantau engagement dan merespons audiens sesuai brand voice
Analisis & Pelaporan
• Memantau performa kampanye melalui tools analitik (Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite, dsb)
• Membuat laporan performa digital marketing secara rutin
• Menggunakan data untuk memberikan rekomendasi strategi optimasi
Kolaborasi & Koordinasi
• Berkoordinasi dengan tim sales untuk lead nurturing dan follow-up
• Bekerja sama dengan tim product untuk campaign alignment
• Koordinasi dengan vendor/agency eksternal jika diperlukan
Budget Management
• Mengelola dan mengoptimalkan budget kampanye digital
• Melakukan forecasting dan planning budget bulanan/kuartalan
Compliance & Brand Guidelines
• Memastikan semua materi marketing sesuai dengan brand guidelines
• Mengikuti regulasi dan compliance terkait digital advertising
Kualifikasi
Pendidikan & Pengalaman
• Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Marketing, Komunikasi, atau setara
• Pengalaman kerja minimal 2 tahun di bidang digital marketing
Keterampilan Teknis
• Menguasai SEO, SEM, Google Ads, Meta Ads, dan tools analitik
• Penguasaan marketing automation tools (HubSpot, Mailchimp, Marketo)
• Pemahaman basic HTML/CSS untuk landing page optimization
• Pengalaman dengan A/B testing dan conversion rate optimization (CRO)
• Kemampuan menggunakan tools desain (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite)
• Pengetahuan tentang marketing funnel dan customer journey mapping
Keterampilan Analitis
• Pengalaman dengan attribution modeling dan multi-touch attribution
• Kemampuan melakukan competitor analysis dan benchmarking
• Pemahaman tentang KPI dan ROI measurement untuk digital campaigns
Soft Skills
• Memiliki kemampuan copywriting dan komunikasi yang baik
• Memiliki kemampuan design grafis
• Kreatif, analitis, dan mampu bekerja dalam tim maupun secara mandiri
• Kemampuan project management dan time management
• Adaptabilitas terhadap perubahan algoritma platform digital
• Problem-solving skills untuk troubleshooting campaign issues
