metadata.original_description:
Villa Tours & Travel (PT. Villa Setya Wisata), berlokasi di Pejaten Barat, Pasar Minggu, Jakarta Selatan, DKI JAKARTA, adalah Perusahaan Perjalanan Wisata yang sudah berdiri sejak tahun 2008 dengan produk halal tours, umroh dan haji membutuhkan beberapa staff Digital Marketing Specialist yang kreatif dan memiliki kemampuan analitis yang kuat untuk mengelola berbagai Sosial Media dan kampanye pemasaran digital.
Posisi ini akan berfokus pada peningkatan brand awareness, traffic, serta konversi melalui berbagai platform digital.
Tanggung Jawab Utama:
Menyusun strategi konten serta kalender publikasi untuk media sosial perusahaan.
Meningkatkan engagement dan jumlah followers secara organik.
Mengelola, mengoptimalkan, dan memonitor kampanye digital (Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, dan platform lainnya).
Melakukan analisis performa kampanye menggunakan Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite, dan tools analitik lainnya.
Berkolaborasi dengan tim desain dan konten dalam pembuatan materi promosi.
Melakukan riset tren pasar, audiens, dan kompetitor untuk pengembangan strategi digital.
Mengelola website perusahaan, SEO, serta email marketing (jika diperlukan).
Kualifikasi:
Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 (Komunikasi, Marketing, Bisnis, atau bidang terkait).
Pengalaman minimal 1 tahun di digital marketing.
Memahami SEO/SEM dan analisis data digital.
Menguasai platform iklan digital (Google, Meta, TikTok).
Kreatif, komunikatif, dan mampu bekerja dalam tim.
Menguasai tools desain dasar (Corel, Canva atau Photoshop).
Memiliki kemampuan copywriting dan storytelling.
Mampu bekerja berdasarkan target dan deadline.
Nilai Tambah:
Bahasa Inggris aktif.
Pengalaman membuat konten perjalanan atau wisata.
Memiliki pengetahuan tantang sejarah peradaban dan sirah nabi
Menguasai dasar dasar pengetahuan Fiqih, Syariah, dan Sunah
Hobby Travelling dan Memyukai Perjalanan Domestik Internasional
Mempunyai Jiwa Kepemimpinan serta tertarik untuk menjadi Tour Leader

page_content:
Posisi: Digital Marketing Specialist
Perusahaan: Learning Time Limited
Skill Dibutuhkan: Digital marketing, Customer acquisition, Sales conversions, Lead generation, SEO, SEM, Google Ads, Campaign management, Data analysis, Reporting, Email marketing, WhatsApp marketing, Website optimisation, A/B testing, Content creation, CRM management, Online marketing strategies
Pengalaman: Min 2-3 years of experience in e-commerce and/or digital marketing.
Pendidikan: Not specified, but relevant experience is required.
Tugas Utama: Optimise and manage customer acquisition through paid advertising, execute performance marketing strategies, manage SEO and SEM campaigns, execute digital paid ad campaigns, manage CRM database, implement lead nurturing strategies, optimise website performance, measure and report on e-commerce and CRM performance, deliver performance reports with actionable insights, collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance customer journey.

metadata.original_description:
Hello! We are a rapidly growing education company in need of an experienced, results-driven digital marketing specialist to own customer acquisition, drive conversions and directly fuel our growth.
Note on experience:
We are seeking candidates with a proven track record in driving sales conversions and generating high-quality leads. Applicants whose experience is primarily in brand awareness, engagement, or traffic-only campaigns will not be considered.
Main Responsibilities
Optimise and manage our customer acquisition through paid advertising to drive conversion on the website and CRM.
Strategy & Planning:
Execute comprehensive performance marketing strategies that are primarily focused on driving conversion (sales, high-quality leads, etc).
Plan and manage end-to-end SEO and SEM Google Ads.
Campaign Management & Execution:
End-to-end execution of digital paid ad campaigns, from market research, budgeting, to monitoring, tracking and reporting.
Proactively manage and optimise campaigns daily to achieve target KPIs (cost per lead, CAC, ROAS).
Website & CRM:
Manage our CRM database and implement lead nurturing strategies to convert leads into sales through email and WhatsApp marketing.
Optimise website performance, including A/B testing, product catalogues, checkout flow and user experience.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance the overall customer journey.
Analysis & Optimisation:
Measure and report on the performance of e-commerce platforms and CRM through analytic tools such as Google Analytics etc.
Using advanced data analysis to optimise ad spend CPA/CAC and scale ROAS/ROI.
Deliver clear in-depth performance reports with actionable insights and optimisation recommendations on weekly and monthly basis.
Collaborate with other teams to align on the overall brand strategy.
Requirements
Min 2-3 years of experience in e-commerce and/or digital marketing.
Proficient in using e-commerce platforms and web analytics tools.
Excellent data analysis and reporting skills, using data insight to make decisions.
Good understanding of online marketing strategies and customer behaviour.
Basic content creation skills, good written and verbal communication skills.
Passionate about digital marketing and willing to learn and improve skills.
Technical Skills:
Platform: Detailed knowledge and hands-on experience with Facebook, Google (Search & YouTube), TikTok, and other digital ads.
Conversion tracking: Expert in setting up and troubleshooting paid ad conversion tracking, including platforms like Meta Pixel/Conversion API, Google Tag Manager (GTM), and UTM parameter creation.
Analytics: Advanced proficiency in leveraging tools such as Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and the native analytics platform to measure campaign data and insights.
Website optimisation: Proven experience in optimising landing pages and website funnels, including the ability to build, A/B test, manage and optimise web pages using platforms like Shopify and WordPress.
Content: Ability to create attractive design and content concepts for ads, website and CRM.
SEO Fundamentals: A working knowledge of Search Engine Optimisation (On-Page techniques) is beneficial, including the ability to write and manage basic SEO.
CRM: Solid experience in using and managing CRM tools such as Hubspot, email and WA marketing, to do remarketing and optimise lead nurturing funnels.
What you enjoy
12 days of annual leave
Great platform to learn and develop new skills
Excellent office environment
About Learning Time Indonesia
With over 25 years of experience in early childhood education, Learning Time is a company that is passionate about supporting parents on their journey of bonding, playing and learning with their babies. We partner with experts to innovate, design and create educational children’s play essentials. Our brand is here to make a difference and reimagine what playtime looks like in the first 1000 days.

metadata.original_description:
Job Overview :
The Digital & Social Media Specialist will be responsible for leading the digital and social media presence of two brand accounts, driving both engagement and conversion through strategic, storytelling-based content and performance marketing.
Requirement :
5–7 years of experience in managing brand communication across platforms,
Creating narratives that connect emotionally with audiences, and executing paid digital campaigns that deliver measurable results.
Candidate excels at balancing creativity with analytical thinking, bringing both brand-building and performance-focused experience.
Give support to e-commerce activation across marketplace platforms to ensure digital efforts effectively drive traffic and conversion.
Key Responsibilities :
Lead Social Media Strategy and Execution Develop and manage digital and social media strategies for two brand accounts.
Oversee content posting, KOL management, and platform performance.
Brand Storytelling and Content Management Craft and oversee compelling brand stories across social platforms (Instagram, TikTok, X, YouTube, etc.).
Partner with creative and brand teams to deliver engaging narrative-driven content.
Performance Marketing Manage and optimize paid media campaigns across Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.
Analyze campaign metrics to improve ROI & meet targets like CTR, ROAS, & conversions .
Analytics and Reporting Track social media performance and audience behaviors using analytics tools.
Produce monthly reports with insights and recommendations for improvement.
Cross-functional Collaboration. Work closely with internal teams to align digital campaigns with brand and business goals. Ensure consistent brand tone and identity across digital channels.
E-commerce & Marketplace Support. Coordinate with the e-commerce team to support marketplace campaigns (Tokopedia, Shopee, etc.).
Develop content and digital pushes that drive marketplace traffic and sales. Ensure alignment between social campaigns and marketplace promotional calendars.

page_content:
Posisi: Marketing Communications
Perusahaan: PT HIJAU TUMBUH BERSAMA
Skill Dibutuhkan: Creative marketing, Campaign management, Social media management, Influencer engagement, Event planning, Community building, Communication skills, Customer service, Attention to detail, Multitasking, Proficient in word processing and spreadsheets, Presentation skills, Knowledge of nutrition and healthy lifestyle, Design software (Photoshop/AI)
Pengalaman: 2+ years of experience in offline events, handling e-commerce and offline market
Pendidikan: Not specified
Tugas Utama: Develop and execute creative marketing campaigns, brainstorm and implement strategies for product launches, collaborate with design and digital teams, manage social media content, engage with influencers, monitor campaign performance, assist in planning events and community initiatives, build relationships with health and wellness community, provide feedback to management, support sports events, find new marketing opportunities, stay updated with industry trends, support marketing material localization, assist in daily administration tasks, undertake ad-hoc projects.

metadata.original_description:
PT Hijau Tumbuh Bersama is the company behind the Greenara brand.
Since 2018, Greenara has been a healthy food producer with online and offline distribution through several supermarkets in Indonesia.
Currently, and going forward, Greenara is eager to expand and convince Indonesians that a healthy lifestyle can begin by maintaining the type of food and nutrition of everything consumed at home and outside the home.
All Greenara products are free from preservatives, artificial colors, flavors, and sweeteners, making them safe for long-term consumption. Furthermore, Greenara products have been certified with distribution permits and are halal-certified to ensure the safety and quality of the products distributed. For Greenara, quality, convenience, taste, and customer experience are paramount.
As we plan to expand our team and achieve Greenara's vision, we are seeking highly motivated individuals who can collectively provide value for the benefit of the entire community. The roles we are currently seeking are as follows:
Responsibilities:
Develop and execute creative marketing campaigns to enhance brand awareness and sales.
⁠Brainstorm and implement innovative strategies for product launches and promotions.
Collaborate with design, content, and digital teams to create engaging visuals and copy.
Assist in managing social media content, ensuring consistency in brand voice and aesthetics.
Identify, engage, and execute partnerships with influencers and KOL in the fashion industry
Monitor and analyze campaign performance, optimizing strategies as needed.
Assist in planning events, activations, or experiential marketing initiatives.
Assist in the planning and execution of community initiatives and programs
Build relationships with health, wellness community and influencers
Provide community feedback to the management and stakeholders
Support and monitor sports events like health and wellness
Find new marketing and outreach opportunities to push brand image and products
Stay up to date with the latest industry trends, developments, and hot topics about healthy lifestyle
Support marketing material localization & translations
Support the marketing team in daily administration tasks
Undertake ad-hoc projects as required
Required Qualifications
2+ years of experience in offline events, handling e commerce and offline market
Fluent in English and Indonesian speaking
Enthusiastic about health and welness activity (must have)
Proficient in word processing applications, spreadsheets, and presentation software
Exceptional communication and presentation skills
Good customer service and interpersonal skills
Attention to detail and ability to multitask
Preferred Qualifications
Good knowledge of nutrition, healthy lifestyle
Capable of design software (Photoshop/AI) is a plus
Note: Only resumes submitted in English will be shortlisted.

page_content:
Posisi: Digital Marketing Specialist (Entry Level)
Perusahaan: PT Hashmicro Solusi Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Digital Marketing, Paid Advertising, Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), TikTok Ads, Email Marketing, Market Research, Data Analysis, Ad Creative Development, Budget Management, Performance Tracking, Segmentation, Automation, Communication Skills, Creative Mindset, Attention to Detail
Pengalaman: Internship or 1–2 years of experience in digital marketing, particularly in running Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, or Email Marketing.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communication, or related fields.
Tugas Utama: Plan, execute, and optimize paid advertising campaigns across Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, and Email Marketing to generate high-quality leads and improve conversion rates. Conduct market and audience research, monitor ad performance, develop ad creatives, manage campaign budgets, build email marketing campaigns, stay updated with trends, provide performance reports, and support experimentation with new strategies.

metadata.original_description:
Join HashMicro, a leading software development company revolutionizing the business landscape. We specialize in providing customized and scalable software solutions tailored to specific industries, including ERP, CRM, HRM, and inventory management systems.
With a focus on simplicity and user-friendliness, our solutions empower businesses to optimize operations, make data-driven decisions, and achieve success. Join our team of dedicated professionals, and be part of a supportive and innovative environment where your skills are valued, and you can make a meaningful impact on the industry.
We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist with experience in the B2B industry to join our dynamic team. As a Digital Marketing Specialist, you will be responsible for developing and implementing effective digital marketing strategies to drive lead generation and contribute to the growth of our business.
Responsibilities:
Plan, execute, and optimize paid advertising campaigns across Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), TikTok Ads, and Email Marketing to generate high-quality leads and improve conversion rates.
Conduct market and audience research to identify campaign opportunities, target segments, and content angles that resonate with the audience.
Monitor daily ad performance, analyze campaign data, and make optimization recommendations to improve ROI and reduce cost per lead.
Develop ad creatives (copies, visuals, and CTAs) in collaboration with the creative team to ensure consistent messaging and strong audience engagement.
Manage campaign budgets, bidding strategies, and performance tracking across multiple platforms.
Build and manage email marketing campaigns, including segmentation, automation, and performance reporting.
Stay up-to-date with the latest trends, tools, and best practices in paid advertising and email marketing.
Provide regular performance reports and insights to the marketing team and management.
Support experimentation with new content formats, audiences, and targeting strategies to enhance lead generation outcomes.
Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communication, or related fields.
Internship or 1–2 years of experience in digital marketing, particularly in running Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, or Email Marketing.
Basic understanding of ad metrics (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS) and ability to interpret campaign performance data.
Strong written and verbal communication skills.
Creative mindset with attention to detail in content and campaign execution.
Able to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
Passionate about digital marketing trends and eager to learn new tools and platforms.
Familiarity with email marketing tools (e.g., Mailchimp, HubSpot, or similar) is a plus.
Certifications in Meta Ads or digital marketing are a plus.
Preferred Qualifications:
Have prior exposure to Google Ads.

Tugas Utama: Mengembangkan strategi pemasaran digital, mengelola media sosial dan website, membuat konten promosi, menjalankan iklan digital, melakukan analisis tren dan perilaku konsumen, serta menyusun laporan performa digital marketing.

metadata.original_description:
Akarsa Garment adalah perusahaan manufaktur pakaian yang bergerak di bidang produksi apparel berkualitas tinggi untuk pasar lokal dan ekspor. Dengan sistem kerja multi-line yang efisien, kami mampu menangani berbagai jenis produk seperti casual wear, uniform, knitwear, dan sportswear sesuai kebutuhan pelanggan.
Didukung oleh tenaga profesional berpengalaman dan mesin produksi modern, Akarsa Garment berkomitmen untuk menghadirkan produk dengan kualitas terbaik, ketepatan waktu, dan harga yang kompetitif. Kami menerapkan standar kerja yang tinggi mulai dari proses cutting, sewing, finishing, hingga quality control untuk memastikan setiap produk memenuhi ekspektasi pelanggan.
Kualifikasi:
- Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 di bidang Marketing, Komunikasi, Bisnis, atau sejenisnya
- Berpengalaman minimal 1–2 tahun di bidang digital marketing (lebih disukai di industri fashion/garment)
- Menguasai media sosial, SEO, SEM, Meta Business Suite, Google Analytics, dan Canva/CapCut
- Kreatif, komunikatif, serta mampu bekerja dengan target dan tim
- Memiliki kemampuan copywriting dan pemahaman tren digital terkini
Tanggung Jawab:
1. Mengembangkan strategi pemasaran digital untuk meningkatkan brand awareness dan penjualan
2. Mengelola media sosial (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube) dan website perusahaan
3. Membuat konten promosi (foto, video, reels, caption, artikel, dll) yang menarik dan sesuai identitas brand
4. Menjalankan iklan digital (Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads) serta memantau performanya
5. Melakukan analisis tren, perilaku konsumen, dan strategi kompetitor.
6. Menyusun laporan performa digital marketing secara rutin

metadata.original_description:
Posisi yang tersedia
Kami sedang mencari seorang
Social Media & Digital Marketing Specialist
yang inovatif dan berdedikasi untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Lighting Art Braga, Bandung. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memainkan peran penting dalam Merumuskan konsep dan membuat konten melalui media digital yang selaras dengan tujuan bisnis serta memahami digital media placement yang efektif dalam pelaksanaan campaign, pengembangan seluruh web dan social media yang, beberkaitan dengan perusahaan (Facebook, Instagram, Tiktok, Linkedin)
Qualifications & experience
Pendidikan Gelar sarjana dalam bidang Pemasaran, Komunikasi, atau bidang terkait.
Mempunyai pengalaman di spesialis design logo, banner, iklan media sosial, manajemen komunitas media sosial, pembuatan konten sosial, atau bidang terkait.
Mempunyai Portofolio dan pengalaman yang terbukti sebagai pembuat Design & video pendek (Reels Social Media).
Mempunyai kreativitas dalam mengidentifikasi target juga merancang kampanye digital serta berpengalaman dalam merancang hingga mengoptimalkan landing pages.
Up-to-date akan tren baru yang muncul di bidang teknologi, consumer behavior, pemasaran online, juga pengukuran kinerja.
Merancang strategi dalam mengarahkan online traffic di website perusahaan juga menjalankan trekking konversi juga membuatkan perbaikan bagi website.
Merancang berbagai konten media sosial juga email kampanye untuk mempromosikan perusahaan.
Mengelola berbagai merek atau produk perusahaan dengan cara online hingga menciptakan promosi dalam meningkatkan kesadaran terhadap merek atau brand awareness.
Merancang desain untuk perusahaan serta meningkatkan desain, usability, konten, hingga konversi semua social media dan kebutuhan lainnya uituk perusahaan.
Bersedia bekerja di hari weekend tanggal merah dan high season
Tasks & responsibilities
Merumuskan konsep dan membuat konten melalui media digital yang selaras dengan tujuan bisnis serta memahami digital media placement yang efektif dalam pelaksanaan campaign, pengembangan seluruh web dan social media yang, beberkaitan dengan perusahaan (Facebook, Instagram, Tiktok, Linkedin)
Membuat dan Mendesain job request perusahaan design Logo, Reklame, dan design lainnya yang berkaitan pengembangan serta mempertahankan secara kontinuitas aktivitas di media sosial perusahaan.
Mengukur serta melaporkan seluruh kinerja aktivitas pemasaran digital juga membandingkan dengan target (KPI juga ROI).
Mengidentifikasi tren juga insights dengan mengoptimalkan seluruh aktivitas channel pada pemasaran online berdasarkan dengan data insights.
Menjalankan brainstorming dengan berkala dalam menyusun strategi terbaru berkaitan dengan pemasaran secara online.
Menjalankan kolaborasi bersama tim dalam membuat halaman di web, Social Media dan user experience.
Berkolaborasi bersama agen external, media untuk iklan, dan mita lain.
Mengevaluasi berbagai teknologi, trend IT, aplikasi yang sedang berkembang juga memberikan pemikiran juga perspektif dalam mengadopsi teknik pemasaran online dengan tepat.
Mempunyai target juga evaluasi secara terukur, lewat channel iklan yang berbayar, misalkan, Iklan di Facebook maupun kampanye Google Adwords, hingga lewat perangkat lunak canggih CRM (manajemen hubungan pelanggan sosial), misalkan, SAP C4C, Sage CRM, microsoft Dynamics, juga Salesforce CRM.
Manfaat Bekerja di Lighting Art Braga
Gaji yang kompetitif
Lingkungan kerja yang kolaboratif dan mendukung
Peluang pengembangan profesional dan pelatihan
Tunjangan kesehatan dan program kesejahteraan yang menarik
Tentang Lighting Art Braga
Lighting Art Braga, Bandung adalah perusahaan ke 2 setelah Lighting Art Kota Tua, Jakarta yang bergerak di bidang Pariwisata.
Tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami? Lamar sekarang!

metadata.job_title: Digital Marketing Lead / Head of Digital Marketing
metadata.original_description:
Gambaran Umum
Kami adalah perusahaan yang mengimpor dan mendistribusikan produk dental dari Korea ke Indonesia
(Implant / GBR / Clear Aligner / Custom Abutment / Zirconia Crown / Digital Dentistry)
Misi kami adalah membangun
“Digital Dental Innovation”
terkuat di Indonesia.
Posisi ini bukan hanya pembuat konten.
Posisi ini adalah pemimpin yang mengatur strategi dan mengelola keseluruhan digital marketing funnel
(Brand → Lead → Sales).
Tanggung Jawab :
Menetapkan strategi digital marketing (90 hari / 6 bulan / 12 bulan roadmap)
Menjalankan dan mengoptimasi iklan Meta & Google (CPL, CAC, ROI)
Membangun dan mengelola lead funnel (Lead → Meeting → Quote → Closing)
Merancang strategi lead generation untuk webinar / seminar / hands-on course
Berkolaborasi dan mengarahkan tim konten (shoot/edit) dan tim komunitas (WhatsApp/CRM/Sales)
Mendesain dashboard & laporan KPI
Menyiapkan sistem tracking (GTM, GA4, Pixel, CAPI)
Kualifikasi Wajib :
Pengalaman Performance Marketing minimal 3 tahun
Wajib pernah mengelola Meta Ads / Google Ads secara langsung
Menguasai GA4 / GTM / Meta Pixel / CAPI
Memiliki pengalaman CRM (Hubspot / Zoho / lainnya) Nilai Plus
Pengalaman bidang Dental / Medis / Healthcare
Pengalaman B2B sales funnel
Mampu membuat storytelling dan arah konten
Bisa komunikasi dalam Bahasa Indonesia + Bahasa Inggris
Karakter yang Dicari :
Bukan hanya “menjalankan iklan” → tapi mengerti funnel dan bisa membuat keputusan berdasarkan data
Bukan hanya “strategi tanpa eksekusi” → tapi bisa strategi + eksekusi langsung
Bukan orang yang hanya “menunggu instruksi” → tapi orang yang bertanggung jawab dengan angka KPI Utama
CPL / CAC / ROAS
Conversion rate Lead → Meeting → Quote → Closing
Jumlah pendaftar seminar/webinar & attendance rate
Jumlah lead baru bulanan & kontribusi revenue Benefit
Benefit :
Full-time / gaji negosiasi
Insentif berdasarkan capaian KPI
Lingkungan kerja fast decision, growth-oriented
Akses ke jejaring profesor & perusahaan Korea
Cara Melamar Kirimkan:
Kirimkan CV
Portofolio
Data performa kampanye iklan yang pernah dikelola
WAJIB: pilih 1 kampanye yang pernah Anda pegang, dan jelaskan funnel-nya:
Iklan → Lead → Closing

metadata.original_description:
Job Description:
Kami mencari
Performance Marketing & E-Commerce Growth Specialist
yang ahli mengoptimalkan penjualan melalui iklan marketplace, CPAS, SEO, SEM, dan Google Ads.
Peran ini sangat
performance-driven
, berfokus pada
traffic growth, conversion to sales, dan revenue
di seluruh channel digital.
Tanggung Jawab:
E-Commerce Performance
Mengelola dan mengoptimalkan iklan Shopee Ads, Tokopedia Ads, Lazada Ads, TikTok Shop Ads.
Menjalankan & memaksimalkan CPAS (Collaborative Ads) — wajib.
Optimasi katalog, produk, toko, dan funnel konversi.
A/B testing untuk audience, creative, format, dan bidding.
Membuat strategi growth untuk meningkatkan conversion rate & sales.
Digital Marketing (SEO/SEM/Google)
Mengelola Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max).
Optimasi SEM: keyword, bidding, quality score & CPA.
Melakukan SEO on-page/off-page untuk meningkatkan organic traffic.
Meningkatkan conversion rate landing page (CRO basic).
Analytics & Reporting
Membuat dashboard performa mingguan/bulanan, lengkap dengan insight.
Mengukur ROAS, ACOS, CPC, CTR, CR, AOV, dan KPI lainnya.
Analisis tren & kompetitor untuk peluang ekspansi trafik & penjualan.
Requirements:
3–5 tahun pengalaman di performance marketing atau e-commerce ads.
Berpengalaman menjalankan CPAS — wajib.
Mahir marketplace ads: Shopee/Tokopedia/Lazada/TikTok Shop.
Mahir Google Ads (SEM/Search/Display/P-Max).
Memahami SEO on-page & off-page.
Mahir analisis data & Excel/Google Sheets.
Berorientasi pada target conversion to sales
dan pencapaian KPI.
Sangat sales-driven, analytical, dan mampu bekerja mandiri.

Job Kualifikasi
D3 atau Sarjana dibidang Ilmu Komunikasi, Marketing dan jurusan lain yang setara
Pengalaman dibidang Digital Marketing min 1 tahun
Memiliki kemampuan design graphic
Memiliki pengetahuan dan kemampuan terkait SEO

Job Deskripsi
Perencanaan Strategi Pemasaran Digital:
Merancang strategi pemasaran yang komprehensif, menetapkan tujuan (KPIs), mengidentifikasi target audiens, dan memilih platform digital yang tepat.
Manajemen Kampanye Digital:
Mengelola dan menjalankan kampanye di berbagai platform seperti iklan Google Ads, Facebook Ads, Instagram, dan email marketing.
Pembuatan Konten:
Membuat konsep dan mendistribusikan konten yang menarik dan relevan untuk media sosial, situs web, atau email.
Optimasi Mesin Pencari (SEO/SEM):
Menganalisis dan mengoptimalkan situs web agar memiliki peringkat tinggi di halaman hasil mesin pencari (SERP) untuk meningkatkan trafik.
Manajemen Media Sosial:
Membangun dan mengelola kehadiran perusahaan di media sosial, serta meningkatkan engagement pelanggan.
Analisis Data & Pelaporan:
Memantau dan menganalisis data performa kampanye, mengukur ROI dan KPI, serta membuat laporan secara berkala.
Pemantauan Tren Pasar:
Mengidentifikasi tren pasar terbaru dan tren yang sedang populer untuk menemukan teknik pemasaran online yang paling efektif.

Perusahaan: Anypear
Skill Dibutuhkan: Excel, Data analysis, Website content management (Magento preferred), HTML, Email automation fundamentals, Project management tools (Monday.com, Slack), Problem-solving, Communication skills, Organizational skills, Attention to detail
Pengalaman: Proven experience working with Excel and large data sets, familiarity with website CMS platforms, and basic understanding of HTML and email automation.
Pendidikan: Not specified, but relevant experience is required.
Tugas Utama: Maintain and update website content, conduct regular site checks, compile marketing and customer data for reports, maintain documentation for marketing processes, provide backup support for operational functions, prepare and update data for cross-functional teams, manage email and SMS campaigns, audit and improve campaigns, create and QA email templates.

metadata.job_title: E-commerce Digital Marketing Specialist - Remote, NZ Company
metadata.original_description:
Anypear is a headhunting and recruitment agency connecting New Zealand and Australian businesses with top overseas talent.
We’re seeking a driven Digital Marketing Technical Coordinator to support the technical marketing aspects our client’s E-Commerce business. You’ll work closely with Growth Marketing, ensuring marketing programs run smoothly, website and content updates are accurate, and support operations as needed.
E-Commerce Digital Marketing Technical Coordinator
This role requires both attention to detail and technical know-how. A good match will bring experience with Excel and large data sets, website content management systems (Magento preferred), HTML, fundamentals of email automation, and project/communication tools such as Monday.com and Slack.
Role Tasks
Maintain and update website content, offers, and promotions (Magento preferred).
Conduct regular site checks and act as first contact for website issues.
Compile marketing and customer data for reports and performance tracking.
Maintain documentation for marketing processes and operations.
Provide backup support for operational functions and special projects.
Prepare and update data and spreadsheets for cross-functional teams.
Manage email and SMS campaigns, contact lists, and data integrity (Dotdigital or similar).
Audit and improve campaigns, schedule automations, and support new deployments.
Create and QA email templates aligned with brand standards.
Requirements
Proven experience working with Excel and large data sets.
Familiarity with website CMS platforms (Magento preferred).
Basic understanding of HTML and email automation fundamentals.
Comfortable using Monday.com and Slack for communication and project management.
Organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable juggling multiple priorities.
Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive, adaptable mindset.
Clear communication skills and ability to work across marketing and sales teams.
Availability to work online NZ time zone.
Excellent English speaking and writing skills.
Perks and Benefits
Fully remote role.
Work closely with a global team passionate about their contribution to driving excellence.
Gain comprehensive business exposure across the entire customer lifecycle.
Drive measurable impacts through systems thinking, tech enablement and enhanced efficiencies.
Clear growth trajectory as suits your ambitions.

metadata.original_description:
Designing, implementing, and managing a cohesive and creative social media strategy that aligns with the brand's image and objectives.
Compiling daily/weekly/monthly content planners, including determining content pillars and content formats.
Collaborating closely with the design and sales team to create, edit, and publish engaging and high-quality digital content (including copywriting/captions, visuals, and video scripts) for all managed social media platforms.
Ensuring every piece of content is optimized for the unique characteristics of each platform to maximize reach and engagement.
Actively monitoring and responding to comments, direct messages, and mentions from followers quickly and professionally.
Routinely monitoring, measuring, and analyzing key social media performance metrics (such as engagement rate, reach, impressions, web traffic, conversions).
Compiling periodic performance reports (e.g., monthly) that present data, insights, and concrete recommendations for future strategies.

Mengikuti tren media sosial terkini dan mengadaptasi strategi sesuai perkembangan platform.
Membimbing dan mengembangkan tim social media (content creator, admin, editor, dll).
Requirements:
Minimal pendidikan
S1 Komunikasi, Marketing, Public Relations, atau bidang terkait.
Pengalaman kerja minimal
3–5 tahun
di bidang social media marketing, dengan minimal
1-2 tahun pengalaman sebagai senior atau team leader.
Memahami strategi digital marketing dan algoritma berbagai platform media sosial.
Mampu membuat konten yang menarik dan sesuai dengan karakter brand.
Memiliki kemampuan analisis data dan penggunaan tools seperti Meta Business Suite, TikTok Analytics, Google Analytics, atau sejenisnya.
Memiliki kemampuan leadership, komunikasi, dan koordinasi tim yang baik.
Kreatif, proaktif, dan mampu bekerja dengan target serta deadline ketat.
Memiliki portofolio akun media sosial yang pernah dikelola menjadi nilai tambah.

metadata.job_title: Digital Marketing (Konten, Kampanye, Iklan Media Sosial dan Website)
metadata.original_description:
Sebagai Digital Marketing Specialist di
PT DINAMIKA INDONUSA PRIMA
, Anda akan melakukan segala upaya pemasaran dengan fokus pada personal branding perusahaan meliputi produk kasur
Spring Bed AIRLAND, SIMMONS, WESLEEP,
dan lainnya.
Dengan menggunakan berbagai platform dan teknologi digital seperti situs web, media sosial, email, mesin pencari, dan periklanan online, posisi ini bertanggung jawab atas target capai audiens dan memengaruhi perilaku mereka dalam menaikkan citra perusahaan.
Tanggung Jawab Utama:
Perencanaan dan Strategi:
Merancang dan melaksanakan strategi pemasaran digital yang komprehensif, termasuk pengembangan tujuan, penentuan metrik kinerja dan rencana tindakan yang jelas. Menganalisis tren pasar dan perilaku konsumen untuk merancang kampanye yang tepat sasaran dan efektif.
Kampanye Media Sosial:
Merencanakan, melaksanakan, dan mengoptimalkan kampanye media sosial untuk membangun kesadaran merek, meningkatkan keterlibatan pengguna, dan menghasilkan lead berkualitas. Mengelola konten media sosial, menjadwal posting, dan memantau interaksi dengan pengguna.
Pengelolaan Konten Digital:
Menghasilkan dan mengelola konten digital yang berkualitas, termasuk artikel blog, infografis, video, dan lainnya. Memastikan konsistensi merek dalam semua materi konten dan menyampaikan pesan yang relevan kepada audiens target
Periklanan Online:
Membuat dan mengelola kampanye periklanan online menggunakan platform seperti Google Ads, Facebook Ads, dan LinkedIn Ads. Mengoptimalkan pengeluaran iklan untuk mencapai ROI yang maksimal.
Analisis dan Pelaporan
: Mengumpulkan, menganalisis, dan menginterpretasikan data kinerja pemasaran digital menggunakan alat analitik seperti Google Analytics. Menyusun laporan berkala tentang metrik kinerja kunci, tren pasar, dan rekomendasi untuk perbaikan dan pengembangan lebih lanjut.
Jika Anda memiliki passion di bidang digital marketing dan ingin berkembang bersama tim yang dinamis, kami menantikan lamaran dan portfolio Anda. Lamar sekarang sebelum 30 November 2025.

Analitis, detail-oriented, dan terbiasa bekerja berbasis target.
Proaktif mencari solusi dan melakukan continuous improvement serta komunikatif dan adaptif terhadap perubahan tren digital
Bersedia untuk bekerja di Head Office BALLER (Gading Serpong - Tangerang, Senin sampai Jumat)
Bersedia untuk join secepatnya
Deskripsi Pekerjaan :
Mengimplementasikan strategi digital marketing secara menyeluruh mencakup paid ads, SEO, website, dan email marketing
Mengelola anggaran digital marketing dan memastikan efektivitas biaya setiap kanal.
Menganalisis performa kampanye digital menggunakan data analytics tools, serta memberikan insight dan rekomendasi perbaikan.
Memastikan keselarasan pesan brand di seluruh kanal digital bersama tim Creative dan Brand.
Mengelola Website sebagai salah satu kanal penjualan dan branding
Berkoordinasi dengan vendor tim IT / Web Developer untuk memastikanperforma website optimal dan user-friendly.
Membantu mengembangkan strategi retargeting dan remarketing untuk meningkatkan conversion rate.
Melakukan riset tren pasar, kompetitor, dan perilaku konsumen digital untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis.

metadata.original_description:
Job Description
● The Marketing Lead Coach is responsible for assisting the Marketing and Sales Head in managing, strengthening, and growing the HORIZON school’s coaching and conversion enrollment campaigns, branding and communications strategy, and ensuring that all branding and content campaigns (both online and offline) and deliverables are successfully executed at the school level in accordance with brand guidelines and timings.
● This Marketing Lead Coach will strategize and execute local marketing campaigns, including, but not limited to, market research, event and campaign planning (both online and offline), creation of key brand, coaching, and conversion strategies, TV, Radio, and OOH collaterals, Press Releases, etc., while adhering to the national strategy and KPIs, and network and school branding.
● Recommends strategies or messaging in promoting the Horizon brand, in engaging/coaching the leads, depending on their responses and conversation
● Generates regular (daily, weekly, monthly) reports to determine the performance of agents and the status of leads
● Strategizes on coaching/nurturing and conversion marketing activities to ensure students move further down the funnel to enrollment.
● Develops marketing activities for coaching (including but not limited to webinars, campus tours, career fairs, and other promotional activities).
● Assists the Marketing & Sales head in the development and implementation of department processes and protocols
● Maintain accurate records of interactions and progress in our CRM system.
● Provide exceptional customer service and address any concerns or questions from prospects.
● Stay informed about university programs, policies, and industry trends.
● Lead the marketing coach member and make sure the member does their job well
Qualifications:
● A bachelor's degree in any major
● Persuasive and Excellent communication skills
● With experience in sales or Telemarketing work
● Strong sales and customer service abilities
● Must be tech-savvy and proficient in Google Apps, Excel
● Ability to work independently and within a team
● Detail-oriented with good organizational skills
● Proficiency in using CRM systems
● Knowledge of educational programs and enrollment processes
● Resilient & Thick-Skinned: the ability to stay motivated
● Active Listener
● Positive & Energetic: A friendly and enthusiastic personality

metadata.original_description:
DIGITAL MARKETING MANAGER — JAKARTA
Full-Time | Meta • Google • TikTok Ads
About Tenplus
Tenplus is Southeast Asia’s hydration brand — built for performance in hot, humid climates. Trusted by athletes, wellness communities, and everyday performers, we’re expanding in Jakarta and looking for a
Digital Marketing Manager
based in
Jakarta
to drive paid performance across
Meta, Google, and TikTok Ads
.
This role is hands-on and execution-focused — you’ll be responsible for deploying, monitoring, and optimizing all paid media campaigns, and providing actionable insights that help our creative team continuously improve performance and ROAS.
Your Role
You’ll be the engine behind Tenplus’s paid growth — managing campaign builds, audience targeting, and A/B testing across multiple platforms. You’ll translate platform data into clear insights to guide creative direction and strategy refinement.
Key Responsibilities
Build, deploy, and manage ad campaigns across Meta, Google, and TikTok Ads
Segment audiences, refine targeting, and continuously test creative and copy variations
Analyze data and report actionable insights to the creative and marketing team
Manage and optimize ad spend to maximize ROAS and lower CAC
Ensure tracking, pixels, and conversion events are implemented and accurate
Run weekly performance reviews and A/B tests to improve ad efficiency
Stay current with platform updates, trends, and performance best practices
Collaborate closely with the creative team for ad feedback, iteration, and improvement
You Are
2–5 years experience in digital marketing with hands-on campaign execution
Proficient in Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, and TikTok Ads platforms
Fluent in Bahasa Indonesia & English
Data-driven with strong analytical and Excel/Sheets skills
Detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing multiple campaigns simultaneously
Based in Jakarta and eager to work in a fast-growing, performance-led environment
How We Measure Success (KPIs)
Primary KPI (Performance-Based):
Performance will be judged by overall business lift relative to ad spend, not just platform dashboards.
Key Non-Revenue KPIs:
Campaign Efficiency
Average monthly ROAS ≥
2.5 baseline
CAC trend improving quarter-on-quarter
Conversion tracking accuracy
≥ 99%
Operational Excellence
All ad sets, audiences, and creatives launched on schedule
Zero downtime or missed tracking links in active campaigns
Weekly optimization reports delivered consistently
Creative Feedback Loop
Weekly insight summaries delivered to creative team
Minimum
4 A/B tests
launched per month
Clear performance tagging of every creative version
Cross-Functional Impact
Growth in overall business revenue ≥ 10% vs previous quarter
Reduced dependence on discounts for conversions
Compensation
Base Salary:
Rp 12 – 15 jt / month
Performance Bonus:
Rp 2.5 jt – 10 jt per Rp100 jt in verified revenue at ROAS > 2.5
Perks:
Tenplus product allowance + merch + career growth
Expected Total Monthly Comp:
Rp 20 jt+ within 3 months depending on performance

metadata.original_description:
About the role
We are seeking a talented Graphic Designer to join our team at PT. Panasonic Gobel Indonesia. This is a contract role based in our Jakarta Timur office, where you will play a key part in shaping the visual identity and marketing materials for our company. As a Graphic Designer, you will be responsible for creating engaging and impactful designs that effectively communicate our brand and support our business objectives.
What you'll be doing
Developing innovative designs for a variety of print and digital materials, including brochures, advertisements, presentations, social media assets and more
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to understand their design needs and translate them into visually compelling solutions
Maintaining brand consistency across all design assets and ensuring they adhere to our brand guidelines
Staying up-to-date with the latest design trends and techniques to continuously improve the quality and impact of your work
Working efficiently to meet tight deadlines and manage multiple projects simultaneously
What we're looking for
Bachelor degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication or a related field
At least 2 years of professional experience as a Graphic Designer, ideally within the consumer electronics or manufacturing industry
Expertise in using design software such as Adobe Creative Cloud (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)
Strong conceptual and creative thinking skills, with the ability to translate ideas into visually striking designs
Excellent attention to detail and a keen eye for typography, layout and colour
Effective communication and collaboration skills to work seamlessly with cross-functional teams
A portfolio showcasing a range of design projects that demonstrate your versatility and design flair

metadata.original_description:
Bertanggunggjawab
mengarahkan konsep visual, estetika, dan identitas produk khususnya untuk sepeda, sepeda listrik, dan motor listrik. Posisi ini untuk menciptakan desain produk yang tidak hanya fungsional tetapi juga memiliki nilai estetika tinggi, relevan dengan tren, dan memiliki ciri khas UNITED BIKE yang kuat.
Tujuan utama:
Menghasilkan arah visual yang mampu memperkuat karakter produk dan merek UNITED BIKE melalui pemilihan warna, material, grafis yang menarik dan inovatif -- dan kami perlu adanya sentuhan feminin.
Job Desc:
Konseptual dan pengembangan desain ke arah estetika
Pemilihan warna, material, grafis (CMF)
Penguatan identitas produk dan brand
Evaluasi dan penyempurnaan desain
Riset tren (lokal maupun global)
Dokumentasi untuk konsistensi produksi dan presentasi konsep visual.
Kualifikasi:
Pendidikan minimal S1 Desain Produk, Desain Industri, Desain Visual, atau bidang terkait.
Memiliki pengalaman minimal 5 tahun sebagai Designer Asst. Manager, khususnya yang berhubungan dengan CMF, estetika, atau identitas visual (pengalaman di industri sepeda/otomotif menjadi nilai tambah).
Memiliki ketertarikan dalam bidang otomotif
Memahami prinsip
Color–Material–Finish (CMF)
dan mampu menerjemahkan riset tren menjadi konsep visual yang kuat dan aplikatif.
Kepekaan estetika yang tinggi, dengan kemampuan menciptakan
visual direction
yang modern, elegan, dan memiliki sentuhan feminin tanpa menghilangkan karakter brand.
Menguasai software desain seperti Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop), serta diutamakan memahami 3D (KeyShot, Blender, Rhino, SolidWorks, atau sejenisnya).
Memiliki wawasan tren global maupun lokal terkait gaya hidup, otomotif, mobilitas, fashion, dan material terkini.
Kuat dalam
visual storytelling
dan penyusunan presentasi konsep yang meyakinkan.
Detail-oriented, terstruktur, dan mampu membuat dokumentasi visual untuk kebutuhan produksi.
Mampu bekerja sama dengan tim R&D, engineer, dan marketing untuk memastikan estetika sejalan dengan fungsi dan strategi brand.
Komunikatif, proaktif, dan mampu menerima serta mengolah feedback untuk penyempurnaan desain.

metadata.original_description:
About us
Berdiri sejak tahun 1994, PT Adimas Isolasitama merupakan Perusahaan yang spesialis dalam bidang insulasi untuk bangunan, pendingin udara (air conditioning), dan kebutuhan industri. Sebagai penyedia solusi produk insulasi, kami berkomitmen untuk memberikan produk yang berkualitas, harga yang kompetitif, dan pelayanan purna jual bagi pelanggan. PT Adimas Isolasitama memegang kepercayaan sebagai distributor resmi, baik yang sifatnya tunggal maupun agen terpilih dari berbagai produk insulasi terbaik. PT Adimas Isolasitama juga menerapkan seleksi ketat pada produk, serta memastikan manufaktur dan pengadaan merek yang lulus uji. Produk PT Adimas Isolasitama dibuat menggunakan teknologi mutakhir dan berstandar kualitas terbukti - termasuk untuk persyaratan spesifikasi internasional demi investasi jangka panjang Anda.
Qualifications & experience
• Pendidikan minimal S1 Desain Komunikasi Visual (DKV) / Multimedia.
• Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 2 tahun pada posisi Desain Grafis.
• Menguasai desain grafis berbasis vektor (diutamakan).
• Mahir menggunakan Adobe Illustrator dan CorelDraw.
• Kemampuan membuat motion graphic menjadi nilai tambah.
• Wajib melampirkan portofolio (link atau file).
• Kreatif, inovatif, komunikatif, serta mampu bekerja secara mandiri dan dalam tim.
Tasks & responsibilities
1. Membuat dan mengembangkan desain untuk kebutuhan internal perusahaan (form, template, branding, dsb.).
2. Mendesain materi cetak dan kebutuhan pameran/event.
3. Membuat dan menyesuaikan materi desain untuk kebutuhan marketplace (banner toko, feed produk, campaign, dll.).
4. Membuat desain untuk mendukung kegiatan sales/marketing seperti katalog, brosur, flyer, dan media promosi lainnya.
5. Berkolaborasi dengan tim terkait guna memastikan kualitas dan konsistensi brand perusahaan.

Mengurus desain packaging hingga ke tahap produksi di pabrik, termasuk koordinasi dengan vendor/percetakan
Kualifikasi
Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 di bidang Desain Grafis, Desain Komunikasi Visual, atau jurusan terkait
Memiliki pengalaman kerja sebagai Graphic Designer minimal 1 tahun
Menguasai software desain seperti Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, dan tools pendukung lainnya

Mampu membuat desain untuk berbagai kebutuhan (digital & cetak)

Mampu bekerja dengan brief dan tenggat waktu

metadata.original_description:
LIT Group (Life Inspires Today)
is dedicated to empowering and inspiring communities through the beauty industry. We are home to several B2B and B2C brands — including
EVER
and
Ruhee
for Premium Beauty Services and
Lavere Lash
, which focuses on academy and professional lash products.
As LIT Group continues to grow, we are developing new concepts, launching fresh initiatives, and pushing boundaries within the beauty space. We’re now seeking enthusiastic, creative, and forward-thinking individuals to join our journey and grow with us as a team.
We are currently looking for a
Creative Content Creator
who will create content across offline and online communication platforms for our beauty brands. You will be part of the Marketing team, supporting both online and offline branding across multiple touchpoints.
Key Responsibilities
1. Content Design
Translate creative briefs, concepts, and visual strategies into engaging social media content.
Design visuals for Instagram, TikTok, and other communication platforms.
Create templates for reels, carousels, feed posts, stories, and campaign materials with consistent branding.
Support digital advertising needs (Meta Ads, CPAS, TikTok Ads).
2. E-Commerce & Product
Design banners, catalogues, product thumbnails, promo posters, and other assets for Shopee, Tokopedia, and brand websites.
Assist with product uploads, bundling visuals, and promo campaign assets.
3. Brand Consistency
Ensure all content aligns with brand visual identity and guidelines across every touchpoint.
4. Collaboration
Work closely with the Creative, Marketing, and Product teams to ensure outputs align with campaign goals and timelines.
Maintain organized files, templates, and brand assets to support efficient production workflows.
Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Art, or a related creative field.
1–2 years of graphic design experience, ideally in beauty, lifestyle, or consumer goods (fresh graduates are welcome).
Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).
Motion/video editing skills (After Effects, Premiere Pro) are
a must
.
Strong aesthetic sense and ability to translate briefs into beautiful, functional designs.
Passion for beauty, lifestyle, storytelling, and visual innovation.
Basic photography and videography skills are a plus.
Able to collaborate, take feedback, and iterate designs effectively.
Positive attitude, team player, and able to start immediately.

At Sugarbaby, we are dedicated to creating safe, fun and stylish products for babies and their families. We are on the lookout for a talented

Work from Home
Key Responsibilities:
Develop attractive and relatable characters that reflect the essence of our baby products, ensuring they are appealing to both babies and parents.
Collaborate with the product development team to brainstorm and refine character concepts that align with product functionality and brand identity.
Produce high-quality illustrations in various styles and ensure brand consistency across all design materials.
Work closely with the marketing team to seamlessly integrate characters into product packaging, marketing materials, and digital assets.
Stay updated on design trends in the baby product market, to inspire fresh and new ideas.

Proficiency in design software Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, etc).
Deep understanding of color theory, composition, and typography, especially in creating engaging visuals for children and parents.
Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment.
Excellent time management and organizational skills.

metadata.original_description:
Kesempatan Menarik sebagai Graphic Designer
Bergabunglah dengan tim kreatif kami di PT Global Bestindo Jaya yang sedang berkembang di Tangerang, Banten. Sebagai Graphic Designer, Anda akan memiliki peran penting dalam mengembangkan konten visual yang menarik dan memikat untuk mendukung berbagai inisiatif perusahaan kami.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
Merancang dan membuat berbagai materi visual seperti logo, grafik, ilustrasi, presentasi, dan konten media sosial yang selaras dengan identitas merek perusahaan.
Merencanakan & merancang produk, kemasan, katalog, spanduk, kalender, souvenir, merchandise/barang sesuai permintaan
Berkolaborasi erat dengan tim Pemasaran dan Komunikasi untuk memahami kebutuhan proyek dan memberikan solusi desain yang efektif.
Mengoptimalkan konten visual untuk digunakan di berbagai platform digital dan cetak.
Terlibat dalam diskusi kreatif, memberikan masukan, dan memastikan solusi desain memenuhi tujuan bisnis.
Mengelola beberapa proyek secara bersamaan dengan memperhatikan detail dan memenuhi tenggat waktu yang ketat.
Senantiasa mengikuti tren desain terbaru dan berinovasi untuk meningkatkan kualitas visual perusahaan.
Kualifikasi yang Dibutuhkan
Gelar Diploma atau Sarjana dalam Desain Grafis, Komunikasi Visual, atau bidang terkait.
Minimum 1 tahun pengalaman sebagai Graphic Designer di perusahaan/agensi dengan portofolio yang kuat.
Mahir menggunakan perangkat lunak desain seperti Adobe Creative Cloud (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).
Memiliki pemahaman yang baik tentang prinsip-prinsip desain, tren visual, dan pengalaman pengguna.
Berpikir kreatif, inisiatif, dan mampu bekerja di lingkungan yang dinamis.
Kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, bekerja secara kolaboratif, dan mampu memenuhi tenggat waktu.
Keuntungan Bekerja Bersama Kami
Gaji kompetitif dan bonus kinerja yang menarik.
Program pengembangan diri dan pelatihan untuk mendukung pertumbuhan profesional Anda.
Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis, kolaboratif, dan mendukung kreativitas.
Tentang PT Global Bestindo Jaya
PT Global Bestindo Jaya adalah perusahaan bidang aksesories aluminium yang sedang berkembang pesat, menyediakan solusi digital inovatif untuk berbagai sektor industri di Indonesia. Didirikan pada tahun 2019 dengan menyediakan produk dan layanan berkualitas tinggi. Kami mengutamakan keberagaman, inklusi, dan memberikan kesempatan yang setara bagi semua orang untuk berkembang bersama kami.
Tertarik bergabung dengan tim kreatif kami?
Lamar sekarang
untuk kesempatan menjadi Graphic Designer di PT Global Bestindo Jaya!

Posisi: Creative Designer & Graphic Designer
Perusahaan: PT Bedrock Brand Consultants
Skill Dibutuhkan: Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, XD), Sketch, Figma, InVision, HTML/CSS, Prototyping tools (Axure, Balsamiq, Marvel), Strong communication skills, Creative problem-solving, Critical thinking, Team collaboration, Attention to detail, Adaptability to design trends, Understanding of accessibility principles, Basic motion graphics knowledge, Data-driven design mindset
Pengalaman: Minimum 5 years of experience as a Creative Designer or Graphic Designer.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Visual Communication Design, Graphic Design, or related fields.
Tugas Utama: Create visual identities, design marketing materials, collaborate with teams for design consistency, conduct user research, create wireframes and prototypes, design user interfaces, develop interactive elements, perform usability testing, and work closely with cross-functional teams.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
We are seeking a talented and experienced Creative Designer and Graphic Designer to join our dynamic team at PT Bedrock Brand Consultants' in Kembangan, Jakarta Raya. As a full-time employee, you will play a crucial role in creating visually striking and engaging designs that support our clients' branding and marketing efforts.
What you'll be doing
Graphic Design
Brand Development : Create visual identities, logos, and branding materials that align with the company’s vision.
Visual Content Creation : Design marketing materials, including brochures, advertisements, and social media graphics.
Collaboration : Work with marketing, product, and other teams to ensure design consistency across all platforms.
Trend Analysis : Stay updated with design trends and incorporate them into projects.
Design Systems : Develop and maintain design systems for consistency across all visual outputs.
UI/UX Design:
User Research : Conduct user interviews, surveys, and usability tests to gather insights.
Wireframing and Prototyping : Create wireframes and prototypes to visualize and test user journeys.
User Interface Design : Design intuitive and aesthetically pleasing interfaces for websites and apps.
Interaction Design : Develop interactive elements to enhance user experience.
Usability Testing : Perform tests and iterate designs based on user feedback and analytics.
Cross-Functional Collaboration : Work closely with developers, product managers, and other stakeholders to align design with functionality.
Technical Skills
Proficiency in design software like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, XD), Sketch, Figma, and InVision.
Knowledge of HTML/CSS for UI/UX design.
Familiarity with prototyping tools such as Axure, Balsamiq, or Marvel.
Soft Skills
Strong communication and presentation skills.
Creative problem-solving and critical thinking.
Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.
Attention to detail and a strong sense of aesthetics.
Adaptability to changing design trends and technologies.
Additional Skills :
Understanding of accessibility and inclusive design principles.
Basic knowledge of motion graphics and animation.
Data-driven design mindset with an ability to interpret analytics.
What we're looking for
1.      Bachelor’s degree in Visual Communication Design, Graphic Design, or related fields.
2.      Minimum 5 year of experience as a Creative Designer or Graphic Designer.
3.      Proficient in design software such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Capcut or Canva.
4.      Excellent communication skills in English and ability to work independently or in a team.
5. Good attitude
We encourage applications from candidates with diverse backgrounds and experiences. If you require any adjustments or accommodations during the recruitment process, please don't hesitate to let us know.
Apply now to join our talented team and contribute to the creation of innovative design solutions that drive our clients' success.

Posisi: Senior Graphic Designer
Perusahaan: PT Indovision Prima Film (AVB)
Skill Dibutuhkan: Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign), branding, print design, digital design, conceptual and visual problem-solving, typography, colour theory, design principles, communication skills, presentation skills
Pengalaman: A minimum of 2 years of professional experience as a Graphic Designer, preferably within the media or advertising industry

metadata.original_description:
About the role
We are seeking a talented and experienced Senior Graphic Designer to join our dynamic team at PT Indovision Prima Film (AVB). As a full-time Senior Graphic Designer, you will play a crucial role in crafting visually stunning designs that captivate our clients and elevate our brand. This position is based in the vibrant city of Seminyak, Bali, offering you the opportunity to work in a collaborative, creative environment.
What you'll be doing
Conceptualise and design a wide range of engaging visual content, including branding materials, marketing collateral, digital assets, and more
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand project requirements and translate them into impactful design solutions
Stay up-to-date with the latest design trends and techniques, and continuously improve your skills to deliver innovative designs
Ensure all design work adheres to brand guidelines and maintains a cohesive visual identity
Provide creative input and guidance to junior designers, fostering a positive and collaborative team environment
Participate in client presentations and effectively communicate design rationale
What we're looking for
A minimum of 2 years of professional experience as a Graphic Designer, preferably within the media or advertising industry
A strong portfolio showcasing your expertise in branding, print design, and digital design
Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and other design software
Excellent conceptual and visual problem-solving skills, with the ability to turn complex requirements into visually appealing designs
Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, and design principles
Adaptability to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment and meet tight deadlines
Excellent communication and presentation skills to effectively articulate design decisions
What we offer
At PT Indovision Prima Film (AVB), we are committed to fostering a dynamic and supportive work environment. We offer a competitive salary, opportunities for professional development, and a range of benefits to support your well-being. Our office in Seminyak, Bali, provides a vibrant and inspiring setting to unleash your creativity.
About us
PT Indovision Prima Film (AVB) is a leading media production company dedicated to creating exceptional visual content. With a talented team of creative professionals, we have a proven track record of delivering innovative and impactful projects for our clients. Our mission is to push the boundaries of visual storytelling and inspire our audience through captivating design.
If you're ready to embark on an exciting new chapter in your design career, we encourage you to apply now.

Design e-commerce promotional assets including banners, product highlights, landing pages, and campaign visuals.
Produce graphics for social media ads, organic posts, and performance marketing content.
Create motion graphics or simple animations for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and ads (optional but a plus)
Brand & Visual Identity
Ensure consistency of brand guidelines across all visuals and touchpoints.
Develop and refine visual directions for campaigns, product launches, and seasonal events.
Collaborate with the marketing team to evolve and maintain Ketch’s brand identity.
Collaboration & Workflow
Work closely with copywriters, marketers, and product teams to align visuals with campaign objectives.
Manage multiple deadlines, prioritize tasks, and deliver high-quality work in a fast-paced environment.
Prepare production-ready files for internal use or external vendors.
Qualifications:
Must-Have
1–3 years of experience as a Graphic Designer, preferably in e-commerce, digital marketing, or branding.
Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator), Figma, or equivalent tools.
Strong portfolio showcasing e-commerce design work.
Knowledge of e-commerce campaign design best practices (e.g., mega sale events, flash sales, payday promos).
Understanding of visual hierarchy, layout, typography, and color theory.
Ability to turn concepts into visually appealing, high-converting designs.
Detail-oriented, creative, and proactive with excellent communication skills.
Nice to have:
Basic motion design skills (After Effects, Premiere Pro, CapCut).
Experience with product photo editing, retouching, and mockup creation.
Familiarity with UI/UX design for simple landing pages

metadata.original_description:
Job Description
Mendesain materi visual untuk kebutuhan promosi outlet, campaign marketing, dan digital content (menu board, poster, flyer, signage, social media)
⁠Membuat desain menu (food & beverage), packaging, label, dan materi branding yang sesuai standar visual brand.
⁠Melakukan photo editing & food retouching untuk memastikan foto makanan dan minuman terlihat appetizing dan konsisten.
Berkolaborasi dengan tim Marketing, Product, dan Store untuk menerjemahkan brief menjadi desain yang kreatif dan mudah dipahami.
⁠Mengembangkan dan menjaga konsistensi brand guideline (warna, font, elemen visual) di seluruh channel.
⁠Membuat konten visual untuk campaign digital seperti promo musiman, limited edition product, new outlet opening, atau loyalty program.
⁠Mengatur file desain agar rapi, terstruktur, dan siap untuk keperluan percetakan atau produksi.
Berkoordinasi dengan vendor cetak, supplier packaging, dan tim produksi untuk memastikan hasil sesuai desain.
⁠Melakukan riset tren desain F&B, packaging, dan visual lifestyle untuk menciptakan konsep yang fresh dan relevan.
Requirements
Minimal 1–2 tahun pengalaman sebagai Graphic Designer (lebih diutamakan pengalaman di industri F&B).
Menguasai Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, dan tools editing lainnya (InDesign atau Figma menjadi nilai tambah).
Memahami desain untuk menu, packaging, poster promosi, dan materi campaign F&B.
Mampu melakukan retouching foto makanan & minuman.
Paham prinsip visual design, layout, typography, dan color theory.
⁠Familiar dengan kebutuhan desain untuk digital marketing (IG feed, reels cover, ads banner).
⁠Memiliki kemampuan basic prepress dan memahami proses printing (material, ukuran, finishing).
⁠Memiliki portofolio terkait F&B design (menu, campaign promo, food photo editing).

metadata.original_description:
Position: Graphic/Visual Designer Supervisor
Location:
Jakarta
Job Type:
Full-Time
About the Role
We are looking for a dynamic and visionary Graphic/Visual Designer Supervisor to lead our creative endeavors. This role is pivotal in shaping and elevating our brand's visual identity across all touchpoints. You will not only be a hands-on design expert but also a strategic leader who can translate brand objectives into powerful, resonant visual experiences.
If you are a creative leader passionate about blending Indonesian aesthetic trends with a global brand vision, we want you on our team.
Key Responsibilities
Develop, maintain, and evolve our complete brand visual identity system, ensuring consistency and excellence across all platforms.
Translate brand strategy and marketing goals into compelling visual concepts and final designs.
Independently lead and execute high-complexity creative projects from concept to completion.
Create a wide range of visual assets, with a strong focus on:
Exhibition and large-scale event main visuals and materials.
Digital media content, including social media graphics, web assets, and video content.
Stay at the forefront of design trends, tools, and technologies, bringing a cutting-edge vision to our creative output.
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree or above in Visual Communication Design, Art Design, Digital Media, or a related field.
A minimum of 3 years of professional design experience and at least 1 year in a senior designer or design supervisory role.
A proven portfolio demonstrating experience in creating or reshaping projects with a complete brand visual identity system.
Rich experience in designing for exhibitions, large-scale events, and their supporting materials.
Demonstrable expertise in digital media and video content design.
Expert proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, After Effects, Premiere Pro) and other relevant design/video editing software.
Deep understanding of brand strategy with a proven ability to turn it into powerful visual expression.
Familiar with Indonesian local culture and current aesthetic trends, with the ability to balance this with maintaining a consistent global brand tone.
Possess a cutting-edge design vision, strong innovative consciousness, and the ability to lead high-complexity projects independently.
Language:
Fluent in English both verbal and written; Proficiency in Mandarin is a strong plus.

•⁠ ⁠Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 Desain Komunikasi Visual, Desain Grafis, Multimedia, atau bidang terkait.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
The Lagoons Bali is seeking an outstanding Graphic Designer to join our dynamic team in Bali. As a Graphic Designer, you will be responsible for creating visually stunning and impactful designs that support our branding, marketing, and digital initiatives. This is a full-time position based in our beautiful resort location in Bali.
What you'll be doing
Develop and design a wide range of visual materials, including brochures, advertisements, social media graphics, and web assets
Collaborate closely with the marketing and creative teams to conceptualise and execute designs that align with our brand identity and campaigns
Stay up-to-date with the latest design trends and techniques to continuously enhance the quality and impact of our visual assets
Manage multiple design projects simultaneously, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to brand guidelines
Contribute to the development and maintenance of our design library, including templates, style guides, and design elements
What we're looking for
A bachelor's degree or equivalent in Graphic Design, Visual Communications, or a related field
Minimum 3-5 years of experience as a Graphic Designer, preferably in the hospitality or tourism industry
Proficiency in Adobe Creative Cloud, with strong skills in Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign
Excellent eye for design, typography, and colour, with the ability to create visually appealing and on-brand designs
Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills, with the ability to work collaboratively and independently
Familiarity with web design principles and experience in designing for digital platforms
Excellent time management and organisational skills to handle multiple projects simultaneously
What we offer
At The Lagoons Bali, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work environment. As a Graphic Designer, you'll enjoy a competitive salary, generous holiday entitlement, opportunities for professional development, and access to our world-class resort facilities. We also offer comprehensive health and wellness benefits to support your well-being. Join our team and be part of an organisation that values creativity, innovation, and a work-life balance.
About us
The Lagoons Bali is a luxury resort located in the heart of Bali, Indonesia. Our resort offers a unique blend of modern amenities and traditional Balinese hospitality, catering to discerning travellers from around the world. We are a dynamic and growing organisation committed to delivering exceptional experiences for our guests and creating a positive impact on the local community. If you're passionate about design, hospitality, and the Balinese way of life, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.
Apply now to become our next Graphic Designer and be part of The Lagoons Bali team.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
Are you a talented Graphic Designer looking to join a dynamic and innovative multi national company? PT YonMing Indonesia which under YonMing Group, a leading provider of heavy commercial vehicle services, is seeking a creative and skilled Graphic Designer to join our team. In this full-time role, you will be responsible for creating visually stunning designs that captivate our product and elevate our brand. Our Indoneisa office are based in the vibrant North Jakarta, Jakarta, this is an excellent opportunity to showcase your design expertise and contribute to the growth of our organisation.
What you'll be doing
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to conceptualise and develop cohesive, brand-aligned visual assets such as logos, marketing materials, and digital content
Translate marketing team requirements and creative briefs into visually appealing and effective design solutions
Maintain and continuously improve the company's design standards and brand guidelines
Provide design support and mentorship to junior designers, helping them to develop their skills and contribute to project success
Effectively manage multiple design projects simultaneously, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to marketing needs.
What we're looking for
A degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communications, or a related field
3+ years of experience
as a Graphic Designer, preferably in a fast-paced, agency or in-house environment
Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and other design software
Strong conceptual and visual problem-solving skills, with the ability to translate complex ideas into compelling designs
Excellent attention to detail and a keen eye for typography, layout, and color theory
Effective communication and collaboration skills to work closely with cross-functional teams
A portfolio showcasing your best work and demonstrating your versatility across various design disciplines
Social media knowledge will be a plus for the resume.
What we offer
At PT YonMing Indonesia, we are committed to providing our employees with a fulfilling and rewarding work experience. Along with a competitive salary, we offer a comprehensive benefits package, including Uniform, BPJS Kesehatan, BPJS Ketenagakerjaan, Annual Bonus and THR. Our office in North Jakarta, Jakarta provides a modern and collaborative work environment, and we encourage a healthy work-life balance through flexible scheduling and remote work options. If you're ready to join a company that values creativity, innovation, and personal growth, we encourage you to apply now.

GRAPHIC DESIGNER
Job Description
Design and produce high-quality graphics for digital and print media, including social media posts, website banners, advertisements, brochures, and promotional materials.
Collaborate with marketing and content teams to ensure brand consistency across all designs.
Develop unique, creative concepts for campaigns and product launches.
Maintain and update brand assets, templates, and design guidelines.
Optimize graphics and layouts for different platforms and formats.
Capture high-quality images for a variety of purposes, including product shots, events, and promotional campaigns.
Plan, organize, and execute photoshoots, ensuring alignment with the brand's style and marketing objectives.
Edit, retouch, and optimize images for both digital and print use.

Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Visual Arts, Photography, or a related field.
Proven experience (2+ years) in graphic design and photography, with a strong portfolio showcasing both skills.
Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and Lightroom) dan Capcut
Strong understanding of color theory, typography, and layout principles.
Hands-on experience with photography equipment, lighting, and composition.
Ability to multitask and manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.
Excellent attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
Please attach recent portfolios for reviewing prior to interview process

Perusahaan: PT Leon Boga Sentosa

Pengalaman: Pengalaman minimal 5 tahun di Product Development/R&D di FMCG (Food) dan pengalaman memimpin tim PD/R&D minimal 2 tahun.

Tugas Utama: Memimpin proses pengembangan produk dari konsep hingga komersialisasi, memastikan kepatuhan terhadap standar keamanan pangan dan regulasi, serta mengelola biaya dan efisiensi produk.

metadata.original_description:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan
Product Development Manager bertanggung jawab memimpin proses pengembangan produk mulai dari konsep, formulasi, trial produksi hingga komersialisasi. Peran ini juga memastikan seluruh pengembangan memenuhi standar keamanan pangan, regulasi, serta target biaya perusahaan.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
1. Pengembangan Produk
Mengembangkan produk baru dari ide hingga launching.
Melakukan riset tren pasar, consumer insight, dan benchmarking produk.
Membuat formulasi produk sesuai target rasa, kualitas, shelf life, dan costing.
Melakukan reformulasi untuk peningkatan kualitas dan efisiensi biaya.
Mengelola seluruh dokumen teknis (spec RM/PM, COA, label nutrisi, SOP, HACCP).
2. Trial Produksi & Scale Up
Mengkoordinasikan trial di pabrik bersama Produksi, QC, QA, dan PPIC.
Memastikan formula dapat di-scale up tanpa mengubah kualitas produk.

Proven ability to translate complex technical offerings into clear, compelling, and market-ready brand narratives.

metadata.job_title: Product Brand & Marketing Manager (Lavere & Ruhee Diary)
metadata.original_description:
The Product Brand & Marketing Manager is responsible for developing and maintaining the long-term brand strategy, ensuring strong brand perception, and driving product direction aligned with the company’s vision. This role combines strategic brand leadership with hands-on product and marketing execution. It requires initiative, creativity, strong cross-functional coordination, and a deep understanding of consumer behavior.
Key Responsibilities
Brand Leadership & Strategy
Act as the
Brand Lead
, ensuring consistency in messaging, visuals, and positioning across all touchpoints.
Build, define, and maintain the
brand identity
including tone of voice, visual direction, brand values, and personality.
Develop the
long-term brand positioning
, brand narrative, and strategic roadmap.
Ensure brand consistency across marketing, product, retail, digital, and customer experience.
Manage and strengthen
brand equity
, understanding consumer perception and emotional connection with the brand.
Cross-Functional Collaboration
Lead and collaborate with
cross-functional teams
(Training, Service Marketing Manager, Sales, Creative, R&D) to align brand and sales strategy.
Work closely with the
BOD
to translate business direction into strong and actionable brand strategies.
Coordinate with marketing, sales, finance, accounting, warehouse, and logistics to support CRM programs, promotions, and product initiatives.
Provide insights and strategic input during product development to ensure alignment with the brand’s long-term direction.
Brand & Product Marketing
Analyze
brand positioning
, market trends, competitor activities, customer insights, and sales performance.
Develop
product marketing strategies
aligned with brand identity, product lifecycle stages, and impactful marketing activities.
Lead creative development to engage and attract the target market.
Oversee packaging development and ensure all communications reflect brand positioning.
Lead the planning and execution of
integrated marketing campaigns
across multiple channels to increase brand awareness, generate leads, and drive customer acquisition.
Identify and implement
growth opportunities
in digital marketing, social media, and e-commerce to scale the brand’s online presence.
Expand
sales distribution channels
and collaborate with the marketing and sales team to initiate promotional and CRM programs.
Performance & Budget Management
Measure and report performance of all marketing campaigns, assessing
ROI
, KPIs, and effectiveness.
Monitor brand health, campaign results, sales contribution, and consumer feedback to improve brand strategy.
Manage brand-related budgets efficiently, ensuring resources are optimized for maximum impact.
Qualifications
Minimum Bachelor’s degree with 2 years of experience in brand management, sales, or marketing — ideally in the beauty or fashion industry.
Strong analytical mindset, with proficiency in data literacy, market research, and digital marketing strategies.
Proven experience in leading and managing teams, with strong stakeholder coordination skills.
Good team player with agility to adapt in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.
Strong initiative and proactive thinking — enjoys thinking deeply about products and improving them.
Resourceful, creative problem solver with the ability to generate ideas independently.
Understanding of branding fundamentals, consumer behavior, and product development.
Strong communication and cross-functional collaboration skills.
Ability to manage budgeting and prioritize resources effectively
