metadata.original_description:
Job Title:
Product Manager/Product Operations Manager - US Market
Location:
Remote (Indonesia)
About DemandLane:
DemandLane specializes in claimant acquisition services for law firms across the United States. Leveraging a vertically integrated platform, we facilitate the acquisition of qualified claimants at scale. Our mission is to connect law firms with individuals actively seeking legal representation after experiencing significant injuries or injustices. By employing cross-channel media campaigns and a rigorous client-qualifying process, DemandLane ensures the delivery of verified claimants and signed retainers.
Why Work with Us:
Technology-First Approach:
Our advanced technology stack combines automation workflows with best-in-class analytics, enabling rapid scaling from a few to thousands of retainers.
Vertically Integrated Platform:
We merge lead generation, client screening, and intake processes to deliver qualified claimants efficiently.
Consistent Delivery:
Utilizing diversified media sources, we reach hard-to-find claimants and maintain a steady intake volume.
Retainer-Based Pricing:
Clients pay only for intakes that meet their specific criteria, as we handle all preliminary processes.
Commitment to Quality:
Our comprehensive and accurate intake procedures ensure claimants are motivated to pursue their claims.
By integrating technology, strategic media approaches, and a commitment to quality, DemandLane stands as a leader in the claimant acquisition industry, dedicated to connecting law firms with qualified claimants nationwide.
About the Role:
We are looking for a
Product Manager / Product Operations Manager - US Market
to drive operational excellence, streamline processes, and optimize engagement strategies across voice, text, and AI-based automation workflows. This role is critical in managing complex dialling strategies, campaign execution, compliance adherence, and process optimization to ensure a high-impact and efficient product operations function.
Key Responsibilities:
1. Project & Process Management
Oversee and manage the entire
call funnel and texting operations
.
Coordinate
new project setup
and execution.
Develop and maintain
roadmaps
for product operations, aligning with R&D and operational objectives.
Define and implement
best practices
in workflow automation and process optimization.
2. Engagement & Optimization Strategy
Design and implement
automation workflows
to optimize engagement and conversion rates.
Lead
A/B testing and experimentation
to improve dialling and texting strategies.
Enhance
lead segmentation, ranking, and scoring models
.
Implement
AI-driven engagement workflows
using NLP, LLMs, and intelligent automation.
3. Dialling & Texting Strategy
Develop and optimize
dialling strategies
to improve conversion rates.
Configure and manage
dialler settings
, including AMD, call routing, and IVR updates.
Oversee
texting operations
, ensuring compliance with 10DLC, toll-free regulations, and carrier guidelines.
4. Compliance & Regulatory Adherence
Ensure adherence to
FTC, TCPA, and other applicable regulations
.
Monitor and remediate
caller ID flagging
and compliance risks.
Maintain logs, reporting, and proactive alerts for
compliance and risk mitigation
.
5. Data & Performance Analysis
Conduct
root cause analysis (RCA)
and triage failures in dialling, texting, and automation workflows.
Implement
real-time monitoring of dialler and call performance KPIs
.
Develop
reporting dashboards
and actionable insights to improve campaign efficiency.
6. AI & Automation Integration
Manage and improve
Text AI and Voice AI
automation workflows.
Work closely with engineering teams to
prioritize feature requests
and enhancements.
Experiment with
new AI-powered engagement tools
to optimize lead qualification.
7. Team & Vendor Management
Lead cross-functional coordination with
marketing, operations, engineering, and compliance teams
.
Manage relationships with
external vendors
for dialling, messaging, and branded calling solutions.
Train and mentor junior team members, ensuring operational excellence.
Key Skills & Qualifications:
Project Management Expertise
– Experience in managing complex workflows and optimizing operational processes.
Automation & AI Knowledge
– Understanding of
NLP, LLMs, and workflow automation tools
(e.g., Zapier, Power Automate).
Dialling & Contact Center Operations
– Strong knowledge of
Vicidial, Asterisk, SIP, DID management, and dialling optimization
.
Data Analytics & Experimentation
– Expertise in
cohort analysis, A/B testing, lead segmentation, and funnel analysis
.
Compliance & Risk Management
– Familiarity with
10DLC, TCPA, FTC regulations
, and compliance monitoring.
Campaign & Engagement Strategy
– Ability to design and execute
texting and calling strategies
to enhance conversions.
Cross-functional Collaboration
– Strong communication and coordination skills to work with
engineering, marketing, and ops teams
.
Preferred Experience:
5+ years of experience in
Product Operations, Business Operations, Growth, or Contact Center Strategy
.
Prior experience in
fintech, SaaS, e-commerce, or telecommunications
is preferred.
Proven track record in
process automation, workflow optimization, and operational analytics
.
Strong knowledge of
CRM platforms, dialler systems, and customer engagement tools
.
Should be fine working from 4pm to 3am IST
Why Join Us?
Opportunity to lead and
shape a high-impact product operations team
.
Work in a fast-paced, innovative environment with
cutting-edge AI and automation tools
.
Collaborate with global teams across
US, India, Nigeria, Romania and Indonesia
.
Competitive salary, remote flexibility, and growth opportunities.

metadata.original_description:
Are you ready to transform how dental professionals connect, learn, and grow through powerful digital storytelling?
At
Flash Dental and Dental Jaya Group
, we believe dentistry deserves more than just products — it deserves a story. For over two decades, our group has been empowering dentists and clinics across Indonesia through innovation, education, and impact.
Now, we’re looking for a
Social Media Manager
who can bring that story to life — crafting creative content that drives awareness, engagement, and growth. (check our instagram here : @dentaljayaindo, @flashdental.id)
What You’ll Do
Develop and manage social media strategies that strengthen brand identity, awareness, and create leads generation.
Lead the content creator and social media specialist to create engaging and educational content (photos, videos, reels, stories) that connects with dental professionals.
Plan the product launching strategy and lead the team to deliver it through social media
Collaborate with the brand manager, product, sales, and event teams to amplify new launches and nationwide education programs.
Analyze performance metrics, optimize content, and report actionable insights.
Plan and monitoring customer touch points and customer journey in social media
Stay ahead of social media trends and apply them creatively to keep Flash Dental’s digital presence dynamic and relevant.
Your Team
Content Creator (2 persons)
Social media specialist (2 persons)
Graphic Designer (2 persons)
Who You Are
2–4 years of experience in social media management or digital marketing (retail/fmcg industry is a plus)
A creative storyteller with a strong sense of branding, aesthetics, and engagement.
Skilled in analytics tools and social platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Meta Suite, etc.).
Curious, data-driven, and comfortable turning insights into strategies that deliver measurable impact.
Why You’ll Love Working Here
You’ll shape how thousands of dental professionals see, learn from, and connect with our brand.
Dynamic, fast-growing company where creativity meets impact.
Open culture with room to grow into senior digital or brand leadership roles.
Competitive salary and KPI-based bonuses.
Opportunities to collaborate on national and international projects.
Insurance

Posisi: Product Manager - Compliance & Privacy
Perusahaan: Demandlane
Skill Dibutuhkan: Compliance Governance, Leadership, Product Ownership, System Design, Audit and Risk Management, Privacy and Data Protection, Process Design, Cross-Functional Project Management, Analytical Skills, Communication Skills
Pengalaman: 5+ years of experience in Compliance, Risk Management, or Product Operations, preferably in tech, SaaS, or marketing ecosystems.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Law, Information Systems, or related field.
Tugas Utama: Lead global compliance initiatives, manage the Compliance & Privacy team, oversee audits and process automation, ensure adherence to regulatory frameworks, develop compliance-related tools and processes, conduct audits, and maintain privacy standards.

metadata.original_description:
Product Manager – Compliance & Privacy
Location:
Indonesia (100% Remote)
Function:
Product Operations
Reports to:
Director – Product Operations / Compliance
Overview
We at
Demandlane
are looking for a
Product Manager – Compliance & Privacy
to lead our global compliance initiatives across marketing, communications, and data operations. This role combines
regulatory understanding, operational rigor, and product thinking
— designing the systems, processes, and tools that keep our customer communications compliant with FTC, TCPA, state mini-TCPA, CAN-SPAM, and related privacy laws.
You’ll manage the
Compliance & Privacy team
, oversee
audits and process automation
, and work cross-functionally with
Engineering, Product Ops, Marketing, and Call Center Operations
to ensure full adherence to evolving regulatory frameworks.
Demandlane
is a Silicon Valley based company focused on case acquisition for lawyers. Specifically, we focus on mass tort case acquisition, leveraging AI to improve case acquisition. We have a team of senior product, marketing, and engineering leaders from Silicon Valley, India, Indonesia, Nigeria and Romania with proven experience in launching successful products. We provide a fast-paced environment, work on many exciting problem areas, offer opportunities to learn and grow, and offer excellent pay based on performance. We are a remote-first team spread across many cities in India, Romania, Indonesia, Nigeria and the US.
Key Responsibilities
🧭 Compliance Governance & Leadership
Manage the
Compliance & Privacy team
, including analysts and auditors.
Lead monthly
Compliance Committee meetings
to review status, discuss new threats, and identify opportunities for stronger controls.
Build and maintain
Compliance Policies, SOPs, and Internal Certification Programs
to increase organization-wide awareness.
Monitor updates to
FTC, TCPA, and state-specific laws
(Florida, Oklahoma, Maryland, etc.) and drive changes across teams.
🧩 Product Ownership & System Design
Develop and maintain
compliance-related tools and processes
(e.g., DNC scrub systems, alert views, audit forms, and dashboards).
Translate regulatory requirements into
Business Requirement Documents (BRDs)
and collaborate with Engineering and Product Ops to implement them.
Ensure compliance systems remain
accurate, automated, and bug-free
, with proper documentation and user training.
Generate
weekly and monthly compliance reports
, risk dashboards, and non-compliance artefacts.
📞 Marketing & Communications Compliance
Oversee adherence to
TCPA and mini-TCPA dialing laws
, ensuring:
Calls and texts occur only within legal hours and frequency limits (8 AM–9 PM or stricter state rules).
No more than three contact attempts per day per consumer.
Dialer and SMS systems are configured for compliant time zones and throttling.
Ensure
SMS and email compliance
, including:
Clear opt-out options (STOP/unsubscribe links).
Immediate suppression of opted-out contacts.
Honest sender identification, subject lines, and physical address inclusion.
Oversee
Press-1 and automated call compliance
, including consent tracking and pre-recorded message disclosures.
🧮 Audit, Risk & Remediation
Conduct
daily and weekly manual audits
of campaigns and assets.
Identify non-compliant behaviors and create
Corrective and Preventive Action (CAPA)
plans.
Work with Product, Ads, and Engineering teams to
implement and validate fixes
.
Maintain detailed audit trails, proof-of-consent records, and documentation for internal and external reviews.
Analyze
impact of CAPA implementations
to ensure long-term risk mitigation.
🔒 Privacy & Data Protection
Maintain alignment with
U.S. federal and state privacy standards
and
international data protection best practices
.
Ensure
lead management systems
enforce zero engagement for terminal-status leads.
Collaborate with Engineering on
data minimization, retention, and access controls
for compliance assets.
Conduct periodic
privacy reviews
for new features or campaigns.
🧠 Continuous Learning & Stakeholder Engagement
Stay current with evolving
compliance and privacy landscapes
through webinars, certifications, and external training.
Conduct
internal workshops
to educate cross-functional teams on compliance best practices.
Represent Compliance in cross-departmental projects to ensure proactive integration of regulatory principles.
Requirements
🎓 Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Law, Information Systems, or related field.
5+ years of experience in
Compliance, Risk Management, or Product Operations
, preferably in tech, SaaS, or marketing ecosystems.
Familiarity with
FTC, TCPA, CAN-SPAM
, and
U.S. state-level telemarketing and privacy laws
Experience working with or managing
call center, CRM, or marketing automation tools
(e.g., Twilio, HubSpot, Five9, or similar).
🧰 Skills
Strong understanding of
data compliance systems and auditing frameworks
.
Excellent skills in
process design, BRD creation, and cross-functional project management
.
Analytical mindset with experience in
reporting, dashboards, and compliance metrics
.
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.
Proven ability to
influence and collaborate
across teams and time zones.
Why Join Us
Build a
compliance product framework
that protects millions of customer interactions.
Work at the intersection of
product, data, and regulation
in a global tech environment.
Be part of a team that values
proactivity, transparency, and ownership
.
Competitive compensation, remote flexibility, and professional development support.

metadata.original_description:
Brand Manager
Ringkasan Peran:
Brand Manager memegang peran strategis dalam mengembangkan, mengarahkan, dan mengelola brand perusahaan secara menyeluruh. Fokus utama adalah menyusun strategi jangka panjang, memimpin tim brand/marketing, mengelola anggaran besar, serta memastikan brand equity tumbuh sejalan dengan target bisnis perusahaan.
Tugas & Tanggung Jawab
1. Strategi Brand & Market Positioning
Menyusun, mengarahkan, dan mengevaluasi strategi brand
Menentukan positioning, diferensiasi, dan strategi komunikasi merek di pasar.
Menganalisis tren industri, peluang pasar, dan insight konsumen untuk pengembangan brand.
2. Perencanaan & Eksekusi Marketing
Merancang integrated marketing plan (ATL, BTL, digital, trade marketing).
Mengalokasikan dan mengontrol budget brand secara efektif.
Mengawasi pelaksanaan kampanye nasional/regional untuk menjaga konsistensi brand.
3. Pengembangan Produk & Inovasi
Berkolaborasi dengan tim R&D dan Product Development dalam pengembangan produk baru.
Mengidentifikasi peluang inovasi produk berdasarkan kebutuhan konsumen & tren pasar.
4. Leadership & Team Management
Memimpin, mengarahkan, dan membina tim Brand Executive/Brand Officer.
Memberikan coaching, mentoring, serta memastikan pencapaian KPI tim.
Menjaga koordinasi lintas divisi (Sales, Trade Marketing, Digital, Finance, R&D).
5. Monitoring Kinerja & Evaluasi
Menganalisis performa brand melalui market share, brand equity, awareness, serta kontribusi penjualan.
Mengukur efektivitas promosi dan memberikan rekomendasi pengembangan strategi.
Melaporkan progress brand performance kepada manajemen secara berkala.
6. Hubungan Eksternal & Brand Partnership
Membangun hubungan dengan partner eksternal (media, agency, distributor).
Menegosiasikan kontrak dengan vendor terkait aktivitas branding & promosi.
Menginisiasi kolaborasi dengan pihak eksternal untuk meningkatkan exposure brand.
Kualifikasi
Pendidikan minimal S1 (Manajemen, Marketing, atau setara; S2 lebih diutamakan).
Pengalaman minimal 4 tahun di bidang Brand Management, WAJIB berlatar belakang FMCG lebih diutamakan.
Berpengalaman memimpin tim dan mengelola anggaran brand dalam skala besar.
Memiliki kemampuan strategis dalam market analysis, brand positioning, dan inovasi produk.
Memiliki leadership, komunikasi, dan networking yang kuat.
Result-oriented, mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan, serta terbiasa dengan target.
Kreatif, visioner, dan memiliki kemampuan negosiasi dengan stakeholder internal & eksternal.

metadata.original_description:
Domiciled in Batam, Riau Islands (Preferred)
Core Responsibilities
Manage technical projects from planning through delivery.
Coordinate cross-functional teams and align activities with project goals and timelines.
Work with product managers to clarify requirements and support roadmap execution.
Act as the main communication link between technical teams, stakeholders, and management.
Track project risks, issues, and dependencies, and drive resolution.
Ensure deliverables meet agreed quality standards and business needs.
Technical Competencies
Solid understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and agile practices.
Familiarity with cloud platforms, data, or software engineering concepts.
Hands-on experience with project management tools (e.g., Jira, Asana, Trello).
Awareness of product management processes and tools.
Leadership & Team Management
Experience coordinating technical contributors and supporting team performance.
Ability to encourage collaboration and maintain momentum under pressure.
Exposure to resource planning and supporting team growth.
Product & Delivery Skills
Ability to translate requirements into project plans and technical tasks.
Support backlog prioritization and balance short-term delivery with long-term goals.
Appreciation for customer experience and usability considerations.
Communication & Stakeholder Management
Strong verbal and written communication skills.
Comfortable explaining project status and technical progress to non-technical stakeholders.
Skilled in managing expectations and preparing project updates.
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related discipline.
3+ years’ experience in technical project management or related roles.
Proven ability to deliver technical projects on time and within scope.

metadata.original_description:

Memiliki pengalaman 3-5 tahun di bidang manajemen produk Jaringan, server, CCTV dan Network Attached Storage.
Mempunyai kemampuan survey dan analisa pasar.
Mampu menyusun dan mewujudkan strategi produk yang jelas dan efektif.
Memiliki pemahaman yang kuat tentang kerangka kerja pengembangan produk.
Kemampuan leadership dan inisiatif yang baik.
Fasih berbahasa Inggris dan Bahasa Indonesia, baik secara lisan maupun tulisan.
Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab :
Menyusun dan menjelaskan visi, strategi, dan rencana produk yang sejalan dengan tujuan bisnis perusahaan.
Mengelola produk secara menyeluruh, mulai dari identifikasi kebutuhan hingga perbaikan dan optimalisasi.
Memimpin riset untuk memahami kebutuhan pengguna, tren pasar, dan peluang bisnis yang ada.
Bekerja sama dengan tim teknis (engineering), desain, pemasaran, dan operasional agar produk bisa dikembangkan dan diluncurkan dengan sukses.
Menjadi penghubung utama bagi semua pihak, baik dari dalam maupun luar perusahaan, yang terkait dengan produk yang dikelola.
Bekerja dengan tim data untuk mengukur performa produk, menentukan indikator keberhasilan (KPI), dan menemukan hal-hal yang bisa ditingkatkan.

Membantu tim mengambil keputusan dengan cepat dan memastikan proyek berjalan sesuai rencana dan tepat waktu.
Bersedia tugas ke luar kota.

metadata.original_description:
Organization Unit: Indonesia / Southeast Asia Customer Center
Report: Business Line Manager-Service (SEA)
Job description
Industrial Technique Service Division is now looking for an ambitious Service Manager who is driving the value proposition of service products to our end customers with high commitment to delivery of results. This position reports to Service BLM and supports the Regional Service Sales Manager to bring the Service Sales Organization to the next level with sustainable, profitable growth by making use of all the available service products. The sales manager needs to support the sales team in competence development together with BLM so that all the sales team can build trust in our customers on our service proposal. This position is expected to work closely with Regional Service operation manager and being the bridge between the end customer and operation team to ensure that our operation team delivers the right needs to our customers. Work closely with the sales team and end customers, ensuring timely collection of dues by keeping the receivables and overdue under control in line with business plan, negotiating better payment terms and timely follow up with customers and distributors
Mission
Service Manager is responsible to strengthen service sales team and distributors competency focusing on value proposition and bring the team to be sales challenger level. Service Manager also needs to implement strategy align to the division to achieve sustainable profitable growth in line with divisional plans and strengthen Industrial Technique Service Organization in Indonesia for sustainable growth. To develop and implement the Operational Strategy to achieve sustainable profitable growth in line with divisional plans and ensure customer satisfaction. To develop people management to deliver a strong commitment of high-quality service to Atlas Copco IT customers.  Good collaboration among the team, exchange technical and sales information to ensure the right technical proposal with the right budgetary and control on the operation side to secure profitability growth
Major responsibilities
are included, but are not limited to:
·       Implement service sales strategy together with Regional Service Sales Manager, Regional Service Operations Manager & BLM in SEA region for the team and customers with ambitious growth
·       Service sales development with proactively promoting customers on service products e.g. Tool Cover, Easy Start, Tools Net, Calibration, Training, Production Optimization, On site Contracts, Remote Services, Field Service, Service contract, Software contract, etc.
·       Keep updating the installed base by mapping potential customers on key service products in order to consider the right approach on customers.
·       Focus on improving sales efficiency. Track the quotes, strike rate, time spent on each activity, carry out analysis & feed data to regions for improving efficiency
·       Using sales tools, e.g. Salesforce, to forecast service business opportunities and implement strategies together with BLM to improve service revenues
·       Using operational tools on service contract proposal, or service value proposition to sustain overall Atlas Copco business in long term
·       Maintain regular meetings with key contracted customers to identify the customers’ requirements to analyze their demands and deliver and implement a gap closure plan.
·       Monitor & control and Sales & marketing cost.
·       Feed the data to the regions. Create ownership among all the team members to improve sales efficiency
·       Proactive action for key customers to retain & develop existing customer loyalties.
- Be responsible for all sales staff’s competence development from mapping, training to certification.
·       Be responsible for people selection and development, i.e. interview, coaching and counseling of the employees.
·       Focus on people development, create growth opportunities for the team and create talent pipeline
·       Ensuring timely collection of dues by keeping the receivables and overdue under control in line with the business plan by negotiating better payment terms and timely follow-up with customers and distributors
·       Be responsible for all technical staff’s competence development from mapping and training to certification.
·       Ensure the continuous improvement on customer satisfaction measured by regular survey.
·       Plan and manage the service operational budget to ensure the efficiency of IT service.
·       Develop and optimize Indonesia service network of all field, workshop and onsite to ensure the lead time, quality and efficiency.
·       Continuously standardize and improve the service operation workflow to improve quality and efficiency.
·       Interact with other functions (such as project and Product sales) to set up and optimize the cross functional processes.
·       Audit the exits workflow to make sure of the execution.
·       Be responsible for people’s selection and development, i.e. interview, coaching and counseling of the employees.
·       Take full responsibility for service operation team including service operation capacity fulfillment and technical people/competence development to meet the business growth requirement.
·       Keep effective interaction with MVI/GI sales managers to ensure customer satisfaction in territory and key account collaboration strategy execution.
·       Control and develop service workshops under high calibration standards.
·       Manage service schedule, preventive maintenance for all customers. - Tool Management center resource management and branding
·       Service Product Portfolio Management
·       Development of Certified Service Partners
Experience requirements
·       Strong experience in sales development and understanding clearly on sales process
·       Experiences in value proposition selling to customers
·       Experiences or understanding the need of customers on after sales service
·       Experiences in working with both sales team and service team would be a plus
Knowledge
·       Good command of English language both oral and written
·       Full computer literacy (Excel, Word, Power Point) and preferably conversant with MS Office 365
Educational requirements
·       Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical, Electronics or Mechanical.
Personality requirements
·       Proactive, Goal-oriented,
·       Strong negotiation, communication and interpersonal relation skills
·       Focusing on value proposition selling
·       Self-motivated
·       Sharp-minded, Self-directed
·       Good presentation skills,
·       Strong leadership skills and good team player,
·       Ability to manage conflicts,
·       Ability to influence and convince others,
Country and city description
Jakarta,
Indonesia

.

Perusahaan: PT. BERKAT KREASI GEMILANG
Skill Dibutuhkan: Kepemimpinan, Manajemen Waktu, Komunikasi, Negosiasi, Interpersonal, Strategi Merek, Pemasaran Digital, Analisis Data, Storytelling, Berpikir Kreatif, Pengelolaan Anggaran, Pelaksanaan Kampanye
Pengalaman: Pengalaman minimal 3-5 tahun di bidang manajemen merek, pemasaran, atau peran serupa. Pengalaman di industri FMCG atau sektor kesehatan (Gizi) menjadi nilai tambah.
Pendidikan: Gelar Sarjana di bidang Administrasi Bisnis, Pemasaran, Komunikasi, atau bidang terkait.
Tugas Utama: Mengembangkan dan menjalankan strategi untuk meningkatkan kesadaran merek, posisi di pasar, dan kinerja bisnis. Tugas utama meliputi pengembangan strategi merek, riset pasar, perencanaan kampanye pemasaran, pengembangan produk, pengelolaan anggaran, dan kolaborasi dengan pemangku kepentingan.

metadata.original_description:
Brand Manager
Tanggung Jawab Pekerjaan :
Seorang Brand Manager bertanggung jawab untuk mengembangkan dan menjalankan strategi guna meningkatkan kesadaran merek
(Brand Awareness)
, posisi di pasar
(Market Positioning)
, dan kinerja bisnis. Tanggung jawab utama meliputi:
1.
Strategi & Posisi Merek
Mengembangkan dan menerapkan strategi merek untuk mempertahankan eksistensi yang kuat di pasar.
Menentukan posisi merek, pesan, dan nilai jual unik (USP).
Memastikan konsistensi merek di semua saluran pemasaran.
2.
Riset Pasar & Wawasan Konsumen
Melakukan riset pasar untuk memahami perilaku konsumen, persaingan pasar, dan tren industri.
Menganalisis data guna menyempurnakan strategi merek dan meningkatkan keterlibatan pelanggan.
3.
Kampanye Pemasaran & Iklan
Merencanakan dan menjalankan kampanye pemasaran di berbagai media (digital, media sosial, cetak, TV).
Berkolaborasi dengan tim kreatif untuk mengembangkan konten dan iklan yang menarik.
Memantau dan mengevaluasi efektivitas kampanye.
4.
Pengembangan Produk & Inovasi
Bekerja sama dengan tim pengembangan produk untuk memastikan keselarasan produk dengan identitas merek.
Mengidentifikasi peluang untuk produk baru atau perluasan merek.
5.
Pengelolaan Anggaran & Kinerja
Mengelola anggaran pemasaran dan memastikan pengeluaran yang efisien.
Melacak metrik kinerja merek (penjualan, keterlibatan, ekuitas merek).
6.
Kolaborasi & Manajemen Pemangku Kepentingan
Berkoordinasi dengan tim lintas fungsi (penjualan, produk, keuangan, agensi eksternal).
Membangun hubungan yang kuat dengan mitra utama, influencer, dan media
Kualifikasi Rekrutmen :
Usia min. 30 Tahun
Gelar Sarjana di bidang Administrasi Bisnis, Pemasaran, Komunikasi, atau bidang terkait.
Pengalaman minimal 3-5 tahun di bidang manajemen merek, pemasaran, atau peran serupa.
Pengalaman di industri FMCG atau sektor kesehatan (Gizi) menjadi nilai tambah.
Memiliki keterampilan kepemimpinan yang kuat, manajemen waktu yang baik, dan pengalaman dalam mengelola tim.
Kemampuan komunikasi, negosiasi, dan interpersonal yang sangat baik.
Pemahaman yang kuat tentang strategi merek, pemasaran digital, dan perilaku konsumen.
Mampu menginterpretasikan riset pasar dan analisis data.
Memiliki keterampilan storytelling dan berpikir kreatif.
Berpengalaman dalam pengelolaan anggaran pemasaran dan pelaksanaan kampanye.

Proficiency in tools such as Microsoft Excel, Visio, SQL, and project management tools.
Strong understanding of business processes, financial markets, and the trading industry.
Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills for interpreting complex data sets.
Strong verbal and written communication skills in English, with the ability to collaborate with cross-functional and regional teams and present complex information clearly.
Experience in project management (experience as a Product Manager or in Product Research is a plus).
Ability to work effectively both independently and within a team environment.
Adaptability to a fast-paced, dynamic environment with multiple priorities.
Willing to relocate to Batu, East Java
Must be able to communicate effectively in English, both spoken and written.
Job Descriptions
Analyze existing business processes to identify inefficiencies and suggest improvements.
Conduct market research to understand industry trends, competitor strategies, and customer needs.
Gather, analyze, and interpret data to support strategic business decisions.
Collaborate with stakeholders to document and implement business requirements for new projects.
Develop and propose business solutions to enhance operational efficiency.
Prepare detailed reports, business models, and documentation to support strategies and decision-making.
Lead or participate in project teams, ensuring timely and cost-effective delivery.

page_content:
Posisi: RPM Manager (Aesthetic Product)
Perusahaan: CGBio Korea
Skill Dibutuhkan: Sales strategy development, Market analysis, Team management, Customer relationship management, Performance evaluation, Excellent communication skills, Negotiation skills, Presentation skills, Understanding of market trends, Leadership abilities
Pengalaman: Minimum 5-10 years of aesthetic product sales experience, with at least 2-3 years in a managerial role.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Pharmacy, or Healthcare-related field preferred.
Tugas Utama: Develop and implement sales strategies for aesthetic products, set KPIs and sales targets, analyze market trends, lead and motivate the sales team, build relationships with clients, prepare sales reports and forecasts, ensure product knowledge, and support marketing initiatives.

metadata.original_description:
Now, it’s your turn to lead the market.
Based on 20 years of strong networks and partnerships in Indonesia, Daewoong has introduced the proven sales and marketing system from its Korean headquarters, raising localization and execution to a new level. With systematic, data-driven sales and unique marketing strategies, we create win-win value for both customers and the market.
Daewoong has been in Indonesia for over 20 years, deeply understanding the local market and building solid distribution channels and partnerships. Now, with the powerful sales and marketing strategies and systems from Korea, we are beginning a new leap forward. This is why a marketing manager from a global pharmaceutical company recently chose Daewoong. He highly values Daewoong Korea’s localization strategy, execution power, and performance-driven culture, and sees us as a true local company that goes beyond just selling products by also doing tailored R&D and clinical research. At Daewoong, he is expanding his skills through various tasks such as marketing, market analysis, and planning education programs. You too can learn the proven marketing and sales know-how from Korea’s headquarters and take part in creative challenges by applying it to the Indonesian market. In sales, based on proven products and long-standing partnerships, you will join solution-based sales activities with strategic sales and data-driven customer management, creating win-win value for both customers and the market. Daewoong Indonesia’s marketing and sales team is just beginning its big leap. Many more opportunities and growth paths are opening up. More important than experience are attitude and action. For those who want to learn quickly, challenge themselves, and grow, this is the perfect time.
With 20 years of built trust as the foundation, the next success story will be written by you.
Your Role in This Journey
Sales Strategy & Execution
Develop and implement sales strategies for aesthetic products in line with company targets.
Set KPIs, sales targets, and annual/monthly plans.
Analyze market trends, customer needs, and competitors to take strategic actions.
Team Management & Development
Lead, coach, and motivate the sales team to achieve targets.
Conduct performance evaluations, provide coaching, and support professional growth.
Customer Relationship Management
Build and maintain long-term relationships with aesthetic clinics, dermatologists, distributors, and key accounts.
Provide tailored solutions and ensure excellent post-sales support.
Reporting & Forecasting
Prepare regular sales reports, forecasts, and performance analyses.
Provide strategic insights to management on market growth and new opportunities.
Product Knowledge & Marketing Support
Ensure the team has deep product knowledge.
Support marketing initiatives, product launches, and promotions to increase awareness and sales.
Who We’re Excited to Meet
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Pharmacy, or Healthcare-related field preferred.
Minimum 5-10 years of aesthetic product sales experience, with at least 2-3 years in managerial role.
Proven track record in achieving sales targets.
Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
Strong leadership and team management abilities.
Understanding of market trends and regulations related to aesthetic products.
Our Commitment at Daewoong
[Top Treatment & Performance-based Incentive]
Top-tier salary structure
Performance-based pay system  : Rewards based on achievements, with promotions tied to skills and competencies.
[A Growth Platform for Your Career Jump]
Regular provision of specialized training
Hands-on lectures in collaboration with Korean experts
Firsthand experience of the latest K-Beauty trends
Application of the latest Korean cosmetics
[Opportunity for Global Stage Experience]
Korea trip support for top performers
Provision of opportunities to work in Korea for outstanding talents
Life, Work, and Everything in Between
At Daewoong, we want to be more than just a workplace, we strive to be a place where your life finds joy and meaningful growth. We believe in supporting you fully, so that work and life balance harmoniously, and you can shine through every challenge. We sincerely hope the time you spend with us becomes a meaningful journey, where shared growth lights up your future.
Rewards & Benefits
Internal & external training programs
Language training support
Company events (workshops, HR Day, etc.)
Employee club activity support
Long-service awards
Employee discount on B-Project services and products
Free beverages at B-café
Additional private insurance support
Congratulatory and condolence payments
Meal allowance
Performance bonus
BPJS Kesehatan (Health Insurance)
BPJS Ketenagakerjaan (Employment Insurance)
Retirement Pension (JP, Jaminan Pensiun)
Working Environment
Smart Work (Flexible Working Hours)
Clean and safe working environment
40 hours per week, 5 days
Sick leave, maternity leave, paternity leave, wedding leave, condolence leave, etc.
Annual Leave
Min. 12 days for permanent employee (up to 24 based on tenure)
1 day/month for contract employee after 3 months
Meet Your New Work Family
Daewoong Group
Daewoong Group is a major global healthcare leader from Korea, operating in diverse fields including pharmaceuticals, biotechnology, medical devices, and health supplements. With a presence in over 100 countries and a network of 8 branches across Asia and the US, Daewoong drives innovation through 5 worldwide R&D centers and partners with more than 100 companies globally.
In Indonesia, Daewoong employs over 360 talented professionals working across multiple locations including Jakarta, Bali, Bekasi, and Surabaya. We are committed to expanding our business further while considering Indonesia a trusted partner growing together. Daewoong actively invests in talent development and contributes to local communities through various CSR initiatives focused on education, health, and social welfare.
By joining Daewoong, you become part of a company with the scale, vision, and resources to empower your career and make a global impact in healthcare.
Global Presence
Founded in 1945, a global healthcare leader
Top in overseas subsidiaries among Korean pharma
8 Branch Operations in Asia & US
5 R&D Centers Worldwide
100+ Partners Worldwide
No.1 pharmaceutical company in Korea
Over 4,500 employees in Korea
100+ Indonesian Talents Working in Korea
360+ Employees in Daewoong Indonesia
Celebrating Our Journey
Outstanding Foreign Investment Company
Award by the Indonesian Government (2022)
‘Best Workplace’ in Asia (2023)
'Best Workplace' in Korea (2022)
Recognition for Women-Friendly Corporate
Culture & Diversity Management Award (2022)
Global Pharmaceutical R&D Innovation Award (2021)
CBI (CGBIO Indonesia)
A Medical Partnership Where Korean and Indonesian Healthcare Professionals Grow Together
CBI supplies a wide range of medical aesthetic and healthcare products, including spinal and bone substitutes, hyaluronic acid (HA) fillers, anti-adhesion agents, and foam dressings, providing advanced medical solutions to the people of Indonesia. Since our establishment in 2022, we have maintained continuous collaboration and education with local healthcare professionals through domestic and international conferences, the Meet the Master program, and global webinars. We place special focus on enhancing product knowledge and procedural skills in the field of cosmetic and aesthetic treatments. We plan to build the CG MedTech Innovation Campus (CIC), a medical device manufacturing facility in Cikarang, with construction scheduled to begin in 2026. This facility will have the capacity to produce 6 million hyaluronic acid fillers annually and will pursue halal certification and local approvals in compliance with Indonesian product protection laws. Moving forward, we will continue to contribute to the health and quality of life of many by combining advanced technology with locally tailored solutions.
Nulook Clinic
Nulook Clinic combines excellent Korean medical technology with local expertise to become a leading hub for K-Beauty and anti-aging. Nulook helps clients enjoy a new and healthier life through cosmetic surgery and stem cell treatments. we are committed to making high-quality Korean aesthetic medical services easily accessible in Indonesia, raising the standard of local healthcare. We aim to be the No.1 center for global petit procedures, body contouring, and stem cell therapy, providing safe and high-quality medical care.
Recruitment Details
Recruitment Process
Application > Aptitude Test > 1st Interview > 2nd Interview > Compensation Negotiation > Final Onboarding
Your growth is our goal
At Daewoong, we place the highest priority on employee growth, providing an environment where you can work with autonomy and deep immersion. Regardless of age, tenure, gender, or nationality, we evaluate fairly, objectively, and transparently based on ability and performance, and reward accordingly. We strive to build a company where every employee feels a true sense of ownership. We believe our work becomes truly meaningful only when the growth of our people leads to the growth of our customers and society. This is what we call a true win-win-win. Daewoong is a place full of opportunities for your growth. We look forward to sharing this journey of challenge and growth with you.

metadata.original_description:
The Brand Manager is responsible for developing, implementing, and managing marketing strategies that enhance brand awareness, drive growth, and strengthen brand positioning in the market. This role involves analyzing market trends, overseeing campaigns, managing budgets, and ensuring brand consistency across all marketing channels.
Job responsibility :
Develop and execute comprehensive brand strategies to achieve business objectives.
Manage brand positioning, messaging, and visual identity to ensure consistency across all platforms.
Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify trends, insights, and opportunities.
Plan and oversee marketing campaigns (digital, print, events, PR) to promote brand visibility and engagement.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (sales, product, digital, creative, R&D) to align brand initiatives.
Monitor and analyze campaign performance metrics, providing actionable insights for improvement.
Manage brand budget and ensure optimal allocation of resources.
Supervise brand communications, partnerships, and sponsorship activities.
Maintain relationships with external agencies, media partners, and key stakeholders.
Ensure all marketing activities comply with brand guidelines and company standards.
Job Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field (Master’s degree is a plus).
Minimum 5 years of experience in brand management, marketing, or related roles, prefer from FMCG, personal care / beauty industry, pharma industry.
Strong understanding of market research, consumer insights, and brand strategy.
Excellent communication, leadership, and project management skills.
Creative thinker with strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
Proficiency in digital marketing tools, analytics, and social media platforms.
Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

metadata.original_description:
Business Development Manager – Infrastructure (Surabaya-based)
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
Who We Are:
Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
What You’ll Do
Own and grow your pipeline
Build, drive, and convert a strong pipeline across your focus area.
Capture and qualify leads beyond your specialisation to fuel broader sales momentum.
Be the expert everyone turns to
Bring deep product, solution, and industry knowledge to influence deals and outmaneuver competitors.
Guide Account Managers with insights that elevate client conversations and solution design.
Create an opportunity where others can’t
Identify new prospects and expand existing relationships using consultative, value-led engagement.
Position offerings strategically within key accounts, including C-suite stakeholders.
Lead and collaborate with impact
Partner closely with internal teams and external partners to deliver cohesive, high-impact sales motions.
Provide strategic direction for product categories and contribute to broader business development.
Experience that stands out:
Bachelor’s degree and
8–12+ years of advanced sales experience
.
Knowledge and experience in the field of selling Infrastructure as a Solution product is an advantage.
Proven success in meeting increasing quotas across diverse industries and customer profiles.
Strong background in solution or product sales, including 2–3 years in a specialised domain.
Project management skills to steer complex, multi-stakeholder initiatives.
Skills that make you unstoppable:
Expert-level knowledge of competitive landscapes, products, solutions, and services.
Ability to articulate industry-specific challenges and tailor value-driven propositions.
Strong account planning, forecasting, and CRM mastery (e.g., Siebel).
Confidently engaging senior executives and building long-term, trusted client relationships.
Demonstrated success in prospecting, negotiating, and closing high-value opportunities.
Ability to leverage services and software to elevate overall deal value.
What Sets You Apart
You think strategically, act consultatively, and deliver with precision.
You’re a creator of opportunities — not just a closer.
You know how IT budgets, KPIs, and transformation priorities drive buying decisions.
You stay ahead of industry trends, partner ecosystems, and emerging technologies.

metadata.company_name: PT Tech Data Advanced Solutions Indonesia
metadata.original_description:
Job Purpose:
The Product Manager has overall responsibility for achieving the sales and profit targets for the related product groups and creating the highest return for both TD SYNNEX and the vendor. While responsible for revenue outcomes, this is a sales enablement position. This will be achieved through marketing programs, sales training, sales support, technical pre-sales support, vendor contract and vendor relationship. These activities, especially sales and marketing are targeted at both the TD SYNNEX extended sales team and the partner community.
Responsibilities:
Creation of business plans for the vendor product group and associated services.
Development and implementation of sales enablement programs for TD SYNNEX and partners.
Ensure that the technical sales support teams are appropriately trained to support the relevant product groups.
Development and implementation of marketing programs to support product group objectives.
Creation of joint initiatives with our vendor and business partners.
Responsible for effective planning, including inventory turns, inventory fulfillment and inventory obsolescence minimisation.
Implementation of business plans that achieve agreed vendor revenue targets and generate the planned profit outcomes.
Achievement of revenue plans by brand and by market segment.
Coordinate the various functions within TD SYNNEX in order to deliver the outcomes agreed in each product plan.
Ensure that executive business relations with vendor partners are of the highest order, are proactive and that the engagement is continually monitored so that new initiatives can be introduced as required.
Maintenance and development of operational level vendor relationships.
In order to execute product leadership it will be necessary to maintain knowledge of sales processes, proposals, pipeline management, partner engagement so that remedial actions can be recommended where necessary.
Ensuring highest and continuously improving levels of vendor and partner satisfaction.
Maintain a high level of safety awareness within your team to promote a safe working environment for all team members.
Maintenance of an accurate pipeline by product group.
Measurement and maintenance of critical product group performance data in order to ensure that TD SYNNEX meets its vendor commitments and fully leverages all commercial opportunities for rebates and other vendor investment initiatives.
Business forecasting and business planning for product groups with vendors.
Provision of various reports for the purposes of commercial decision making.
Be the advocate and leader for the relevant product groups in TD SYNNEX and be the advocate and leader for TD SYNNEX within the relevant vendor community.
Provide direction, development and support to ensure the sales team is performing at optimum levels for the relevant product group. This will require a close working relationship with the Channels Sales Director.
Deal effectively and efficiently with unsatisfactory performance and/or behavior within your team.
Provide an appropriate example of leadership, by way of behaviors, to the wider organization.
Proactively contribute as a member of the leadership team to the commercial ‘well-being’ and longevity of the business.
Knowledge, Skills and Experience:
Minimum 4-6 years experience within IT distribution
Minimum education level required is a Bachelor’s Degree
Appropriate vendor product sales certifications
Strong leadership attributes
Self-starter
Results focused
Sound business acumen
Ability to work with little direction
Capacity to lead vertial teams
Influence business outcomes without having direct control
What’s In It For You?
Elective Benefits:
Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
Grow Your Career:
Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on-demand courses.
Elevate Your Personal Well-Being:
Boost your financial, physical, and mental well-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
Diversity, Equity & Inclusion:
It’s not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer-to-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
Make the Most of our Global Organization
: Network with other new co-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
Connect with Your Community:
Participate in internal, peer-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.
Don’t meet every job requirement? Apply anyway.
At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, we’re proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you’re excited about working for our company and believe you’re a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we’re looking for!
We are an equal opportunity employer and committed to building a diverse team that represents and empowers a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment based on merit, without regard to race, colour, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexua1 orientation, protected veteran status, disability, genetics, age, or any other characteristic protected by law. To support our diversity and inclusion efforts, we may ask for voluntary gender disclosure information. This data will be used solely to improve our hiring practices and ensure fair treatment for all candidates.

page_content:
Posisi: Software Engineer - Fullstack
Perusahaan: PT Mid Solusi Nusantara (MEKARI)
Skill Dibutuhkan: Modern front-end frameworks (Vue.js, React.js), Back-end frameworks (Ruby on Rails, Go, Laravel), Modern software engineering practices (TDD, continuous integration, code review, microservices design patterns), Containers and container orchestration (Kubernetes), Software development methodologies (Agile, Scrum), Excellent communication skills (written and verbal)
Pengalaman: Minimum 1-year software engineering experience in a team setting
Pendidikan: Not specified
Tugas Utama: Develop front-end & back-end components on the product or service, work closely with Product Manager and stakeholders, run development lifecycle with Technical Program Manager, maintain application with DevOps, manage team knowledge through documentation.

metadata.original_description:
Mekari is Indonesia's no. 1 Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) company. With our ecosystem of software solutions—including Mekari Jurnal, Mekari Talenta, Mekari Qontak, and Mekari Flex, we aim to facilitate entrepreneurs and leaders as they accelerate the digital transformation of their businesses.
In our 10+ years of journey we have reached over 1 Million platform users, and we're not planning to stop any time soon. We need more people like you: builders and owners with calculated ambition who are ready to
#ElevateThroughImpact
and raise Indonesia's software standard.
Job Description:
Develop front-end & back-end components on the product or service that will impact thousands of businesses and millions of users.
Work closely with Product Manager and other business stakeholders to develop solutions that delight our customers.
Work with Technical Program Manager to run development lifecycle (concept, design, test, release, support).
Work closely with DevOps to maintain the application in our infrastructure.
Manage knowledge within the team in the form of written documentation surrounding technical requirements, deployments, and post-mortems.
Requirements:
Minimum 1-year software engineering experience in a team setting
Strong knowledge and experience both in modern front-end frameworks (Vue.js, React.js, etc) and back-end frameworks (Ruby on Rails, Go, Laravel, etc)
Good understanding of modern software engineering practices such as TDD, continuous integration, code review, and microservices design patterns
Familiarity with containers and container orchestration (i.e Kubernetes)
Familiarity with software development methodologies and frameworks such as Agile or Scrum
Excellent communication skills, written and verbal, with a focus on collaboration, understanding, and information sharing between team members and stakeholders
What You Will Get:
1. Competitive salary + daily allowance.
2. Premium private health insurance (outpatient, inpatient, maternity, dental).
3. Early access to salary + flex installment (employee loan) via Mekari Flex.
4. Allowance for sports activities and glasses/contact lenses.
5. Flexible working hours with a hybrid work culture.
6. Annual and unpaid leaves from day 1 of join date + unlimited sick leave with doctor note.

metadata.original_description:
Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team
At GrabInsure, we empower the people of Southeast Asia by enabling financial protection for the underserved – from consumers and drivers to everyday entrepreneurs. The team builds innovative insurance solutions that are integrated into Grab's ecosystem, ensuring our partners (drivers, merchants) and Grab customers have access to affordable and insurance products for their diverse needs.
Get to Know the Role
We are looking for a Lead Product Manager to join our team. You will lead the strategy, discovery, and execution of in-app insurance experiences for Grab's ecosystem, driving a product roadmap that delivers innovative solutions aligned with customer needs, market trends, and Grab's vision.
You will work with cross-functional teams and external insurance partners to create impactful products that balance user experience, compliance, and business goals. You will report to the Senior Product Leader for Insurance and collaborate with stakeholders across departments to drive measurable outcomes.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
Define and lead the vision, strategy, and success metrics
for your product area in close partnership with commercial, country, and other product teams.
Deep-dive into customer behavior, market trends, and internal data
to identify pain points and opportunities that inform roadmap priorities.
Drive experimentation, structured learning, and fast iteration
to find product-market fit and build a differentiated insurance portfolio.
Lead the end-to-end product development lifecycle
– from discovery and user research to execution and post-launch monitoring.
Translate product strategy into detailed requirements
and manage dependencies across multiple teams to ensure seamless execution.
Collaborate with design, engineering, analytics, and product marketing teams
to deliver elegant, scalable, and compliant insurance experiences.
Use Vibe coding
to validate new product ideas and experiences
, ensuring alignment with customer needs and market demands before development begins.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
5 + years of direct experience in product management at a tech company in either platform or user-centric products.
Experience managing product lifecycle including initial concept, market research, defining product requirements, working with teams and ongoing product management
Ability to think in systems and coordinate execution across horizontal capabilities.
Strong user empathy and customer-first mindset, coupled with rigorous data-driven decision-making.
Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and storytelling skills – comfortable working with leadership, engineering, and commercial teams alike.
Proven ability to scale products from 0 to 1 or 1 to n, in complex, fast-moving environments.
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with
Term Life Insurance
and comprehensive
Medical Insurance.
With
GrabFlex,
create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through
Parental
and
Birthday leave
, and give back to your communities through
Love-all-Serve-all (LASA)
volunteering leave
We have a confidential
Grabber Assistance Programme
to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab
We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

metadata.original_description:
Esco Lifesciences Group is improving lives through science!
Headquartered in Singapore, expanded globally with factories and offices in 43 locations around the world, Esco is building a synergistic ecosystem of life science tools, diagnostics, therapies, and technologies to improve human lives.
With nearly 50 years of history and a strong foundation in Singapore, Esco is a dynamic, fast-growing, mid-sized multinational organization that bridges East and West. We offer a diverse, inclusive, and globally connected environment where you’ll collaborate with top experts and visionary clients worldwide. As we accelerate our global expansion, you’ll have the unique opportunity to grow your career in tandem with the company, driving innovation and shaping a healthier, more equitable, and resilient future.
Job Title: Product Management Executive
Location: Bintan, Indonesia
Direct Manager: Commercial Director
Key Responsibilities:
Product Management Functions
Maintain, update, and develop marketing collateral such as brochures, webpages, and other promotional materials to ensure alignment with current product offerings.
Conduct market research and competitive analysis to define product positioning, differentiation strategies, and key selling points.
Manage and update product price lists to ensure accurate model code, item code, and description.
Collaborate with engineers to refine product specifications, ensure standardization, and enhance product features.
Develop Customer Requirement Documents (CRD) and actively participate in the New Product Development (NPD) process to align products with market needs.
Organize and deliver webinars, seminars, and
workshops, and create training materials to enhance product knowledge for both internal teams and external stakeholders.
Review internal project documents to ensure compliance with technical requirements and customer expectations.
Stay up to date with industry trends, technological advancements, and regulatory guidelines to ensure product relevance and compliance.
Commercial Support Functions
Provide sales support by assisting in the preparation of tenders, reviewing User Requirement
Specifications (URS), and facilitating client meetings.
Actively participate in product exhibitions, ensuring proper preparation and coordination with Esco offices and stakeholders.
Serve as a liaison between customers and internal teams during both pre-sales and post-sales phases, ensuring smooth project execution.
Conduct client visits to gain insights into their processes and requirements, translating them into actionable product and service improvements.
Key Requirements:
Bachelor's degree in Life Sciences (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Science/Technology/Biology/Microbiology/Chemistry). Licensed Pharmacist (Apothecary) preferred.
Fresh graduates welcome; 1+ year in the pharmaceutical industry is a plus.
Strong understanding of pharmaceutical technologies, regulatory guidelines, and product management.
Proficiency in market analysis, product positioning, and competitive benchmarking.
Ability to review and develop technical documents (URS, CRD, project specifications).
Graphic design competency for presentations is an advantage.
Fluent in English and Bahasa Indonesia (verbal & written).
Strong customer service and cross-functional collaboration skills.
Ability to present technical concepts effectively to internal teams and clients.
Detail-oriented, with strong problem-solving and analytical capabilities
Ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.
Self-motivated, adaptable, and able to work both independently and in teams.

metadata.job_title: Assistant Manager, Product Development & Improvement (Tobacco Background)
metadata.original_description:
Position Introductory:
The
Assistant Manager,PDI
plays a key supporting role in driving the execution of product development, product improvement, and blending activities within the factory. Reporting directly to the Master Tobacco Flavor & Blender, this role is responsible for coordinating technical documentation, supporting blend/Flavour trials and cigarette validations, and ensuring the seamless flow of product data across cross-functional teams.
Working closely with the Blending, Quality, Regulatory, Manufacturing, HQ PDI and HQ NPI teams, the PDI Assistant Manager helps ensure that all product and blend/Flavour-related processes meet the required standards for accuracy, quality, and compliance. The role is also instrumental in maintaining robust document control systems and supporting the successful launch and maintenance of products.
This position is well-suited for a technically skilled and detail-oriented professional with a passion for continuous improvement and cross-functional collaboration. The Assistant Manager, PDI will contribute to process optimization, product integrity, and the overall success of the factory’s PDI operations.
Responsibilities:
1. Product Development & Improvement Support
Assist in the execution of New Product Development (NPD), product reformulation, and product maintenance initiatives.
Assist in material & product design technical readiness for new product development and material change.
Support technical evaluations, sample submissions, product trials, and production scale-up activities.
Coordinate with cross-functional teams to ensure technical readiness for product launches and changes.
2. Blend & Flavour Management Assistance
Support the planning and execution of blend/flavour trials, validations, and implementation of approved blend/flavour changes.
Work with the Blending, BOL Lab and Quality teams to ensure blend accuracy, consistency, and adherence to specifications.
Monitor blend performance data and participate in investigations and continuous improvement initiatives.
3. Documentation & Data Management
Manage and maintain accurate technical documentation, including product specifications, BOM in Navision, blend formulations, and change control records.
Ensure compliance with document control procedures and support audits or inspections as required.
Assist in the administration of digital systems for product and formulation data management (e.g. Navision, Sample Inventory and Power BI.
Responsible to ensure the Click Up process of PDI is maintained, proper execution with documentation is updated in timely manner.
4. Cross-Functional Collaboration
Liaise with HQ PDI, HQ NPI, Blending, QA, Regulatory, and Manufacturing teams to support smooth communication and timely execution of projects.
Participate in project meetings, prepare reports, and track status updates for PDI activities.
5. Team Leadership and Development
Provide direct leadership and development support to the factory teams.
Build team capabilities through coaching, training, and performance management.
Foster a culture of accountability, technical excellence, and continuous improvement.
6. Compliance & Quality Assurance
Support compliance with internal quality standards and external regulatory requirements.
Ensure documentation and activities are audit-ready and meet traceability and data integrity expectations.
Requirements:
Education & Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in chemistry, engineering, or a related field.
Relevant certifications in Quality, Project Management, or Continuous Improvement (e.g., Six Sigma, PMP) are desirable.
Experience
3-5 years of experience in product development, formulation, or technical operations within the tobacco and cigarette industry.
Experience in a manufacturing or factory setting with exposure to technical documentation and process improvement.
Familiarity with product lifecycle processes, such as product launches, technical changes, or product maintenance.
Technical Skills
Understanding of cigarette design, blending, formulation, and specification management.
Knowledge of documentation systems and compliance requirements (e.g., HACCP, GMP).
Proficiency in MS Office; experience with PLM, SAP, or similar ERP systems is an advantage.
Soft Skills
Strong communication and collaboration skills to work with internal teams and external partners.
High attention to detail with excellent organizational and time management skills.
Ability to work independently and take initiative within defined responsibilities.
A proactive, continuous improvement mindset and willingness to grow into a leadership role.
Other:
Working Location: PT. SAAT, Malang, Indonesia
5 working days per week
Remuneration commensurate with relevant working experience and job knowledge
Leave and health medical benefits

metadata.original_description:
Looking to apply your expertise in the global healthcare industry?
Contributing to the improvement of the quality of life for the Indonesian people with innovative pharmaceuticals and bio solutions.
Daewoong Pharmaceutical Indonesia develops and manufactures innovative pharmaceuticals focusing on chemical drugs, cosmetics, and stem cell therapies.
Since our establishment in 2022, we have been the first Korean company in Indonesia to obtain GMP certification for stem cell processing. We produce high-quality stem cell therapies derived from umbilical cord and fat tissues, and are expanding our pipeline to include exosomes and immune cells. Beyond stem cells, we are building production facilities for chemical drugs while continuously strengthening our R&D capabilities. In cosmetics, we have also completed GMP certification and are enhancing competitiveness in bio-based functional products. We actively collaborate with Indonesia’s top universities, UI, ITB, and IPB  to conduct clinical and joint research. We have established a well-organized system that manages the entire pharmaceutical lifecycle, including R&D, manufacturing, quality, and intellectual property. With our own manufacturing facility capable of producing 500 million tablets/capsules annually and backed by Daewoong Pharmaceutical’s proven technology, we aim to provide safe and innovative treatment options to Indonesian patients and help improve health and well-being throughout Indonesia.
Company Culture
At Daewoong, we believe healthcare is more than medicine — it’s about creating better lives. Guided by our WIN-WIN-WIN philosophy, we grow together with our people, customers, and society. We value autonomy, encouraging our team to work in their own best way — where, when, and how they feel most focused. Growth is our priority: we set bold goals, learn continuously, and embrace feedback. Here, work isn’t just a job — it’s a chance to do something meaningful and impactful.
Why Join Us?
Top-Tier Salary: We offer a highly competitive salary that reflects your skills and experience in the pharmaceutical, wellness, and beauty industry.
Performance-Based Compensation: Your hard work and results are directly rewarded with performance-based compensation, and opportunities for rapid promotions.
Autonomous and Immersive Work Culture: Work in an environment that promotes ownership, independence, and deep engagement.
Meaningful Work with Societal Impact: Your contribution helps drive a triple-win: employee growth, customer satisfaction, and societal advancement.
Expert Training & Knowledge: We are committed to your development. You'll receive specialized training in partnership, including direct learning from Korean expertise.
Exclusive Korea Trips: Top performers will be rewarded with a unique trip to Korea, offering a chance to experience our roots and culture firsthand.
International Career Path: Exceptional talent will have the opportunity for overseas training or placement, paving the way for a truly global career.
We offer an opportunity to gain production know-how and technology meeting Korean cGMP standards at our GMP-certified manufacturing facility in Indonesia.
Team Introduction
Daewoong Pharmaceutical supplies high-quality pharmaceuticals worldwide based on advanced smart factory systems and stringent GMP standards. Our production facility in Cikarang boasts global-level manufacturing competitiveness with state-of-the-art automation, aseptic management, and quality tracking systems across various fields, including cosmetics, stem cell therapies and botulinum toxin products. A new plant for chemical drug production is currently under construction, which will further expand our manufacturing capabilities. Indonesian production personnel build expertise through rigorous training and hands-on experience, and outstanding talents are offered opportunities to work at our headquarters in Korea. Currently, approximately 150 Indonesian production specialists are actively working in Korea. We are seeking talented individuals to join us at the forefront of the global pharmaceutical industry, creating fast, safe, and innovative medicines.
Your Role in this Journey:
Marketing Strategy & Planning
Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies for stem cell products, aligned with business objectives.
Identify market opportunities, customer segments, and competitor activities to inform strategic decisions.
Plan and manage marketing budgets effectively.
Brand Management & Communication
Build and strengthen the brand image of the company and its stem cell products.
Develop marketing campaigns, promotional materials, digital content, and educational resources for healthcare professionals and patients.
Ensure consistent brand messaging across all channels.
Lead Generation & Sales Support
Collaborate with the sales team to generate qualified leads and support sales initiatives.
Develop tools and materials that help sales teams communicate product benefits effectively.
Market Research & Analytics
Conduct market research, analyze trends, and monitor regulatory and scientific developments in stem cell therapy.
Measure and report the effectiveness of marketing campaigns and recommend improvements.
Stakeholder Engagement
Build relationships with key opinion leaders (KOLs), medical institutions, and professional associations.
Organize events, seminars, webinars, and conferences to promote the company and its products.
Who We’re Excited to Meet:
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Biomedical Science, or Medicine.
Minimum 5-10 years of experience in marketing of biotechnology, regenerative medicine, or high-science pharmaceutical products.
Proven track record of building KOL and hospital networks (especially in Jakarta, Surabaya, or any other major hospitals in Indonesia).
Strong understanding of medical/scientific products and regulatory compliance.
Proven experience in planning and executing successful marketing campaigns.
Excellent communication, presentation, and leadership skills.
Analytical mindset with the ability to translate insights into actionable strategies.
Recruitment Details:
ㆍ Application > Aptitude Test > 1st Interview > 2nd Interview > Compensation Negotiation > Final Onboarding
Our Commitment at Daewoong:
[Top Treatment & Performance-based Incentive]
Top-tier salary structure
Performance-based incentive system  : Rewards based on achievements, with promotions tied to skills and competencies.
[A Growth Platform for Your Career Growth]
Exposure to production management across all phases
Operational excellence in site selection, monitoring, and GMP compliance
Cross-functional collaboration with regulatory, data management, pharmacovigilance, and biostatistics teams
Hands-on knowledge of quality systems including SOP governance, audits, and inspections
Global regulatory and compliance exposure, working with international standards (ICH-GCP, ISO, BPOM)
A clear career pathway in production department
[Opportunity for Global Stage Experience]
Korea trip support for top performers
Provision of opportunities to work in Korea for outstanding talents
Great Workplace, Daewoong Group
Daewoong Group is a major global healthcare leader from Korea, operating in diverse fields including pharmaceuticals, biotechnology, medical devices, and health supplements. With a presence in over 100 countries and a network of 8 branches across Asia and the US, Daewoong drives innovation through 5 worldwide R&D centers and partners with more than 100 companies globally.
In Indonesia, Daewoong employs over 360 talented professionals working across multiple locations including Jakarta, Bali, Bekasi, and Surabaya. We are committed to expanding our business further while considering Indonesia a trusted partner growing together. Daewoong actively invests in talent development and contributes to local communities through various CSR initiatives focused on education, health, and social welfare.
By joining Daewoong, you become part of a company with the scale, vision, and resources to empower your career and make a global impact in healthcare.

Top in overseas subsidiaries among Korean pharma
8 Branch Operations in Asia & US
