Perusahaan: Pengiklan Anonim
Skill Dibutuhkan: Business Development, Market Research, Negotiation, Strategic Planning, Relationship Management, Communication Skills, Interpersonal Skills, Project Management, Analytical Skills, Sales Target Achievement, Team Collaboration, Problem Solving, English Proficiency, MS Office Skills
Pengalaman: Minimum 10 years of experience in business development roles within the pharmaceutical, distribution, raw materials industry or a related field.
Pendidikan: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Management, or related field; advanced degree (MBA) preferred.
Tugas Utama: Identify and evaluate new business opportunities, develop and implement strategic business development plans, build and maintain relationships with key stakeholders, lead negotiations for partnership agreements, conduct market research and competitive analysis, collaborate with cross-functional teams, monitor industry trends, prepare and present business proposals, and enhance existing relationships.

metadata.original_description:
Our company established since 40 years ago, with 1.200 employees and our business is in manufacturing, selling, marketing, distributing pharmaceutical products, chemical ingredient products and FMCG. We have several branch offices in all big cities throughout Indonesia.
URGENTLY REQUIRED
BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER
Jakarta
The Business Development Manager will be responsible for driving business growth and expanding market. This role involves identifying new business opportunities, establishing strategic partnerships, and negotiating agreements to support product commercialization and market expansion efforts. The Business Development Manager will collaborate with internal stakeholders, external partners, and key decision-makers to develop and execute business development strategies aligned with organizational goals and objectives.
Responsibilities:
·         Identify and evaluate new business opportunities, market trends, and potential partnerships to drive revenue growth and market expansion.
·         Develop and implement strategic business development plans and initiatives to achieve sales targets and business objectives.
·         Build and maintain relationships with key stakeholders, including healthcare providers, distributors, government agencies, and industry partners.
·         Lead the negotiation and execution of partnership agreements, licensing deals, and distribution contracts to support product commercialization and market entry.
·         Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and feasibility studies to assess market potential and inform business development decisions.
·         Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including marketing, R&D, regulatory affairs, and finance, to ensure alignment of business development activities with overall business strategy.
·         Monitor industry trends, regulatory changes, and competitive developments to identify opportunities and threats, and adjust business development strategies accordingly.
·         Prepare and present business proposals, presentations, and reports to senior management and stakeholders to communicate progress, achievements, and future plans.
·         Present new products and services and enhance existing relationships.
·         Work with technical staff and other internal colleagues to meet customer needs.
Requirements:
·         Bachelor's degree in Business Administration /Marketing / Manajemen / or related field; advanced degree MBA preferred.
·         Proven min. 10 years of experience in business development roles within the pharmaceutical, distribution, raw materials industry or a related field.
·         Strong understanding of pharmaceutical, raw materials products, markets, and regulatory requirements.
·         Demonstrated track record of success in identifying and closing business opportunities, negotiating contracts, and driving revenue growth.
·         Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
·         Strategic thinker with the ability to analyze market trends, identify growth opportunities, and develop innovative business solutions.
·         Results-oriented mindset with a focus on achieving sales targets and business objectives.
·         Ability to work collaboratively in a cross-functional team environment and influence stakeholders at all levels.
·         Strong organizational and project management skills, with the ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks and projects simultaneously.
·         Willingness to travel as needed to meet with clients, attend industry events, and conduct market research and provide feedback and information on market and creative trends.
·         Using knowledge of the market and competitors, identify and develop the company’s unique selling propositions and differentiators.
·         Good English in writing and conversation.
·         Good computer skills MS-Office.
·         High integrity and can be trusted.
BENEFITS
·         BPJS.
·         Car.
·         Competitive salary.
·         Career development.
Please email your complete CV explaining your job description in details together with your latest photo.
Kindly mention your present salary and salary expectation.

Perusahaan: BIENSI FESYENINDO (3SECOND GROUP)
Skill Dibutuhkan: Brand management, Marketing strategy, Consumer insight, Digital marketing tools, Brand analytics, Trend forecasting, Campaign execution, Leadership, Collaboration, Data-driven decision making, Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, Basic design tools (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite)
Pengalaman: Minimum 5 years of experience in brand management, preferably in fashion, retail, or lifestyle industry.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communication, or related field.
Tugas Utama: Develop and execute brand strategies, oversee brand calendar and campaigns, manage brand performance metrics, collaborate with cross-functional teams, supervise campaign execution, lead market analysis, manage KOL and influencer projects, monitor brand marketing budgets, and guide team development.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
We are seeking an experienced Brand Manager to join our dynamic team at BIENSI FESYENINDO (3SECOND GROUP)' in Bandung Barat, West Java. As a full-time Brand Manager, you will be responsible for leading the strategy and execution of our brand initiatives, ensuring the consistent and impactful representation of our brand across all touchpoints.
What you'll be doing
Develop and execute comprehensive brand strategies to strengthen brand positioning and market share across multiple fashion categories.
Plan and oversee annual brand calendar, campaign concepts, and product communication strategies aligned with business objectives.
Manage and analyze brand performance metrics (awareness, engagement, conversion, and sales contribution).
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Creative, Digital, E-Commerce, Merchandising, and Retail) to ensure brand consistency across all touchpoints.
Supervise campaign execution (ATL, BTL, Digital, and PR activities) and ensure alignment with brand identity and tone.
Lead market and competitor analysis to identify opportunities and emerging trends in the fashion industry.
Manage KOL, influencer, and brand collaboration projects to enhance visibility and credibility.
Monitor and control brand marketing budgets and ensure optimal ROI for all activities.
Guide and develop team members to build a high-performing, creative, and data-driven brand team.
What we're looking for
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communication, or related field.
Minimum 5 years of experience in brand management, preferably in fashion, retail, or lifestyle industry.
Strong understanding of brand positioning, consumer insight, and marketing strategy.
Familiar with digital marketing tools, brand analytics, and trend forecasting.
Experienced in leading campaigns with proven impact on sales or brand awareness.
Proficient in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and basic design/briefing tools (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite is a plus).
Leadership mindset, collaborative spirit, and passion for fashion trends.
Able to work in a fast-paced environment and join immediately.
What we offer
At BIENSI FESYENINDO (3SECOND GROUP)', we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer a range of benefits, including comprehensive health insurance, generous annual leave, and opportunities for professional development and career advancement. Our vibrant company culture encourages collaboration, innovation, and a healthy work-life balance.
If you are passionate about brand management and eager to contribute to the growth and success of BIENSI FESYENINDO (3SECOND GROUP)', we encourage you to apply now.

SAP Product Manager

• Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems Management, or a related field.

• Minimum 5 years of experience in SAP product development, implementation, or product management.

• Excellent analytical skills for data interpretation and reporting.
• Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, for internal and external collaboration.
• Solid grasp of product management principles including product definition, roadmap planning, and pricing strategy.
• Adaptable and innovative mindset to align SAP solutions with evolving market needs.

metadata.original_description:
We are looking for a Product Development  Specialist with a minimum of 3 years of experience in the beauty industry. The ideal candidate has proven experience managing end-to-end product development, from market research and trend analysis to formulation and product launch. This role requires strong skills in developing product concepts based on consumer insights, collaborating across functions (R&D, Marketing, Regulatory, and Production), and ensuring product quality and safety meet industry standards.
Key Responsibilities
Conduct in-depth market research and analyze market trends to develop a strategic product roadmap aligned with brand strategy and positioning.
Conceptualize innovative products with a clear Unique Selling Point (USP), ensuring Product-Market Fit (PMF) and commercial viability.
Manage the end-to-end product development cycle, including formulation, panel testing, user insights, and regulatory compliance.
Collaborate with internal and external teams—including R&D, Marketing, Vendors/Suppliers, and Operations to manage project timelines and ensure on-time product launches.
Analyze and manage product costing (COGS).
Qualifications :
Candidates must possess at least Bachelor’s Degree in any major but prefer in Chemistry, Pharmacy or related field.
A minimum of 3 years of progressive experience in beauty/skincare product development.
Fluent in English, both oral and written.
Keep up with beauty market trends, both local and international, regarding products, ingredients, and consumer needs.
Proven track record of successful product conceptualization and launch.
Proficient in reviewing and applying scientific literature for active ingredient and formulation trends / innovation.
Willing to work full-time (WFO) in Cibubur, Bekasi.

metadata.original_description:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!
‎
‎
Job Description
Define product roadmap and strategy to address user needs and achieve business goals.
Define business KPIs and success metrics and is accountable to measure product success and contributions.

page_content:
Posisi: Human Resources Manager
Perusahaan: PT Aeroxspace Adventure Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Human Resources Management, Recruitment, Onboarding, Employee Relations, Performance Management, Training and Development, HR Policy Implementation, Data Analysis, Communication Skills, Interpersonal Skills, HR Information Systems
Pengalaman: Minimum 3 years of progressive HR experience, preferably in a consulting or generalist HR role
Pendidikan: Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Law, or a related field
Tugas Utama: Overseeing all aspects of human resources management, including recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, performance management, and training and development; Partnering with teams to understand workforce needs and developing tailored HR solutions; Implementing effective HR policies and procedures; Providing HR expertise and guidance; Spearheading initiatives to enhance employee engagement; Analyzing HR data to identify trends; Collaborating cross-functionally on HR projects.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
PT Aeroxspace Adventure Indonesia is seeking an experienced Human Resources Manager to join our dynamic team in Denpasar, Bali. In this full-time position, you will play a critical role in shaping our company's people strategy and supporting the overall growth and development of our workforce.
What you'll be doing
Overseeing all aspects of human resources management, including recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, performance management, and training and development
Partnering with the teams to understand their workforce needs and developing tailored HR solutions to support their objectives
Implementing effective HR policies, procedures and programmes to ensure compliance with relevant laws and regulations
Providing HR expertise and guidance to managers and employees on a wide range of HR-related matters
Spearheading initiatives to enhance employee engagement, satisfaction and wellbeing
Analysing HR data and metrics to identify trends and opportunities for continuous improvement
Collaborating cross-functionally to drive the implementation of HR-related projects and initiatives
What we're looking for
Minimum 3 years of progressive HR experience, preferably in a consulting or generalist HR role
Strong understanding of Indonesian labour laws and HR best practices
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively engage with employees at all levels
Proficient in HR information systems and data analysis tools
Proven track record of designing and implementing successful HR programmes and initiatives
Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Law, or a related field
CHRP or other relevant HR certification is an advantage
What we offer
At PT Aeroxspace Adventure Indonesia, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer a range of benefits including comprehensive health insurance, generous leave entitlements, and opportunities for professional development and career advancement. Our company culture encourages collaboration, innovation, and work-life balance.
About us
PT Aeroxspace Adventure Indonesia is a leading provider of adventure tourism experiences in Bali. With a focus on delivering exceptional customer service and creating unforgettable memories, we have rapidly grown to become one of the most trusted and respected names in the industry. Our team is passionate about exploring Bali's natural wonders and sharing our love of adventure with visitors from around the world.
If you are excited by the prospect of joining our dynamic team and contributing to the success of our organization, we encourage you to apply now.

page_content:
Posisi: HR Generalist Senior Staff (Industrial)
Perusahaan: PT Lawencon Internasional
Skill Dibutuhkan: Industrial relations, Employee administration, HR policy development, Training and development, Legal compliance, Communication skills, Interpersonal skills, Problem-solving, Administrative software proficiency (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Slack)
Pengalaman: 4 years of proven experience as an HR Generalist, with a preference for at least 2 years in a supervisory HR role.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Engineer, Science or a related field.
Tugas Utama: Handle industrial relations matters, develop and implement HR policies, manage employee administration, facilitate onboarding and training, ensure compliance with labor laws, provide strategic HR insights, and act as a communication bridge between employees and management.

metadata.original_description:
We are looking for an experienced HR Generalist who is dynamic, proactive, and ready to work in both South Jakarta and North Sumatera (if needed). This position is responsible for handling a wide range of HR functions with a strong focus on industrial relations, employee administration, HR policy development, training, and legal compliance.
This is a hands-on role ideal for someone who enjoys working in a flat organizational structure, thrives in field-based environments, and is open to relocation or travel as part of their responsibilities.
Key Responsibilities:
Handle industrial relations matters, including drafting employment agreements (PKWT/PKWTT), internal regulations, and managing employee disputes or disciplinary issues.
Develop and implement HR policies, SOPs, and internal guidelines in alignment with operational needs.
Manage all aspects of employee administration: attendance, leave, contracts, insurance (BPJS), performance appraisal, people development and general HR documentation.
Facilitate employee onboarding, basic training, and skills development programs.
Ensure full compliance with Indonesian labor law
Provide strategic insights on HR improvements that align with field operations and business objectives.
Act as a communication bridge between employees and management to maintain a positive work environment.
Willing to work on-site at either South Jakarta or North Sumatera depending on business needs
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Engineer, Science or a related field.
4 years of proven experience as an HR Generalist, preferably with a focus on industrial relations and HR operations.
Minimum of 2 years of experience in a supervisory HR role will be given preference and may be prioritized during the selection process.
Preference for candidates from outside the area (out-of-town/“anak rantau”) who are independent and adaptive to new environments.
Demonstrates a humble, creative, open-minded, and collaborative mindset.
Strong knowledge of Indonesian labor laws, employee rights, and BPJS regulations.
Comfortable working in a flat organization with minimal hierarchy.
Willing to travel and work on-site in field locations North Sumatera as needed.
Proficient in administrative software (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Slack, etc.).
Strong interpersonal and communication skills; able to resolve issues diplomatically and build trust across teams.

Perusahaan: TEKNO ORBIT PERSADA

metadata.original_description:
The
Senior Human Resources Supervisor
will be responsible for strategizing, directing, and integrating the company’s Human Resources and General Affairs (HRGA) programs. This includes Organization Development & Manpower Planning, Talent & Learning Management, Rewards Management, HR Operations, Recruitment, General Services, Industrial & External Relations, and Medical Benefits.
The position ensures that all HRGA policies, business processes, and decisions comply with government regulations and align with the company’s business objectives.
Key Responsibilities:
Recruitment and Hiring:
Prepare job descriptions, post job ads, screen and interview candidates, facilitate onboarding, and support the performance management system.
Employee Relations:
Act as a bridge between management and employees, address grievances, and promote a positive work culture.
Training and Development:
Develop and implement training programs and assist in performance management initiatives.
Policy and Compliance:
Advise management on HR policies and ensure compliance with labour laws and regulations.
Administrative Tasks:
Manage payroll and benefits administration, oversee health and safety programs, and maintain HR documentation and reports.
Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Psychology, Human Resource Management, Law, Industrial Engineering, or Management from a reputable university.
Minimum 5 years of post-qualification experience (PQE) in Human Resources, with proven exposure to both operational and strategic HR functions.
Strong knowledge of Indonesian labor law, industrial relations, and HR compliance.
Demonstrated experience in recruitment, performance management, compensation and benefits, and employee engagement.
Excellent communication, interpersonal, and problem-solving skills.
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a dynamic environment.
Good command of English, both spoken and written.
Reporting to:
GM Project Development

Posisi: HRD (KPI Specialist - People Analytics)
Perusahaan: PT Kharisma Adhi Sejahtera
Skill Dibutuhkan: Recruitment Process Management, KPI Development, Performance Measurement, Data Analysis, Analytical Tools (Excel, Google Sheets, Power BI, Tableau), Communication Skills, Interpersonal Skills, Problem Solving, Attention to Detail, Social Media Proficiency
Pengalaman: Minimum 3–5 years of experience in developing, implementing, and analyzing KPIs within an organization.
Pendidikan: Minimum Bachelor's degree (S1) in Management, Statistics, Industrial Psychology, Industrial Engineering, or a related field.
Tugas Utama: Manage the end-to-end recruitment process, handle BPJS Ketenagakerjaan and Kesehatan, develop KPIs, conduct training on performance measurement, monitor performance, analyze KPI achievement, prepare performance reports, collaborate on appraisal systems, implement sourcing strategies, conduct employer branding, and contribute to onboarding programs.

metadata.original_description:
Job Descriptions:
Manage the end-to-end recruitment process, including manpower planning, job description development, job posting, CV screening, interviews,job offering, and onboarding process (Outsourcing Company Basic)
Handling BPJS Ketenagakerjaan (PU/BPU), BPJS Kesehatan, and Insurance.
Develop and design KPIs aligned with the company's strategic goals.
Conduct socialization and training sessions for teams on performance measurement.
Manage the monitoring and evaluation process of departmental and individual performance.
Analyze KPI achievement and provide improvement recommendations.
Prepare periodic performance reports for management review.
Collaborate with other HR teams in developing appraisal and reward systems.
Develop and implement active sourcing strategies through various platforms (LinkedIn, Jobstreet, campus portals, training and education centers, etc.).
Conduct employer branding activities through social media and recruitment events.
Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of the recruitment process on a regular basis.
Contribute to the development and implementation of onboarding programs for new employees
Requirement:
Minimum Bachelor's degree (S1) in Management, Statistics, Industrial Psychology, Industrial Engineering, or a related field.
Minimum 3–5 years of experience in developing, implementing, and analyzing KPIs within an organization.
Strong understanding of performance measurement methodologies such as Balanced Scorecard, OKRs, SMART Goals, and other relevant frameworks.
Experienced in working with both quantitative and qualitative data.
Proficient in analytical tools such as advanced Excel, Google Sheets, Power BI, or Tableau.

metadata.original_description:
We are a leading OEM manufacturer of electrical household appliances for worldwide brand names. Based in Hong Kong, we have highly integrated production facilities in Guangdong Province and Batam, Indonesia.  We would like to invite high caliber individuals to fill the following vacancy:
Responsible for managing various personnel functions, including support in end-to-end recruitment processes (job posting, sourcing, interviewing, onboarding, exit process, etc), maintaining employee records, handling HR administration (attendance, leave, work visa application, etc.) and other assigned duties.

At least 5 years solid personnel experience in a manufacturing environment
Well-versed in Labor Ordinance and other related regulations in Indonesia
Proficient in MS Office including Word, Excel, PowerPoint etc
Able to work independently with strong sense of confidentiality
Mature, meticulous and good interpersonal skills
Good command of spoken & written English and proficiency in spoken Mandarin is a MUST
Interested parties please send your full resume in English including the
detail description of the industry and product
in your working experience, expected salary and date available to Human Resources Department by clicking "Apply Now" button.
For more details, please visit our web-site at www.simatelex.com.hk
The personal data collected in this Job Application (the “Data”) may be shared among other companies within our group and/or our related companies for the recruitment purpose, who may be involved in processing your job application and related matters.

Perusahaan: Citra Jaya Plastik
Skill Dibutuhkan: Rekrutmen, Pengelolaan SDM, Pengelolaan dokumen karyawan, Membuat laporan, Mengatur jadwal, Detail-oriented, Kolaborasi antar departemen, Perencanaan dan pelaksanaan program pelatihan, Pengelolaan absensi dan cuti, Membangun budaya perusahaan
Pengalaman: Diutamakan pengalaman di Plastic Manufacture (Pabrik Plastik) dan pengalaman kerja di bidang SDM lebih disukai, terutama dalam posisi yang berkaitan langsung dengan pengelolaan karyawan.
Pendidikan: Pendidikan minimal: D3 atau S1 di bidang Manajemen Sumber Daya Manusia (SDM), Psikologi, Manajemen.
Tugas Utama: Membantu proses rekrutmen, mengelola data karyawan, memastikan dokumentasi karyawan diperbarui, mengelola catatan absensi dan cuti, membantu dalam perencanaan dan pelaksanaan program pelatihan, berkolaborasi dengan kepala lintas departemen, menyusun KPI, mengumpulkan data untuk menghitung KPI, membuat SOP, mengurusi BPJS, membuat dan mengawasi peraturan perusahaan, mengurusi perizinan dan legalitas perusahaan, serta merekap absensi dan menghitung gaji karyawan.

metadata.original_description:
Apakah Anda seorang HR Generalist yang suka dengan tantangan dan terinspirasi dalam membangun super team. Senang Rekrutmen, People-Oriented dan ingin membangun budaya kerja yang solid? Jika Ya ! Inilah kesempatan Anda untuk bergabung menjadi bagian dari Super Team Human Resource di PT. Citra Jaya Plastik.
Perkenalkan PT. Citra Jaya Plastik (CJP) merupakan perusahaan manufaktur produk-produk bahan plastik kebutuhan rumah tangga. Kami percaya dengan menciptakan produk yang inovatif dengan warna cerah dan menarik kami bisa menghadirkan kegembiraan di setiap ruang di rumah anda.
Kami termotivasi untuk produk kami dikenal dan dipakai diseluruh Indonesia, membantu bisnis dan usaha kecil untuk maju. Kami sangat peduli terhadap tanggung jawab sosial dan lingkungan. Kami mengimplementasikan praktik berkelanjutan dalam setiap aspek operasional kami, termasuk pengurangan limbah, penggunaan energi yang efisien, serta daur ulang bahan. Kami juga aktif terlibat dalam program sosial dan mendukung komunitas sekitar kami.
Tugas & Tanggung Jawab :
Membantu proses rekrutmen, termasuk posting lowongan pekerjaan, menyaring CV, Interview HR, membuat jadwal interview user, Backgroud checking, offering letter, tanda tangan kontrak hingga onboarding karyawan baru
Mengelola data karyawan seperti dokumen pribadi, kontrak kerja, dan perubahan status karyawan.
Mengatur dan memastikan dokumentasi karyawan diperbarui sesuai dengan regulasi yang berlaku.
Mengelola catatan absensi dan cuti karyawan.
Membantu dalam perencanaan dan pelaksanaan program pelatihan untuk pengembangan karyawan.
Berkolaborasi dan bekerja sama dengan kepala lintas departemen untuk pencapaian KPI
Membantu tim manajemen dalam menyusun KPI yang relevan dengan tujuan departemen HRD, seperti produktivitas karyawan, tingkat absensi, tingkat kepuasan karyawan, dan kinerja rekrutmen.
Mengumpulkan data yang diperlukan untuk menghitung KPI, seperti data absensi karyawan, data pelatihan dan pengembangan, data kinerja, serta data rekrutmen dan seleksi.
Bekerjasama dengan Kepala Divisi dalam membuat SOP, jobdesk dan mengaplikasikan nya
Mengurusi BPJS Kesehatan dan BPJS Ketenagakerjaan
Membuat dan mengawasi peraturan perusahaan, memberikan SP, sanksi hingga Pemutusan hubungan kerja
Mengurusi perizinan dan legalitas perusahaan
Support Generall Affair
Membangun budaya perusahaan
Merekap absensi dan Menghitung gaji karyawan.
Kualifikasi :
Pendidikan minimal: D3 atau S1 di bidang Manajemen Sumber Daya Manusia (SDM), Psikologi, Manajemen.
Diutamakan pengalaman di Plastic Manufacture (Pabrik Plastik)
Pengalaman kerja di bidang SDM lebih disukai, terutama dalam posisi yang berkaitan langsung dengan pengelolaan karyawan.
Keterampilan Pengelolaan SDM dan Mengelola dokumen karyawan, membuat laporan, dan mengatur jadwal dengan baik.
Detail-oriented: Teliti dan berhati-hati dalam mengelola data karyawan
Bersedia ditempatkan di Kantor palem cengkareng jakarta barat dan juga di pabrik dadap tangerang
Mari Bergabung dengan Citra Jaya Plastik!
Citra Jaya Plastik (CJP) merupakan perusahaan manufaktur produk-produk bahan plastik kebutuhan rumah tangga. Kami percaya dengan menciptakan produk yang inovatif dengan warna cerah menarik kami bisa menghadirkan kegembiraan di setiap ruang di rumah anda.
Kami termotivasi untuk produk kami dikenal dipakai diseluruh Indonesia, membantu bisnis dan usaha kecil untuk maju. Kami sangat peduli terhadap tanggung jawab sosial dan lingkungan. Kami mengimplementasikan praktik berkelanjutan dalam setiap aspek operasional kami, termasuk pengurangan limbah, penggunaan energi yang efisien, serta pendaurulangan bahan. Kami juga aktif terlibat dalam program sosial dan mendukung komunitas sekitar kami.

Houseware & Flower Pot

Komitmen, Integritas, Trust in God, Reliable, Accurate.

page_content:
Posisi: Human Resource Development
Perusahaan: PT Dinamika Polimerindo
Skill Dibutuhkan: Manajemen Sumber Daya Manusia, Rekrutmen, Pelatihan, Pengembangan Karier, Manajemen Kinerja, Komunikasi Efektif, Analisis Masalah, Pemahaman Peraturan Ketenagakerjaan, Kemampuan Beradaptasi
Pengalaman: Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman dalam peran serupa/fresh graduate dipersilahkan.
Pendidikan: Gelar sarjana di bidang Manajemen Sumber Daya Manusia, Psikologi, atau bidang terkait.
Tugas Utama: Mengelola dan memperbarui data karyawan, menyusun dan mendistribusikan dokumen HR, mengelola absensi karyawan, mengurus administrasi BPJS, menangani proses administratif rekrutmen, membantu administrasi pelatihan, menyusun laporan HR rutin, dan memberikan dukungan administratif dalam kegiatan HR lainnya.

metadata.original_description:
Peluang Karier
PT Dinamika Polimerindo membuka kesempatan bagi fresh graduate/profesional Human Resource yang adaptif, dan berorientasi pada pengembangan manusia untuk bergabung bersama kami. Posisi ini akan menjadi penggerak utama dalam memastikan perusahaan memiliki talenta terbaik untuk mendukung pertumbuhan bisnis yang terus meningkat.
Di perusahaan manufaktur yang dinamis seperti kami, peran Anda tidak hanya berfokus pada pengembangan karyawan, tetapi juga memastikan budaya kerja yang produktif, sehat, dan berkelanjutan.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
Mengelola dan memperbarui
data karyawan
dalam sistem dan arsip (fisik maupun digital) termasuk dokumen pribadi, kontrak, perubahan status, dan file ketenagakerjaan lainnya.
Menyusun, mengelola, dan mendistribusikan dokumen HR seperti
kontrak kerja, perpanjangan kontrak, surat tugas, surat peringatan, surat keputusan
, dan administrasi lainnya.
Mengelola
absensi karyawan
, termasuk input data, verifikasi keterlambatan, izin, cuti, dan lembur sebagai dasar laporan bulanan.
Mengurus administrasi
BPJS Kesehatan & BPJS Ketenagakerjaan
: pendaftaran, mutasi, perubahan data, penonaktifan, dan pelaporan rutin.
Menangani seluruh proses administratif rekrutmen: posting lowongan, seleksi berkas, penjadwalan interview, administrasi onboarding, dan pembuatan dokumen penerimaan karyawan baru.
Membantu penyusunan dan pelaksanaan
administrasi pelatihan
, termasuk undangan, absensi peserta, dokumentasi, dan sertifikat.
Menyusun
laporan HR rutin
seperti laporan absensi, turnover, rekap BPJS, dan laporan administratif lainnya sebagai kebutuhan manajemen.
Memberikan dukungan administratif dalam kegiatan HR lainnya yang bersifat operasional dan harian.
Keterampilan dan Kualifikasi yang Dibutuhkan
Gelar sarjana di bidang Manajemen Sumber Daya Manusia, Psikologi, atau bidang terkait.
Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman dalam peran serupa/fresh graduate dipersilahkan.
Pemahaman yang kuat tentang praktik manajemen sumber daya manusia, termasuk rekrutmen, pelatihan, pengembangan karier, dan manajemen kinerja.
Kemampuan komunikasi yang efektif, baik lisan maupun tertulis, untuk berinteraksi dengan berbagai tingkatan karyawan.
Keterampilan analitis yang kuat untuk mengidentifikasi dan menyelesaikan masalah sumber daya manusia.
Pemahaman tentang peraturan ketenagakerjaan yang berlaku di Indonesia.
Kemampuan beradaptasi dan bekerja dalam lingkungan yang dinamis.
Manfaat Bergabung dengan Kami
Paket kompensasi yang kompetitif, termasuk gaji pokok, tunjangan dan program asuransi kesehatan dan manfaat lainnya yang komprehensif untuk karyawan dan keluarga.
Kesempatan untuk pengembangan karier dan pelatihan berkelanjutan yang mendukung pertumbuhan secara profesional.
Lingkungan kerja yang positif, kolaboratif, dan mendukung di mana karyawan dihargai dan diberikan peluang untuk berkembang.
Fasilitas perkantoran yang modern dan nyaman, serta opsi fleksibilitas dalam bekerja.
Tentang PT Dinamika Polimerindo
PT Dinamika Polimerindo adalah pemimpin industri dalam pengembangan dan manufaktur produk plastic injection berkualitas tinggi di Indonesia. Didirikan pada tahun 1996, kami telah tumbuh menjadi perusahaan terkemuka dengan reputasi unggul dalam inovasi, kualitas, dan layanan pelanggan. Kami berkomitmen untuk menjadi mitra terpercaya bagi pelanggan kami dan terus memperluas jangkauan kami di pasar domestik maupun internasional.
Jika Anda tertarik untuk menjadi bagian dari tim kami yang dinamis, lamar posisi ini sekarang!

page_content:
Posisi: HR Operations
Perusahaan: Pengiklan Anonim
Skill Dibutuhkan: HR operations, Payroll processing, Benefits administration, Employee onboarding, Employee offboarding, HR policies implementation, HR systems maintenance, Data integrity, Training coordination, HR reporting, Process improvement, Communication skills, Interpersonal skills, Problem-solving skills, Attention to detail, Customer-centric approach
Pengalaman: Minimum 3 years of experience in a similar HR operations role, preferably within the Consulting & General HR industry; experience as a payroll processor/officer is a plus.
Pendidikan: Not specified, but relevant HR qualifications may be implied.
Tugas Utama: Overseeing day-to-day HR operations, including payroll processing, benefits administration, employee onboarding and offboarding, maintaining HR systems, assisting in HR policy implementation, providing administrative support, and identifying process improvement opportunities.

metadata.original_description:
About the role
As a dedicated HR Operations professional, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the seamless management of the company's human resources. Working in a full-time capacity, you will be based in the vibrant city of South Jakarta, Jakarta Raya, contributing to the overall success and growth of the organisation.
What you'll be doing
Overseeing the day-to-day operations of the HR department, including end to end payroll processing, benefits administration (Insurance & BPJS), and employee onboarding and offboarding
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to address HR-related queries and concerns, ensuring a positive employee experience
Maintaining and updating HR systems, databases, and records to ensure compliance and data integrity
Assisting in the implementation of HR policies, procedures, and best practices to support the company's strategic objectives
Providing administrative support for HR-related activities, such as coordinating training, managing employee files, and generating HR reports
Identifying opportunities for process improvements and contributing to the development of HR initiatives that enhance the overall efficiency and effectiveness of the department
What we're looking for
Minimum 3 years of experience in a similar HR operations role, preferably within the Consulting & General HR industry as payroll processor/officer is a plus
Strong knowledge of labour laws, HR policies, and best practices relevant to the company's HR management
Proficiency in using HR information systems and software, such as payroll and HRIS applications, has experience using Talenta is a plus
Understand about how to calculate income tax and able to explain the logic behind the calculation including explaining the tax brackets and how the system works.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact effectively with employees at all levels
Demonstrated problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently as well as part of a team
Attention to detail and a commitment to maintaining accurate and up-to-date HR records
A collaborative mindset and a customer-centric approach to supporting the needs of the business
What we offer
We believe in fostering a work environment that promotes work-life balance and employee well-being. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer a range of benefits, including:
Comprehensive health insurance coverage
Opportunities for professional development and career advancement
Collaborative and supportive team culture

page_content:
Posisi: HR Strategic Officer
Perusahaan: PT Pulau Sambu
Skill Dibutuhkan: Data analysis, Human resource management, Organizational development, HR strategy, Research and data analysis, Effective communication, Business planning, Analytical skills, Problem-solving, Teamwork, Independence
Pengalaman: Experience in design and developing human resource management systems. Experience in research and data analysis related to human resource management.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Business Management / Information Systems / Actuarial Science / Industrial Engineering.
Tugas Utama: Collect, process, and analyze workforce data. Provide recommendations for corrective actions to management based on workforce data analysis. Observe and analyze human resource management in business units to identify efficiencies. Design and implement human resource management systems and infrastructure. Manage HR system documents and ensure restricted access. Conduct research and surveys for policy-making and HR strategies. Identify collaboration opportunities with external parties.

metadata.original_description:
Job Description:
Collect, process, and analyze workforce data.
Provide recommendations for corrective actions to management in anticipating potential labor issues and risks based on workforce data analysis.
Observe and analyze human resource management in each business unit to identify potential efficiencies and value creation for the company.
Design human resource management systems and their supporting infrastructure.
Implement human resource management systems and infrastructure in line with work plan.
Manage human resource management system documents and ensure access is restricted to authorized parties only.
Conduct research, studies, and surveys related to human resources to obtain data and information required for policy-making, human resource management strategies, and decision-making.
Identify opportunities for collaboration with external parties that can support and add value to human resource management.
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Business Management / Information Systems / Actuarial Science / Industrial Engineering.
Experience in design and developing human resource management systems.
Experience in research and data analysis related to human resource management.
Strong understanding of human resource management, organizational development, and HR strategy.
High integrity and strong commitment to organizational development.
Effective communication skills and ability to prepare business plans.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Ability to work independently and in a team.
Willingness to travel to company operational sites.

Perusahaan: PT YUXI Jayatama Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Fluent in English (written and spoken), Good communication skills, Interpersonal skills, Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), Detail-oriented, Well-organized, Multitasking, Ability to work independently, Team collaboration, Comfortable working with global teams/time zones
Pengalaman: 1–2 years of experience in recruitment or HR-related roles.

metadata.original_description:
!! ONLY ENGLISH CV & ATS FRIENDLY SUBMISSIONS WILL BE PROCESSED !!
About us :
YUXI   JAYATAMA  is  an  Multi-Channel  Network (MCN) company under  the Sands Group Indonesia with 9 business units such as Oppo, J&T Express, J&T Cargo, Y.O.U, Makuku, Olike, Jet Commerce, Fullmoon, Tomoro Cafe.
We provides services for brands in marketing planning, promotion, Brand Awareness, Campaign and assisting in finding the right creators for brands.
In  less  than  1  year,  Yuxi  have  achieved  several  significant milestones, such as number 1 MCN in Beauty & Mom and Baby category on Tiktok, TOP 3 MCN in Tiktok, Shopee MCN Partner from October 2023 until now.
Job Responsibilities:
Handle end-to-end recruitment process (job posting, screening, interviewing, and offering).
Coordinate with hiring managers to understand manpower needs and ensure timely fulfillment.
Maintain and update candidate database, talent pipeline, and recruitment reports.
Manage onboarding and orientation processes for new hires.
Support General Affairs tasks such as office supplies management, facility maintenance, and company asset monitoring.
Assist in HR administrative tasks including attendance, employee database updates, and document filing.
Support HR projects and continuous improvement initiatives as assigned.
Assist recruitment and HR coordination for US Market if needed (candidate sourcing, screening schedule, basic communication, and reporting).
Job Requirements:
Bachelor’s Degree in Psychology, Human Resources, Law, or related field.
1–2 years of experience in recruitment or HR-related roles.
Fluent in English (written and spoken) is a must.
Good communication and interpersonal skills.
Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
Detail-oriented, well-organized, and able to multitask.
Ability to work independently and collaborate effectively in a team.
Comfortable working with global teams/time zones is a plus.

page_content:
Posisi: HR DIRECTOR (People & Culture)
Perusahaan: PT DHANAJAYA BOGAINDO
Skill Dibutuhkan: Strong leadership & team-building skills, Excellent communication and stakeholder management, Deep understanding of Indonesian labour law, Strategic thinker with hands-on execution capability, Passion for developing people and improving culture, Ability to work in a fast-growth, multi-brand environment
Pengalaman: Minimum 8–12 years HR experience, with at least 5 years in leadership roles. Proven experience in hospitality/F&B/retail environments is a strong advantage. Track record in scaling HR operations for growing organisations. Experience setting up training, performance, or culture programs.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s Degree in HR Management, Psychology, Business, or related field. HR certifications are a plus.
Tugas Utama: Drive people strategy, build strong culture across all brands, and elevate the employee experience from hiring to growth. Oversee recruitment, training, development, people experience, HR operations, and performance management. Design a Best-in-Class Induction Programme for new employees.

metadata.original_description:
We are one of Jakarta’s leading restaurant group with continued expansion - we are building a People & Culture team that will support our growth and strengthen the heart of our business:
our people
. To lead this transformation, we are looking for a
strategic, experienced, and people-centered HR Director
.
Role Overview
The HR Director will drive our people strategy, build strong culture across all brands, and elevate the employee experience from hiring to growth. You will oversee recruitment, training, development, people experience, HR operations, and performance management.
You will also design a
Best-in-Class Induction Programme
to ensure every new employee — from FOH to BOH to office — feels welcomed, valued, and embedded in our culture from Day 1.
This is a rare opportunity to shape the People & Culture foundation for a fast-expanding F&B group
Key Responsibilities
1. Strategic Leadership
Build and execute the People & Culture roadmap
Forecast manpower needs for expansion
2. Talent Acquisition & Workforce Planning
Oversee end-to-end recruitment processes
Build talent pipelines for FOH/BOH and office roles
Strengthen employer branding and recruitment channels
3. Induction & Onboarding
Design a
structured, welcoming induction programme
Ensure all new staff understand:
Company culture & values
Brand identity
Expectations & career pathways
Basic SOPs and service standards
Work with Operations & L&D to create consistent onboarding for all stores
4. Culture & People Experience
Roll out culture-building initiatives
Strengthen sense of belonging & employee engagement
Lead internal communication, recognition programs, and staff events
5. Learning & Development
Create competency frameworks for every department
Build training roadmaps (FOH, BOH, office, warehouse)
Develop leadership programs for supervisors and managers
6. Performance Management
Design and implement a fair & transparent evaluation system
Introduce goal-setting, KPI tracking, quarterly reviews
Identify high performers and future leaders
Manage improvement plans & respectful off-boarding when needed
7. HR Operations & Compliance
Ensure payroll, attendance, and HR systems run effectively
Improve HR SOPs and documentation
Maintain compliance with Indonesian labour laws
8. Cross-Department Partnerships
Collaborate with Operations, Finance, Marketing & Brand Depts
Requirements
Experience
Minimum
8–12 years
HR experience, with at least
5 years in leadership roles
Proven experience in hospitality/F&B/retail environments is a strong advantage
Track record in scaling HR operations for growing organisations
Experience setting up training, performance, or culture programs
Skills & Qualities
Strong leadership & team-building skills
Excellent communication and stakeholder management
Deep understanding of Indonesian labour law
Strategic thinker with hands-on execution capability
Passion for developing people and improving culture
Ability to work in a fast-growth, multi-brand environment
Education
Bachelor’s Degree in HR Management, Psychology, Business, or related field
HR certifications are a plus
🌟 What We Offer
Opportunity to build and lead a strategic People & Culture function
Meaningful role shaping culture for 500+ employees
Competitive salary & leadership benefits
Direct influence on company-wide growth and employee experience
Fast-paced, supportive environment where your work truly matters

page_content:

Perusahaan: PT Fuse Group
Skill Dibutuhkan: project coordination, documentation, stakeholder management, data management, report preparation, communication, organizational skills, attention to detail, proactive learning
Pengalaman: 1–3 years of experience in HR, project coordination, or administrative roles (fresh graduates with internship experience are welcome)
Pendidikan: Not specified, but relevant experience is prioritized
Tugas Utama: Coordinate HR projects and initiatives across countries, maintain HR databases and documentation, prepare reports and presentations, follow up with stakeholders, support engagement and culture programs, assist in HR operations.

metadata.original_description:
We’re Hiring: HRBP Specialist
We’re looking for a
HRBP Specialist
— someone structured, reliable, and curious — to work closely with the
Senior HR Business Partner
in managing cross-country HR projects and ensuring smooth execution of day-to-day people operations.
This role is perfect for someone who loves
project coordination, documentation, and stakeholder management
, and wants to grow into a future HRBP or People Operations leader through hands-on experience.
What You’ll Do
You’ll act as the right hand to the HRBP lead, helping to keep projects, data, and communication running smoothly:
Coordinate HR projects and initiatives
across countries (e.g. org structure alignment, job function mapping, system rollouts, and automation projects).
Maintain HR databases, trackers, and documentation
— ensuring accuracy and version control across multiple business units.
Prepare reports, presentation decks, and summaries
for management updates or cross-department reviews.
Follow up with stakeholders
to keep timelines, deliverables, and action items on track.
Support engagement, culture, and communication programs
, from planning to execution logistics.
Assist in HR operations
such as headcount tracking, job description updates, and policy documentation.
Who You Are
You’ll fit right in if you:
Have
1–3 years of experience
in HR, project coordination, or administrative roles (fresh graduates with internship experience are welcome).
Are highly
organized and detail-oriented
, with strong follow-through.
Enjoy working with
spreadsheets, documents, and project trackers
— keeping things structured and consistent.
Communicate clearly, both in
English and Bahasa Indonesia.
Are proactive, eager to learn, and comfortable juggling multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.
What You’ll Gain
Direct mentorship from the
Senior HRBP
and exposure to strategic HR projects.
The opportunity to learn how
regional HR, operations, and business strategy
connect.
A fast-learning environment where initiative, clarity, and ownership are valued.
A clear path to grow into
HRBP or Project Management
roles in the future.

page_content:
Posisi: Human Resources
Perusahaan: Heura
Skill Dibutuhkan: Applicant Tracking Systems, HR databases, recruiting methods, project management, communication skills, relationship building
Pengalaman: Hands-on experience with Applicant Tracking Systems and HR databases.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s Degree from a reputable university with min GPA 3.5, preferably from Psychology, Business, Administrative, Management, or equivalent.
Tugas Utama: Collaborate with hiring managers to understand needs and roles, manage the recruiting pipeline, build talent pools, create networks of potential candidates, define effective recruiting methods, and assess candidate qualifications.

metadata.original_description:
Job Overview
This is a full-time on-site role for a
Human Resource Associate
located in
Kelapa Gading, North Jakarta, Indonesia.
Job Description
Collaborate with hiring managers in understanding the needs and roles to be filled as well as review job descriptions for vacancies.
Manage the recruiting pipeline including determining resources status and needs, coordinating recruiting events and sourcing activities, assessing, and managing referral processes
Build the talent pool to manage the hiring cycle and develop new strategies and programs to attract candidates.
Create, build, and maintain networks of potential passive candidates to fill future anticipated and planned roles
Define the most effective methods for recruiting and attracting candidates.
Identifies appropriate candidates and assesses their qualifications through review of their resumes, interviews, and other forms of communications.
Requirements
Bachelor’s Degree from a reputable university with min GPA 3.5, preferably from Psychology, Business, Administrative, Management, or equivalent.
Hands-on experience with Applicant Tracking Systems and HR databases.
Thorough understanding of recruiting methods and best practices, as well as applicable policies and federal, state, and local employment laws and regulations.
Fast learner in understanding the duties and competencies of different roles.
An empath with great project management skills & strong communication skills to build relationships with various hiring managers
Ability to function well in a high-paced environment.

Posisi: SUPERVISOR HRD
Perusahaan: CV Cahaya maju
Skill Dibutuhkan: Kemampuan komunikasi, Kepemimpinan, Problem solving, Teliti, Berorientasi pada proses, Menguasai sistem HRIS

Tugas Utama: Mengawasi seluruh aktivitas HRD sehari-hari, termasuk rekrutmen, onboarding, dan evaluasi kinerja; mengelola administrasi personalia; menyusun dan menerapkan kebijakan HR; menangani isu hubungan industrial; merancang dan mengkoordinasikan program pelatihan; mengembangkan budaya kerja positif; menyusun laporan berkala; membina dan memimpin tim HR.

metadata.original_description:
Supervisor HRD bertanggung jawab untuk mengawasi seluruh kegiatan sumber daya manusia, memastikan proses HR berjalan efektif, serta mendukung terciptanya lingkungan kerja yang produktif, harmonis, dan sesuai peraturan. Posisi ini memimpin tim HR dalam melaksanakan fungsi rekrutmen, pelatihan, administrasi personalia, serta pengembangan karyawan.
Tanggung Jawab Utama:
Mengawasi seluruh aktivitas HRD sehari-hari, termasuk rekrutmen, onboarding, dan evaluasi kinerja.
Mengelola administrasi personalia: absensi, kontrak kerja, data karyawan, kompensasi & benefit.
Menyusun dan menerapkan kebijakan HR sesuai regulasi ketenagakerjaan yang berlaku.
Menangani isu hubungan industrial, termasuk penyelesaian masalah karyawan dan komunikasi dengan pihak terkait.
Merancang dan mengkoordinasikan program pelatihan, pengembangan kompetensi, dan career path karyawan.
Mengembangkan budaya kerja positif dan strategi retensi karyawan.
Menyusun laporan berkala terkait indikator HR kepada manajemen.
Membina dan memimpin tim HR agar bekerja secara efektif.
Kualifikasi:
Pendidikan minimal S1 Psikologi, Manajemen SDM, Hukum, atau bidang terkait.
Pengalaman minimal 2–4 tahun di bidang HR (pengalaman pada posisi supervisi lebih disukai).
Memahami UU Ketenagakerjaan, BPJS, dan regulasi HR lainnya.
Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi, kepemimpinan, dan problem solving yang baik.
Mampu bekerja dengan target, teliti, dan berorientasi pada proses.
Menguasai sistem HRIS (nilai tambah).

page_content:

Perusahaan: WINOD RITEL INDONESIA
Skill Dibutuhkan: Menguasai undang-undang ketenagakerjaan Indonesia, Proses recruitment end-to-end, Teknik interview, On-boarding process, Administrasi HR, Update data karyawan, Rekap kehadiran, Schedule kerja, Supervisi karyawan, Komunikasi, Organisasi program pelatihan, Pengelolaan petty cash, Pengelolaan general affair, Sistem KPI, Pengembangan SOP, Kemampuan negosiasi, Kemampuan multitasking
Pengalaman: Minimal 1 tahun sebagai HR Generalist di bidang retail
Pendidikan: Minimal Diploma atau Sarjana Strata 1 (Hukum, Psikologi, atau Manajemen Sumber Daya Manusia)
Tugas Utama: Mengelola administrasi HR, melakukan supervisi karyawan, mengupdate kontrak kerja, menjadi penghubung antara manajemen dan karyawan, mengorganisir program pelatihan, mengelola petty cash, dan merancang sistem KPI.

metadata.original_description:
JOB DESCRIPTION
Menguasai undang-undang ketenagakerjaan Indonesia
Menguasai proses recruitment end-to-end, teknik interview dan memahami on-boarding process secara terstruktur
Mengelola administrasi HR secara lengkap dan efisien seperti update data karyawan (online dan offline), rekap kehadiran, dan schedule kerja
Melakukan update schedule karyawan dan melakukan supervisi agar performance kerja karyawan berjalan dengan baik, lancar, dan sesuai fungsinya
Mengupdate secara rutin masa kontrak kerja karyawan serta melaporkannya kepada Supervisor/Manager HR untuk ditindaklanjuti
Menjadi penghubung antara manajemen dan karyawan serta senantiasa memberikan info terupdate mengenai peraturan perusahaan
Mengorganisir dan menjalankan program pelatihan karyawan dan mengedukasi karyawan mengenai hal atau kebijakan baru dalam perusahaan
Membantu Supervisor/Manager mengelola karyawan dan hubungan dengan para karyawan
Mengelola petty cash dan jurnalnya
Mengelola general affair dan pengawasannya seluruh divisi perusahaan
Merancang dan mengawasi pelaksanaan sistem KPI (Key Performance Indicators) untuk semua departemen, memastikan alat ukur kinerja yang relevan dan terintegrasi dengan tujuan perusahaan
Mengembangkan, meninjau, dan memperbarui SOP berdasarkan praktik saat ini dan persyaratan peraturan.
REQUIREMENT
Minimal Pendidikan Diploma atau Sarjana Stara 1 (satu) jurusan Hukum, Psikologi, atau Manajemen Sumber Daya Manusia
Berusia maksimal 25 tahun
Memiliki pengalaman sebagai HR Generalist minimal 1 tahun di bidang retail diutamakan
Berpengalaman dalam menghandle monitoring dan evaluasi KPI Karyawan atau performance management tools lainnya
Memiliki kemampuan negosiasi yang baik, komunikatif dan memiliki insiatif yang bersifat strategis
Mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan, dan mampu melakukan multitasking
Bersedia penempatan di Karang Tengah, Banten

Kemampuan komunikasi yang kuat, baik lisan maupun tertulis, dan kemampuan bernegosiasi yang efektif.
Berpikir kritis, berorientasi pada detail, dan kemampuan pemecahan masalah yang baik.
Pemahaman tentang peraturan ketenagakerjaan yang berlaku di Indonesia.
Pengetahuan tentang penggunaan perangkat lunak dan teknologi HR modern.
Manfaat Utama Perusahaan
gaji yang menarik dan tunjangan.

metadata.original_description:
Apakah ANDA seorang yang mahir berkomunikasi, problem solving, teliti dan berpengalaman di bidang Human Resource/ Sumber Daya Manusia?

• Bertanggung jawab atas perbaikan & perubahan di system Ketenagakerjaan

metadata.original_description:
HRD Staff
PT. Pacific Refuto System
sebuah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang cooling system yang menyediakan sistem pendingin otomatis terbaik, Saat ini kami
membuka kesempatan bagi seorang HRD Staff yang berpengalaman dan kompeten
untuk bergabung dengan tim kami. Dalam posisi ini, Anda akan berperan penting dalam mendukung pengembangan dan implementasi strategi sumber daya manusia yang selaras dengan visi dan tujuan perusahaan. Sebagai HRD Staff, Anda akan terlibat dalam berbagai aspek manajemen sumber daya manusia, mulai dari rekrutmen hingga pengembangan karyawan.
Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab:
Memahami

Penyusunan surat dan dokumen resmi perusahaan.

Dapat bergabung secepatnya

page_content:
Posisi: Human Capital & General Affairs Manager
Perusahaan: Vapexpress Group
Skill Dibutuhkan: Human Capital Management, Recruitment, Learning & Development, Organizational Development, Compensation & Benefit, Employee Relation, HR Administration, Psychological Assessment Development, Budget Management, Data-Driven HR Programs, Labor Law Compliance, Communication Skills, Problem Solving, Conflict Management, Decision Making
Pengalaman: Minimal 10 tahun di bidang Human Resources, Recruitment, atau Training & Development dan minimal 5 tahun di level managerial pada industri Retail, FMCG, Tobacco, Distribusi, atau Manufaktur.
Pendidikan: Pendidikan minimal S1 semua jurusan, diutamakan jurusan Psikologi, Antropologi, Ilmu Politik.
Tugas Utama: Menyusun strategi Human Capital sesuai kebutuhan bisnis, mengelola proses rekrutmen, merancang kurikulum pelatihan, menangani isu karyawan, mengelola sistem KPI, memimpin tim HC, menyusun dan mengontrol budget Human Capital, serta memastikan akurasi proses payroll.

metadata.original_description:
HUMAN CAPITAL & GENERAL AFFAIRS MANAGER
COMPANY PROFILE
Vapexpress Retail Group adalah perusahaan Retail vape yang berkembang pesat di Indonesia, dengan jaringan outlet yang tersebar di Bogor, Bekasi, Jakarta, dan Tangerang Selatan. Berdiri sejak tahun 2022, Vapexpress hadir sebagai pelopor vape store modern yang berfokus pada pelayanan prima, edukasi produk, serta pengalaman belanja yang nyaman dan berkualitas bagi pelanggan.
Kami terus tumbuh dan berinovasi melalui pengelolaan bisnis yang profesional, tata kelola yang efisien, serta komitmen tinggi dalam membangun sumber daya manusia yang unggul. Dengan visi menjadi perusahaan waralaba supply chain vape terpercaya di Indonesia, Vapexpress berkomitmen menghadirkan produk dan layanan terbaik bagi setiap pelanggan di seluruh cabang kami.
Bergabunglah bersama kami dan jadilah bagian dari tim yang bersemangat, adaptif, dan berorientasi pada keunggulan untuk tumbuh bersama Vapexpress menuju ritel vape berstandar nasional.
KUALIFIKASI PERKERJAAN :
Pendidikan minimal S1 semua jurusan,
diutamakan jurusan Psikologi, Antropologi, Ilmu Politik
Pengalaman kerja
minimal 10 tahun di bidang Human Resources, Recruitment, atau Training & Development dan minimal 5 tahun di level managerial pada industry (Retail, FMCG, Tobacco, Distribusi, Manufaktur)
Memahami
end-to-end Human Capital Management: Recruitment, Learning & Development, Organizational Development, Compensation & Benefit, Employee Relation, dan HR Administration
Berpengalaman dalam
develop sistem assessment psikologi
serta mampu membaca interpretasi hasil psikotes
Memiliki
pengalaman dalam menyusun, mengelola & mengontrol budget Human Capital
, termasuk Budget rekrutmen, Budget training & development, Budget benefit & program engagement, dan Budget headcount planning
Mampu menyusun strategi manajemen SDM, mengelola struktur organisasi, KPI, dan HR program berbasis data
Memahami UU Ketenagakerjaan, peraturan pemerintah, serta best practice HR modern
Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi, problem solving, conflict management, dan decision making yang kuat
DESKRIPSI PERKERJAAN :
Strategic Human Capital Management
Menyusun strategi HC sesuai kebutuhan bisnis dan arah pertumbuhan perusahaan.
Mengembangkan manpower planning, struktur organisasi, dan sistem pengelolaan talent.
Recruitment & Assessment
Mengelola proses rekrutmen end-to-end, termasuk alokasi dan efisiensi budget hiring.
Mengembangkan sistem assessment psikologi dan standar kompetensi kandidat.
Learning & Development
Merancang kurikulum pelatihan serta memastikan penggunaan budget training secara efektif.
Menyusun career path, program pengembangan, dan succession planning.
Employee Relations & HR Operations
Menangani isu karyawan, hubungan industrial, dan memastikan penyelesaian yang adil & profesional.
Mengawasi seluruh administrasi HC termasuk absensi, kontrak kerja, dan dokumentasi personalia.
Performance Management
Mengelola sistem KPI, evaluasi kinerja, dan program peningkatan performa karyawan.
Leadership & Team Development
Memimpin tim HC dengan profesional, empati, dan kedisiplinan tinggi.
Mendelegasikan tugas dengan tepat dan membangun budaya kerja yang sehat & produktif.
Budgeting & Cost Management
Menyusun, mengelola, dan mengontrol budget Human Capital (recruitment, L&D, engagement, HR tools).
Melakukan analisis kebutuhan biaya dan memastikan efisiensi penggunaan budget.
Menyusun laporan penggunaan budget dan rekomendasi efektivitas biaya jangka panjang.
Payroll Management
Human Capital Manager bertanggung jawab untuk memastikan proses payroll berjalan akurasi, tepat waktu, dan sesuai ketentuan hukum
Tanggung Jawab Pengelolaan Payroll
Mengawasi dan memastikan akurasi keseluruhan proses payroll bulanan, termasuk perhitungan gaji pokok, lembur, tunjangan, insentif, komisi, dan potongan.
Berkoordinasi dengan Finance terkait pengeluaran payroll dan rekonsiliasi data.
Menjamin kepatuhan terhadap UU Ketenagakerjaan, BPJS Kesehatan, BPJS Ketenagakerjaan, pajak PPh21, dan regulasi lainnya.
Menjaga kerahasiaan data payroll dan menjadi penanggung jawab keamanan informasi gaji.
Melakukan evaluasi berkala terhadap struktur gaji, skema insentif, dan standar benefit.
Memastikan penyampaian payslip kepada karyawan secara tepat waktu.
Kami percaya bahwa SDM unggul, pelayanan responsif, dan semangat kolaboratif adalah kunci kesuksesan bersama.

page_content:
Posisi: Recruiter Specialist
Perusahaan: PT ODG Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Good communication skills, Negotiation skills, Relationship building with employees, Microsoft Word, Microsoft Excel, Microsoft PowerPoint, Basic computer literacy, Strong written communication in English, Strong verbal communication in English
Pengalaman: Minimum 2 years of experience in relevant field as HR Officer or Recruitment Officer, and in relevant industries like Contractor, MEP, Manufacture, Oil & Gas.
Pendidikan: Minimum graduated bachelor’s degrees in relevant major especially Psychology/ Management/ Law.
Tugas Utama: Carry out end-to-end recruitment and selection activities, collaborate with hiring managers, create and post job vacancies, source resumes, conduct initial screening interviews, coordinate interviews, administer tests and medical check-ups, provide candidates review reports, ensure new hire induction, prepare BPJS Kesehatan, update employment contracts, input employee data into HRIS, and perform other duties as directed by HR Manager.

metadata.original_description:
RESPONSIBILITIES AND DUTIES
Responsible to carry out end-to-end recruitment and selection activities to find new employees in accordance with the required qualification and quality.
Collaborate with hiring managers/users to identify manpower needs and job requirements.
Create and post the job vacancy on several social media and various recruitment platforms such as Linkedin, Glints, Jobstreet, Karir.com, etc. and optimize all the features to get prospective candidates.
Actively source resume/screen CV (Curriculum Vitae) and conduct initial screening interviews.
Coordinate and facilitate interview, invites candidate by phone or email for an interview with Manager/users and relevant stakeholders,
Administer or coordinate and schedule the test and medical check-up as needed.
Provide clear candidates review report and recommendation on 3-10 prospective candidate.
Ensure the new hire get employee induction and office facilities are ready to use to support the work activities such as but not limited to the availability of stationery office, desk, computer/laptop, etc.
Prepare the BPJS Kesehatan for a new employee, including any document for registration and assists co-workers to issue BPJS invoice payments that will be submitted to payroll, etc.
Prepare and update an employment contract, ME (Management Evaluation) to any related managers, employment form, and other administrative duties
Input the new employee’s data on the database system (HRIS) and archiving documents.
Any other reasonable duties as directed by the HR Manager and/or management within known
JOB SPECIFICATION
Minimum graduated bachelor’s degrees in relevant major especially Psychology/ Management/ Law.
Minimum 2 years of experience in relevant field as HR Officer or Recruitment Officer, and in relevant industries like Contractor, MEP, Manufacture, Oil & Gas.
Have good communication skills, negotiation skills, and be able in a relationship with employees.
Ability in using Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and other basic computer literacy to support the works.
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

metadata.original_description:
HR Project Specialist
is responsible for supporting and leading various HR projects and strategic initiatives within the Human Resources Department.
This position focuses on planning, coordination, and monitoring to ensure projects are executed effectively, on time, and aligned with company standards and objectives.
Key Responsibilities
Lead and manage HR projects from planning to execution, ensuring alignment with organizational goals.
Coordinate with cross-functional HR teams and other departments to achieve project objectives.
Develop project schedules, monitor progress, and ensure deliverables meet quality and timeline expectations.
Support the implementation and improvement of HR processes in areas such as recruitment, performance management, learning & development, and employee engagement.
Prepare project progress reports and communicate updates effectively to the HR Project Lead and relevant stakeholders.
Identify challenges, propose solutions, and ensure continuous improvement in project execution.
Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in
Human Resource Management, Psychology, or a related field
.
Minimum
5 years of experience
in HR project management, HR operations, or generalist roles.
Strong knowledge of
HR Generalist functions
(performance management, compensation & benefits, and employee relations).
Proven ability to
lead and manage multiple projects
simultaneously.
Excellent organizational, communication, and problem-solving skills.
Proficient in
Microsoft Office
(Excel, PowerPoint, Word).
Willing to travel for business purposes.

Perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang perkebunan dan pengelolaan kelapa sawit. Kami mencari kandidat yang memenuhi syarat untuk mengisi peran HRD Staff di kantor pusat kami yang terletak di Jakarta Pusat.

·         Membantu mengembangkan dan memperbaharui kebijakan  dan prosedur SDM sesuai dengan peraturan yang berlaku

Lamar sekarang dan bergabunglah dengan tim kami yang dinamis di PT Graha Jaya Pratama Kinerja'!

Perusahaan: Daewoong Bio Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: HR support, recruitment, onboarding, training, employee relations, compliance with labour laws, office administration, asset management, vendor coordination, employee benefits administration, event organization, communication skills, interpersonal skills, problem-solving skills, MS Office proficiency, HRIS proficiency
Pengalaman: Minimum 2 years of experience in a generalist HR role, with hands-on exposure to recruitment and general affairs responsibilities, preferably in a fast-paced environment
Pendidikan: Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
Tugas Utama: Providing end-to-end HR support, including recruitment, onboarding, training, and employee relations; handling recruitment processes; maintaining accurate employee records; supporting General Affairs functions; coordinating employee benefits and leave administration; organizing HR-related events; providing HR-related guidance and support.

metadata.original_description:
Company Introduction
Daewoong Bio Indonesia
, a part
of Daewoong Group
, is a
fast-growing
and
innovative player
in the
hospitality industry
. We are currently entering an
exciting phase of expansion
, preparing to launch several
groundbreaking projects
including
BLive Co-Living
,
BWork Canggu & Uluwatu Coworking Space
,
BVilla
, and
Munduk Smart Farm
. To ensure the
successful launch
and
smooth operation
of these major developments, we are seeking
dedicated
and
skilled professionals
to join our
growing team
.
Core Value
"Your growth is Daewoong Group's goal"
Daewoong Group prioritizes the growth of its employees and provides an environment where they can work autonomously and impressively.
Regardless of age/years of service/gender/nationality, we evaluate fairly/objectively/transparently based on their capabilities and performance and compensate reasonably to create a company where employees are the owners.
We believe that our work is meaningful only when the growth of our employees can lead to the growth of our customers and society (WIN-WIN-WIN).
We are waiting for your challenge to grow with Daewoong Group, where you have every opportunity to grow.
We are seeking for
Human Respurces Generalist position
to join our HR Team in Bali.
What You'll Be Doing:
Providing end-to-end HR support, including recruitment, onboarding, training, and employee relations
Handling recruitment processes, from job posting, candidate screening, to interview coordination and hiring documentation
Maintaining accurate employee records and ensuring compliance with relevant labour laws and regulations
Supporting General Affairs functions, such as office administration, asset management, and vendor coordination
Coordinating employee benefits and leave administration
Organising and facilitating HR-related events and activities
Providing HR-related guidance and support to managers and employees
What We're Looking For:
Minimum 2 years of experience in a generalist HR role, with hands-on exposure to recruitment and general affairs responsibilities, preferably in a fast-paced environment
Strong understanding of HR best practices and Indonesian labour laws
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact effectively at all levels of the organisation
Proficient in MS Office suite and HRIS - Great Day
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently as well as part of a team
Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
Recruitment Details:
Application > Aptitude Test > 1st Interview > 2nd Interview > Compensation Negotiation > Final On boarding

metadata.job_title: Summits Group Indonesia – HR Specialist (People & Operations Team)
metadata.original_description:
Tentang Perusahaan
Summits Group
adalah
K-Beauty & Medical Group
global berbasis di Korea,
yang saat ini mengoperasikan tiga brand di Indonesia:
MyVenus
— Layanan concierge bedah kecantikan & medis untuk pelanggan Indonesia
MyDerma
— Pengelolaan Banobagi Clinic Indonesia
MySkin
— Distribusi brand skincare Korea
Visi kami: “신뢰로 완성하는 아름다움 / Beauty, completed by trust.”
Trust the journey. Trust MyVenus.
Summits Group Indonesia, berbasis di
kantor pusat Jakarta
, mengelola secara terintegrasi fungsi Operasional, HR, Keuangan, dan Marketing di seluruh wilayah Indonesia.
Ringkasan Posisi (Position Summary)
HR Specialist memegang peran kunci yang menangani
rekrutmen, budaya organisasi, dan dukungan operasional
untuk seluruh tim
(MyVenus / MyDerma / MySkin)
di Summits Group Indonesia.
Bergabung dalam People Team dan bekerja langsung dengan
Head of Indonesia
serta
COO (Korea HQ)
untuk memimpin keseluruhan proses HR dan dukungan manajemen.
Tanggung Jawab Utama (Key Responsibilities)
1.
Rekrutmen & Onboarding
Melaksanakan rekrutmen lintas brand: MyVenus, MyDerma, MySkin
Mengunggah lowongan pada platform lokal (LinkedIn, JobStreet, Glints)
Menyaring CV dan mengatur jadwal wawancara dengan para team leader & manajemen
Menerbitkan offer letter dan mengelola penandatanganan kontrak kerja
Menjalankan orientasi karyawan baru (Onboarding)
2.
Operasional HR & General Affairs
Perhitungan payroll serta pengelolaan absensi, cuti, dan tunjangan perjalanan dinas
Perpanjangan kontrak karyawan sesuai musim/periode renewal
Pengadaan dan pemesanan perlengkapan/alat kerja yang diperlukan operasional
Pengelolaan dokumen administratif, kontrak, dan berkas biaya per brand
Komunikasi dengan HQ (Korea), tim akuntansi eksternal, dan instansi terkait
3.
Keterlibatan Karyawan (Employee Engagement)
Sesi check-in triwulanan (1:1) dan penyusunan laporan
Perencanaan event internal lintas tim/perusahaan: workshop, ulang tahun, apresiasi
Survei kepuasan karyawan dan eksekusi proyek perbaikan
Penguatan komunikasi antartim dan budaya komunikasi internal
Publikasi pengumuman penting untuk seluruh karyawan
Kualifikasi (Qualifications)
Latar pendidikan HR/Manajemen/Psikologi atau pengalaman relevan
Min. 2 tahun pengalaman di bidang HR atau General Affairs/Business Support
Wajib menguasai Bahasa Indonesia & Bahasa Inggris (Bahasa Korea menjadi nilai tambah)
Unggul dalam pengelolaan dokumen, penjadwalan, dan komunikasi
Sosok yang menyukai interaksi, berenergi positif, dan mampu membangun atmosfer tim yang hangat
Bertanggung jawab dan teliti dalam penyelesaian tugas
Diutamakan (Preferred)
Pengalaman di perusahaan multinasional atau asing
Pengalaman menjalankan event/workshop/perayaan internal
Pengalaman di startup atau organisasi dengan pertumbuhan cepat
Lingkungan Kerja & Benefit (What We Offer)
Peluang pengembangan karier di grup K-Beauty & Medical berskala global
Lingkungan kerja multikultural dengan kolaborasi HQ Korea & tim Indonesia
Benefit internal (treatment bedah/plastik, dermatologi, & beauty)
Program team dinner triwulanan & leadership workshop
