page_content:
Posisi: People & Culture Administrator (Alam Sutera)
Perusahaan: IKEA Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Excellent documentation skills, Data and computer literate, Intermediate knowledge in Ms. Office, Familiar with industry-related software, Well organized, Methodical problem solving
Pengalaman: Experience in administrative roles, particularly in HR functions.
Pendidikan: Not specified, but relevant experience in HR or related fields is implied.
Tugas Utama: Ensuring employee development, managing HR database and documents, processing claims and reimbursements, assisting People & Culture leaders, and supporting various functions as needed.

metadata.original_description:
Approach all your tasks as if you were six years old.
What you’ll be doing day to day:
Ensuring the personal and professional development of the organization’s personnel, which involves employee orientation, development and training as well as arranging the recruitment process.
Maintaining HR database including personnel records and managing HR documents such as managing the probation period, contract review, rotation & termination and maintaining co-worker's daily attendance, shift schedule, and working hour database system including annual leave and sick leave recap.
Doing HR administrative tasks while ensuring complete accuracy and confidentiality of the documents.
Processing the claim reimbursement & medical issues, coordinating the payment process to Finance team as well as communicating to HR vendor.
Assist People & Culture Leader and/or People & Culture Business Partner Manager and support any other different functions when needed.
We want you to be a person who:
Have excellent documentation skills obtained by holding administrative roles.
Data and computer literate, and able to manage filling/database system.
Having intermediate knowledge in operating Ms. Office, and familiar with any other software pertinent with current industry.
Well organized and methodical in your approach to problem solving.
As our store trades 7 days a week, you have the ability to work a mix of day. Also, you willing to work at Alam Sutera, Tangerang
As a person, you are passionate about people, business, and IKEA's purpose
, continuously driving better performance and
creating customer value. In addition, you are passionate about the food business and exploring new and innovative opportunities.

page_content:
Posisi: Senior HRD
Perusahaan: Good Dentist Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Recruitment & Talent Acquisition, Performance Management, Training & Development, HR Administration & Compliance, Employee Relations, HR Digitalization, Komunikatif, Disiplin, Kepemimpinan, Koordinasi Tim
Pengalaman: Pengalaman min. 5 tahun di HR, khususnya di industri healthcare/rumah sakit/klinik/klinik kecantikan/klinik gigi.
Pendidikan: Jurusan S1 Psikologi (Industrial)
Tugas Utama: Memimpin seluruh proses HR untuk mendukung operasional 15 cabang klinik, termasuk recruitment, training, performance management, administrasi HR, dan digitalisasi HR.

metadata.original_description:
🌟 SIAP MEMIMPIN FUNGSI HR UNTUK JARINGAN KLINIK GIGI NASIONAL? 🌟
GOOD - DENTIST adalah jaringan klinik gigi modern yang sedang berkembang pesat di berbagai kota di Indonesia dengan standar pelayanan premium, teknologi terbaru, serta komitmen pada kenyamanan dan keamanan pasien.
Kami membuka peluang bagi Anda yang berpengalaman di bidang Human Resources untuk bergabung dan memimpin pengelolaan SDM secara nasional sebagai
SENIOR HRD
MENGAPA BERGABUNG DENGAN GOOD - DENTIST?
• Mengelola HR untuk jaringan klinik gigi yang berkembang pesat
• Kesempatan menjadi bagian dari pengembangan healthcare modern di Indonesia
• Budaya kerja profesional, inovatif, dan kekeluargaan
• Terlibat dalam scale-up, HR digitalization & pengembangan SDM kesehatan
JOB SUMMARY:
Sebagai Senior HRD, Anda akan memimpin seluruh proses HR untuk mendukung operasional 15 cabang klinik GOOD - DENTIST di berbagai kota. Bertanggung jawab dalam recruitment, training, performance management, administrasi HR, dan digitalisasi HR.
JOB DESCRIPTION: Apa yang Akan Anda Lakukan?
🔹 Recruitment & Talent Acquisition
• Menentukan kebutuhan SDM klinik & non-klinik bersama manajemen
• Membuat job posting, screening CV, melakukan interview awal & koordinasi interview user
• Melakukan background check & reference check kandidat
• Mengembangkan database kandidat & talent pool khusus tenaga medis dan staff klinik
• Mengelola proses onboarding dan dokumentasi awal karyawan
🔹 Manajemen Tenaga Medis & Klinik
• Memastikan kebutuhan staff klinik (dokter gigi, perawat gigi, admin klinik) terpenuhi
• Koordinasi rotasi jadwal & distribusi tenaga medis sesuai kebutuhan operasional cabang agar tercapai efesiensi dan efektivitas operasional cabang.
• Monitoring sertifikasi tenaga medis (STR, SIP) dan masa berlaku dokumen
🔹 Performance Management & KPI
• Menyusun KPI untuk staff klinik dan tim support
• Monitoring pencapaian KPI cabang & individu
• Mengelola appraisal tahunan/semesteran dan feedback session
• Mendokumentasikan dan melaporkan hasil evaluasi kinerja
🔹 Training & Development
• Menyusun kebutuhan training untuk staff klinik & tim support
• Mengembangkan materi onboarding, SOP pelayanan & service excellence
• Menyelenggarakan pelatihan soft skills dan technical skill dasar untuk staff klinik
• Evaluasi efektivitas pelatihan & pelaporan hasil pelatihan
🔹 HR Administration & Compliance
• Mengelola kontrak kerja, perjanjian kerja sama dokter, PKWT/PKWTT
• Monitoring absensi, izin, cuti, disiplin kerja & katalog dokumen personalia
• Mengelola proses perpanjangan masa kontrak atau terminasi karyawan sesuai aturan
• Menangani proses Tunjangan Kesehatan & BPJS Ketenagakerjaan
• Mengawasi pemrosesan payroll (koordinasi dengan Finance)
🔹 Employee Relations & Company Culture
• Menangani keluhan dan kasus kedisiplinan dengan pendekatan profesional dan beretika
• Membangun budaya kerja yang positif, berintegritas dan disiplin
• Mengelola komunikasi internal & kedisiplinan operasional
• Mendukung kegiatan engagement internal
🔹 HR Digitalization
• Mengoptimalkan sistem HRIS (absensi, kontrak, performance, payroll)
• Menyiapkan laporan HR berbasis data untuk manajemen
• Mendorong implementasi proses HR digital di seluruh cabang
KUALIFIKASI:
·       Usia 35 – 45 tahun
•  Jurusan S1 Psikologi (Industrial)
·       Pengalaman min. 5 tahun di HR (berpengalama di industri healthcare/rumah sakit/klinik/klinik kecantikan/klinik drg)
• Menguasai UU Ketenagakerjaan, BPJS, dan administrasi personalia
• Mampu memimpin tim dan koordinasi dengan banyak cabang
• Komunikatif, disiplin, dan mampu bekerja berbasis target
• Siap melakukan perjalanan dinas antar cabang jika diperlukan
• Terbiasa menggunakan HRIS atau sistem digital HR
Penawaran Kami:
·       Take home pay : Rp8.000.000 – Rp10.000.000 (sesuai pengalaman)
·       Tunjangan Kesehatan & BPJS Ketenagakerjaan
·       Kesempatan pengembangan karier di healthcare industry
·       Pelatihan sistem HR modern
·       Lingkungan kerja suportif & opportunity scale-up
KUNJUNGI KAMI DI
Instagram = gooddentist.indonesia
Tiktok = gooddentist.indo
Website = www.gooddentist.id

metadata.original_description:
About the role
This is an exciting opportunity to join PT Syaqua Indonesia as an HR Officer. As part of the HR team, you will play a key role in supporting the company's human resources operations and contributing to the overall success of the organisation. Reporting to the HR Manager, this full-time position is based in Aceh.
What you'll be doing
Assist with the recruitment and onboarding of new employees, including coordinating interviews, drafting offer letters, and managing the onboarding process
Maintain accurate and up-to-date employee records and files
Administer HR-related policies, procedures, and processes, ensuring compliance with relevant regulations
Provide support to employees on HR-related queries and issues
Assist with the planning and coordination of employee training and development programs
Contribute to the development and implementation of HR initiatives and projects
Collaborate with other departments to ensure a seamless HR service delivery
What we're looking for
A minimum of 2-3 years of experience in a similar HR Officer or HR Assistant role
Strong administrative and organisational skills, with the ability to multitask and prioritize effectively
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact with employees at all levels
Proficient in HR-related software and systems, such as HRIS and payroll management tools
Demonstrated problem-solving and analytical skills
A keen eye for detail and a commitment to maintaining accurate records
A team player with a positive attitude and a willingness to learn
What we offer
At PT SyAqua Indonesia, we are committed to providing a supportive and rewarding work environment for our employees. Some of the key benefits you can expect include:
- Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses
- Comprehensive health and life insurance coverage
- Generous leave entitlements, including annual leave, sick leave, and parental leave
- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement
- A collaborative and inclusive company culture that values teamwork and work-life balance
About us
PT SyAqua Indonesia is a leading provider of integrated aquaculture solutions in the region. With a strong focus on sustainability and innovation, we are dedicated to driving the growth and development of the aquaculture industry. Our talented team of professionals is committed to excellence and strives to create value for our customers, stakeholders, and the communities in which we operate.
If you are excited about this opportunity and believe you have the skills and experience to excel in this role, we encourage you to apply now.

metadata.original_description:
Are you a passionate financial analyst with a strategic mindset? Do you want to be at the heart of a company's growth, turning data into decisions and ideas into tangible projects?
We are seeking a highly motivated Corporate Business Development Analyst to join our dynamic team. This unique hybrid role combines three key pillars: Corporate Finance, Business Development, and Project Management. You will be a key player in driving our company's expansion by identifying new opportunities, supporting strategic financial decisions, and ensuring flawless execution of key initiatives.
KEY OF RESPONSIBILITIES
Corporate Finance
Develop, maintain, and refine complex financial models to support critical business decisions, including valuations, mergers & acquisitions (M&A), capital budgeting, and long-range strategic forecasting.
Conduct thorough analysis of financial performance, including variance analysis, trend identification, and industry benchmarking, to provide actionable insights into the company's financial health.
Assist in the preparation of high-impact materials for the Board of Directors, investors, and senior management, translating complex financial data into clear presentations and executive summaries.
Perform rigorous financial due diligence on potential investment or acquisition targets to assess risks, validate assumptions, and support strategic investment decisions.
Business Development
Proactively identify, source, and evaluate new market opportunities, potential partnerships, and strategic alliances that align with the company's growth objectives.
Conduct comprehensive market research and competitive analysis to identify key industry trends and inform business strategy.
Prepare compelling business cases and detailed proposals for new ventures, complete with market sizing, robust financial projections, and thorough risk assessments.
Support the entire deal lifecycle, from initial screening and financial modeling to participating in negotiations and planning for successful post-deal integration.
Project Management & Execution (PMO)
Develop and manage detailed project plans, establishing clear timelines, key milestones, and resource allocation for strategic initiatives.
Track project progress against key performance indicators, identify potential risks, and proactively develop effective mitigation strategies to keep initiatives on track.
Act as a central point of coordination for cross-functional teams (Legal, IT, Operations, etc.) to ensure seamless alignment and timely execution of all project deliverables.
QUALIFICATIONS
Education: Bachelor's degree from a highly reputable university in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or a related field.
Experience: 2-4 years of relevant experience in corporate finance, investment banking, consulting, or public accounting (preferably from a Big Four firm). PMO experience is highly desirable.
Technical Skills: Advanced proficiency in MS Excel (financial modeling) & PowerPoint. Strong understanding of financial statement analysis.
Analytical Skills: Exceptional quantitative and qualitative analytical skills with keen attention to detail.
Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present complex information clearly.

Pengalaman: 3–5 years of experience in FP&A, Business Analysis, or Finance—preferably in healthcare, IVF, or hospital industries.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Management, or related fields.
Tugas Utama: Manage, monitor, and analyze the financial performance of all IVF business units, ensuring alignment with company targets. Provide strategic financial insights to support decision-making, improve profitability, and drive operational efficiency across clinics.

metadata.original_description:
Role Purpose
To manage, monitor, and analyze the financial performance of all IVF business units, ensuring alignment with company targets. This role provides strategic financial insights to the Deputy CEO to support decision-making, improve profitability, and drive operational efficiency across clinics.
Key Responsibilities
1. Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A)
- Develop, coordinate, and control the budgeting and forecasting process for all IVF units.
- Conduct variance analysis (budget vs actual) and recommend corrective actions.
- Ensure each clinic/unit has clear, measurable, and realistic financial targets.
2. Performance Monitoring
- Track key financial KPIs such as revenue per cycle, cost per cycle, gross margin per treatment, occupancy rate, and clinic profitability.
- Prepare weekly, monthly, and quarterly financial performance reports for the Deputy CEO.
- Identify performance gaps and propose effective action plans.
3. Business Partnering with Clinic Operations
- Collaborate with Clinic and Operations teams to understand cost and revenue drivers.
- Provide insights on operational efficiency, doctor/embryologist utilization, and treatment performance.
- Develop cost analysis models for new services, packages, and expansion initiatives.
4. Financial Modeling & Investment Analysis
- Build financial models and projections (ROI, NPV, IRR) for new clinic openings, equipment purchases, or partnerships.
- Present findings and strategic recommendations to the Deputy CEO.
5. Cost Control & Productivity Optimization
- Identify cost inefficiencies (reagents, media, medical supplies, laboratory operations).
- Oversee the implementation of cost-saving initiatives without compromising service quality or clinical outcomes.
- Conduct cost benchmarking across clinics to evaluate efficiency levels.
6. Risk Management & Compliance
- Ensure financial reporting accuracy and compliance with internal policies.
- Identify financial risks that may impact clinic profitability and propose mitigation actions.
7. Strategic Reporting to Deputy CEO
- Develop comprehensive and actionable financial dashboards.
- Provide data-driven strategic recommendations to enhance profitability and business growth.
- Act as a key analytical partner for the Deputy CEO in strategic planning and execution.
Qualifications
- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Management, or related fields.
- 3–5 years of experience in FP&A, Business Analysis, or Finance—preferably in healthcare, IVF, or hospital industries.
- Strong financial analysis skills and understanding of IVF cost structures.
- Proficient in financial modeling and dashboard creation (Excel/BI Tools).
- Detail-oriented, analytical, and able to work under tight deadlines.
- Strong communication skills and ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders, including executive levels.
- Must be fluent in english.
Competencies
- Strategic thinking
- Financial analytics & modeling
- Business and industry acumen (healthcare/IVF)
- Communication & stakeholder management
- Problem solving & continuous improvement

metadata.original_description:
About the role
PT Delonix Group Indonesia is a hotel management business, is seeking a highly skilled Finance Analyst (Mandarin Speaker) to join our dynamic team in West Jakarta. This full-time position is a crucial role within our organisation, responsible for providing strategic financial analysis and reporting to support the company's growth and decision-making processes.
What you'll be doing
Conduct comprehensive financial analysis and reporting, identifying trends, insights and opportunities to drive business performance
Prepare monthly, quarterly and annual financial reports, including income statements, balance sheets and cash flow statements
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to interpret financial data and provide recommendations to support strategic decision-making
Perform variance analysis, identifying and investigating any significant deviations from budgets and forecasts
Support the development and refinement of financial models, forecasts and budgets
Assist with the month-end close process, ensuring accuracy and timeliness of financial reporting
Contribute to the enhancement of financial processes and controls to improve efficiency and transparency
What we're looking for
Degree in Finance, Accounting or a related field
Minimum 3 years of experience in a finance analyst or similar role, preferably within the accounting and analysis industry
Proficient in Mandarin
and English, both written and verbal
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to interpret complex financial data
Excellent attention to detail and a commitment to ensuring the accuracy and integrity of financial information
Proficient in using financial software and tools, such as Excel, accounting software and reporting systems
A collaborative mindset, with the ability to work effectively as part of a team and liaise with stakeholders at all levels
Familiar with NCC system will be an advantage
What we offer
At PT Delonix Group Indonesia, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work environment. You can expect a competitive salary, comprehensive benefits package, and opportunities for professional development and career advancement. We also prioritise work-life balance and a range of health and wellbeing initiatives to support our team.
About us
PT Delonix Group Indonesia is a hotel management business. With a strong focus on innovation and customer satisfaction. Our team of passionate and talented professionals is dedicated to driving the success of our organisation and our clients.
Apply now to join our team and be a part of our continued growth and success.

metadata.original_description:
Jobdesk :
Membuat Susunan rencana proyek (project plan) mulai dari penjadwalan, pembagian tugas, dan pengumpulan kebutuhan dari user atau stakeholder, meliputi :
standar metodologi manajemen proyek diterapkan dengan benar (Waterfall/Agile).
mengkoordinasikan kebutuhan teknis dengan tim internal IT, vendor, dan user agar proyek berjalan sesuai rencana.
Melakukan monitoring harian, mingguan dan bulanan terhadap progres proyek dan memastikan setiap aktivitas tercatat dalam laporan perkembangan proyek, meliputi :
Menyiapkan dokumentasi proyek seperti notulen rapat, risk & issue log, change request, serta laporan status proyek untuk atasan atau manajemen.
mengidentifikasi risiko atau kendala yang muncul selama proyek dan mengeskalasinya kepada Project Manager
Mengumpulkan data terkait KPI proyek, menyusun laporan evaluasi, dan mengarsipkan seluruh dokumentasi secara terstruktur.
Mendukung pelaksanaan UAT (User Acceptance Test) dengan mempersiapkan skenario, jadwal, dan dokumentasi hasil pengujian
Memastikan Project selesai dan Live production tepat waktu ( BAST ).

- Minimal pendidikan S1 Sistem Informasi, Teknik Informatika, Ilmu Komputer, atau bidang terkait.
- Pengalaman kerja 1–2 tahun di bidang PMO, Project Admin, Business Analyst, IT Support Project, atau posisi serupa. Fresh graduate dipertimbangkan jika memiliki pengalaman magang relevan.
- Memahami konsep dasar project management serta familiar dengan Agile dan Waterfall.
- Terbiasa membuat dokumentasi, laporan, dan notulen dengan rapi serta mampu mengorganisir data dengan baik.
- Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan koordinasi yang baik, serta mampu bekerja dalam tim lintas departemen.
- Teliti, proaktif, terstruktur, dan mampu bekerja dengan supervisi minimal.
- Mampu mengelola waktu dan menangani beberapa tugas atau proyek secara parallel

Pengalaman: 5+ years of experience in finance roles, with at least 2 years in financial analysis.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or a related field.

metadata.original_description:
About The Role
This role will act as a strategic advisor to business units by providing financial insights, driving performance, and enabling data-driven decision-making. The Finance Business Partner will collaborate closely with commercial, supply chain, and marketing teams to align financial strategies with business goals.
Strategic Financial Planning
Partner with business leaders to develop financial plans, forecasts, and budgets aligned with strategic objectives.
Provide financial modeling and scenario analysis to support business cases and investment decisions.
Performance Management
Monitor key financial and operational metrics across departments.
Analyze variances and trends, and recommend actions to improve profitability and efficiency.
Lead monthly business reviews with functional heads.
Business Partnering
Serve as the finance liaison for commercial, marketing, and supply chain teams.
Translate financial data into actionable insights for non-finance stakeholders.
Support pricing strategies, product launches, and promotional planning with financial analysis.
Cost Optimization & ROI Analysis
Identify cost-saving opportunities and efficiency improvements across functions.
Conduct ROI analysis for marketing campaigns, trade investments, and capital expenditures.
SAP & Data Analytics
Utilize SAP to extract and analyze financial data.
Collaborate with IT and finance teams to enhance reporting tools and dashboards.
Governance & Compliance
Ensure adherence to internal controls, financial policies, and regulatory requirements.
Support internal and external audits with relevant documentation and analysis.
Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or a related field.
5+ years of experience in finance roles, with at least 2 years in a financial analysis.
Strong commercial acumen and ability to influence cross-functional teams.
Advanced proficiency in SAP and Excel; experience with BI tools is a plus.
Excellent communication, analytical, and stakeholder management skills.
Fluent in English

Perusahaan: PT. Wide Technologies Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Business analysis, Trade finance knowledge, Process mapping, Gap analysis, Stakeholder management, System implementation, User acceptance testing (UAT), Regulatory compliance, Training and support, Project documentation, Agile methodology, Waterfall methodology, Data analysis, Reporting tools
Pengalaman: 3–7 years of experience in trade finance, business analysis, or banking systems projects.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Information Systems, Business Administration, or related field.
Tugas Utama: Gather, analyze, and document business and system requirements for trade finance processes; translate business needs into functional specifications; support implementation, testing, and rollout of trade finance systems; conduct process mapping and gap analysis; liaise with stakeholders; monitor system performance and propose improvements; support regulatory initiatives; prepare training materials and provide user support; maintain project documentation and reporting; keep abreast of trade finance trends.

metadata.original_description:
The Trade Finance Business Analyst acts as a key liaison between the business and technology teams.
They analyze business processes, identify improvement opportunities, document system requirements, and support the design and implementation of trade finance solutions — ensuring alignment with regulatory requirements, operational efficiency, and customer needs.
This role plays a crucial part in digitizing trade finance, enhancing workflow automation, and ensuring that trade finance systems meet business objectives.
Key Responsibilities:
Gather, analyze, and document business and system requirements for trade finance processes.
Translate business needs into functional specifications for IT development or system vendors.
Support implementation, testing (UAT), and rollout of trade finance systems or upgrades.
Conduct process mapping and gap analysis for trade finance products (letters of credit, collections, guarantees, supply chain finance, etc.).
Liaise with stakeholders (operations, compliance, front office, IT, and vendors) to ensure end-to-end alignment.
Monitor and evaluate system performance and propose process improvements.
Support regulatory and compliance initiatives (e.g., Basel III, AML, sanctions, trade-based money laundering).
Prepare training materials and provide user support during and after system implementation.
Maintain comprehensive project documentation and reporting for management.
Keep abreast of trade finance trends, digital trade initiatives (e.g., blockchain, eBL, ICC DSI), and market innovations.
Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Information Systems, Business Administration, or related field.
3–7 years of experience in trade finance, business analysis, or banking systems projects.
Strong understanding of trade finance products — letters of credit, guarantees, collections, supply chain finance.
Proven experience with trade finance systems (e.g., Misys/Fusion, Surecomp, Finacle, Eximbills, or Temenos).
Experience working in Agile or Waterfall project environments.
Exposure to data analysis, reporting tools, or business process re-engineering is a plus.
Preferred Certifications (Optional):
CDCS (Certified Documentary Credit Specialist)
CITF (Certificate in International Trade and Finance)

metadata.original_description:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!
‎
‎
Job Description
Finance Analysts at Traveloka play a pivotal role in streamlining business processes across Product, Finance, and Accounting, ensuring seamless integration of new products and features into financial workflows and recordings.
They are expected to be able to apply their expertise in accounting and core financial principles and practices to a variety of responsible financial, accounting, and/or fiscal functions. They will be collaborating closely with various stakeholders from various departments and backgrounds, such as business analysts, software engineers, product team, finance team, and other stakeholders to identify finance requirements and impacts of each initiative; also drive the process improvement to enhance efficiency.
Finance Analysts at Traveloka are considered as the strategic minds behind the business process.
Their work will often be project-based,  involving impact analysis, requirements gathering, and looking over and proposing data modeling, reporting, and financial analysis to integrate our products with our finance tools
Additionally, they will also play a key role in ensuring the accuracy and completeness of reporting data, particularly during the critical Accounting Month-End Closing process. Their efforts will directly contribute to reliable financial reporting and the company’s overall success.
‎
Requirements
Bachelor Degree from a top/reputable University in Finance, Accounting, Information Technology, or Information System.
At least 2-3 years experience in finance or accounting related fields.
Experienced and exposed with a technology company, startup, consulting, or accounting firm  desired.
Experienced with Accounting, Treasury, Tax or ERP system, which could include Anaplan, Oracle, SAP, or similar.
Knowledgeable financial reporting and accounting practices.
Experience in analyzing financial data desired.
Experience with financial audits desired.
Project-based work experience desired.
System implementation experience desired.
Have basic understanding in common technology for custom and packaged applications
​
Additional Requirements
Have working experience from top-tier IT/Finance/Big 4 consulting firms in the area of advisory/management consultants, technology companies, and other relevant industries.
Have experience in business process improvement.
‎
If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!

metadata.original_description:
We’re Hiring: Senior Financial Planning & Analyst Specialist
We are looking for a highly analytical and detail-oriented Senior Financial Planning & Analyst Specialist to join our team. This role is pivotal in driving financial performance, forecasting accuracy, and providing insights to support strategic decision-making across all business units.
Key Responsibilities :
- Conduct quantitative financial analysis to define and assess the company’s financial situation.
- Evaluate multiple business plans by analyzing expected outcomes and potential returns.
- Build and maintain robust financial databases from SAP, Accurate and Business Planning and Consolidation systems.
- Prepare, analyze, and explain financial reports using Business Warehouse - Order Load and Billing System and Business Planning and Consolidation reporting tools.
- Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) — revenue, cost of sales, expenses, and capex — highlighting trends and variances.
- Lead and manage the budgeting, forecasting, and operating planning process.
- Provide accurate and timely ad-hoc analysis and recommendations to senior management.
- Support board-level presentations and business strategy reviews.
- Ensure confidentiality and accuracy in all financial data management processes.
- Develop and improve business process tools and performance dashboards.
- Analyze trade and marketing investment effectiveness and provide actionable insights.
- Collaborate effectively with multiple stakeholders across departments.
Qualifications :
- Minimum of 8 years’ experience in Financial Planning & Analysis, preferably in a retail, FMCG, or multinational environment.
- Strong knowledge of SAP, Accurate, and advanced Excel or financial modeling tools.
- Proven experience in budgeting, forecasting, and financial reporting.
- Exceptional analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
- High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple priorities under tight deadlines.
- Strategic thinker with strong business acumen.
Interested candidates are required to fill out the recruitment form before being processed by our HR team:
hr.osa.id/finance-manager
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage.
Join us and be part of a forward-thinking finance team driving business excellence!

metadata.original_description:
VENTENY
is a Technological Based Company Focuses developing a platform with a wide range of services to empower business and to enrich people’s living around the world.
VENTENY
accommodates the needs of companies while providing a positive impact on public life in the world through its Multi-Layer Services. We serve our customers with care, respect, and strong commitment. Serving our customers since 2015,
VENTENY
has strived to be the market leader in this industry.
Job Description
Building and maintaining strong relationships with funding sources, including financial institutions, investors, and other relevant stakeholders.
Given current partners mostly are Banks (KBMI 1-4) and non-Banks (e.g. multifinance), you will be required to demonstrate strong relationship management skills, and is grounded in legal and business processes.
In charge of managing end to end interaction with existing and new bank partners and other channeling/executing partners to secure bigger disbursement volume.
Monitor and ensure that the investment process is carried out in accordance with the provisions and properly and correctly documented.
Preparing reports on funding activities and financial performance for internal and external stakeholders.
Create/compile reports for local and regional, including those related to investment meetings (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly & quarterly) for internal and external parties.
Perform detailed financial modelling and analysis to assess the viability of investment projects.
Support fundraising and co-investment initiatives by developing pitch materials, financial projections, and responding to investor due diligence.
Creating and managing budgets, financial reports, and forecasts to track funding and expenditures.
Qualifications
Bachelor's Degree in Finance/Accounting/Management, or related field; MBA is a plus.
Minimum 10 years of experience working in the financial industry such as capital markets, insurance or banking, especially in the investment area.
Proven track record in handling channeling and or executing transaction structure with Banks/financial institutions.
Deep understanding of capital markets, including but not limited to the spectrum of equity management, bond and fixed income management, portfolio management, macroeconomics, qualitative analysis and valuation.
Collaborate with legal, tax, technical, and development teams to validate key assumptions and ensure alignment across functions.
Understanding and managing risk is a crucial aspect of fund management.
Strong time management skills are necessary to handle multiple tasks and deadlines.
Able to work comfortably in a fast-paces environment.
Why Join VENTENY
This is a place for those looking for challenges, learning and fast growth.
You will experience the start-up environment in a high growth environment.
You can expand your career and self-development.
We offer a supportive and encouraging environment that puts the emphasis on teamwork.

metadata.job_title: Senior Product Finance Analyst - Invoicing & Collection
metadata.original_description:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!
‎
‎
Job Description
We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Senior Product Finance Analyst - Billing & Collection to manage and optimize Traveloka's accounts receivable processes. This role will be crucial in ensuring timely collections, accurate financial reporting, and the continuous improvement of our AR operations.
Job Responsibilities
Manage the end-to-end accounts receivable process, including invoicing, collections, cash application, and reconciliation for a high volume of transactions.
Monitor aging reports and proactively identify overdue accounts, implementing effective collection strategies to minimize outstanding balances.
Communicate directly with clients to resolve billing discrepancies, payment issues, and provide excellent customer service while maintaining strong relationships.
Prepare and analyze various accounts receivable reports, providing insights and recommendations to management on collection performance and potential risks.
Collaborate closely with sales, product operations, and finance teams to ensure accurate billing and smooth resolution of AR-related queries.
Identify opportunities for process improvements and automation within the AR function to enhance efficiency and accuracy.
Assist with month-end and year-end closing activities, ensuring accurate and timely reconciliation of accounts receivable balances.
Ensure compliance with company policies, accounting standards (e.g., PSAK/IFRS), and relevant regulations.
Mentor and provide guidance to junior team members within the accounts receivable department.
‎
Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Accounting or Finance, from top local or overseas university with min GPA 3.0 on a 4.0 scale.
Minimum of 4 years of progressive experience in accounts receivable, preferably within a fast-paced technology company or big 4 Audit Firms.
Proven track record of successfully managing large volumes of accounts and achieving collection targets.
Strong understanding of accounting principles, particularly related to accounts receivable and revenue recognition.
Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., SAP, Oracle, NetSuite) and advanced Microsoft Excel skills.
Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact effectively with internal and external stakeholders.
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, with a keen eye for detail.
Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and manage multiple deadlines in a dynamic environment.
Fluency in Bahasa Indonesia and English, both written and verbal.
‎
If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!

metadata.original_description:
We are seeking a skilled Commercial Finance Analyst to support decision-making and drive business performance in the FMCG industry. This role is based in Indonesia and requires expertise in financial analysis and a strong understanding of the accounting and finance function.
Client Details
This company is a well-established organisation in the FMCG industry, with a significant presence in Indonesia. They are recognised for their market-leading products and commitment to excellence within the accounting and finance space.
Description
As a Commercial Finance Analyst, your main responsibilities will include:
Conducting financial analysis to support strategic business decisions.
Preparing and managing budgets and forecasts to ensure alignment with company goals.
Analysing financial data to identify trends and provide actionable insights.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to enhance financial performance.
Evaluating business opportunities and providing recommendations to optimise profitability.
Monitoring key performance indicators and preparing detailed reports for stakeholders.
Ensuring compliance with financial regulations and internal policies.
Supporting the preparation of presentations for senior management and board meetings.
Profile
A successful Commercial Finance Analyst should have:
A degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Proficiency in financial modelling and data analysis tools.
Sound knowledge of accounting principles and financial regulations.
Excellent communication and presentation skills.
Ability to work collaboratively with diverse teams.
Attention to detail and a proactive approach to tasks.
Job Offer
Competitive benefits package.
Chance to work within a leading organisation in the FMCG industry in Indonesia.
To apply online please click the 'Apply' button below. For a confidential discussion about this role please contact Esther Rambe on
+62 21 2958 8841

Primary Job Role:
The Credit Analyst Staff is responsible for analyzing and evaluating the creditworthiness of potential borrowers, as well as monitoring the creditworthiness of existing borrowers. The ideal candidate should be highly analytical, detail-oriented, and possess strong communication skills.
Job Description:
Analyze credit data and financial statements to determine the degree of risk involved in lending money to borrowers.
Prepare credit reports summarizing findings and making recommendations for approval or denial of credit applications.
Monitor existing credit facilities and conduct periodic reviews to ensure continued creditworthiness.
Collaborate with the Credit Analyst Leader to develop and implement credit policies and procedures.
Identify trends and patterns in credit data to develop insights and inform decision-making.
Maintain accurate and up-to-date credit files and databases.

Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related field.
At least 2 years of experience in credit analysis or related fields.
Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.
Proficiency in financial modeling and data analysis.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

dan analisis finansial maupun komersial.

page_content:
Posisi: Operational Business Analyst
Perusahaan: Cartrack Technologies Indonesia
Skill Dibutuhkan: Data analysis, Process mapping, Problem-solving methodologies, Stakeholder collaboration, Performance monitoring, Documentation, Communication skills, Teamwork, Numerical skills, Analytical skills
Pengalaman: Experience with data analysis tools and working with large datasets is a significant advantage.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s degree from a reputable university in Engineering, Business, Economics, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related quantitative field.
Tugas Utama: Conduct thorough analyses of existing operational processes, collect and analyze operational data, develop and propose innovative solutions, tackle complex operational challenges, work closely with cross-functional teams, develop and track key performance indicators, and create and maintain documentation.

metadata.original_description:
We are a world-leading smart mobility SaaS company with over 2,300,000 subscribers across 23 countries and we are looking for a Operational Business Analyst to join our team. You will be the engine for continuous improvement within our operations. You will dive deep into our business processes, use data to uncover hidden opportunities, and design solutions that enhance efficiency, reduce costs, and improve service delivery. You will be a critical link between operational teams and management, turning insights into action.
Key Job Descriptions:
Process Analysis & Mapping:
Conduct thorough analyses of existing operational processes to identify bottlenecks, inefficiencies, and areas for improvement.
Data-Driven Insights:
Collect, analyze, and interpret operational data (e.g., performance metrics, productivity rates, cost data) to generate actionable insights and support decision-making.
Solution Design & Implementation:
Develop and propose innovative solutions, workflows, and strategies to optimize operations. Lead or co-lead the implementation of these changes.
Problem Solving:
Tackle complex operational challenges head-on, using structured problem-solving methodologies to diagnose issues and implement effective fixes.
Stakeholder Collaboration:
Work closely with cross-functional teams (including Sales, Customer Service, Technology, and Field Operations) to gather requirements, align on goals, and ensure smooth adoption of new processes.
Performance Monitoring:
Develop and track key performance indicators (KPIs) and dashboards to monitor the effectiveness of implemented changes and report on progress to stakeholders.
Documentation:
Create and maintain clear and concise documentation for all processes, procedures, and project plans.
Qualifications & What We're Looking For:
Educational Background:
Bachelor’s degree from a reputable university in Engineering, Business, Economics, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related quantitative field.
A Problem Solver at Heart:
You have a natural curiosity and a proven ability to break down complex problems into manageable parts and develop practical solutions.
Numerical & Analytical Prowess:
You are highly skilled in mathematics and working with numbers. Strong analytical skills with the ability to work with large datasets are essential. Experience with data analysis tools is a significant advantage.
Excellent Energy & Dynamic Attitude:
We are looking for someone with a positive, can-do attitude, who is proactive, agile, and excited to take on new challenges in a fast-paced environment.
ENGLISH IS A MUST:
Full professional proficiency in English, both written and verbal, is mandatory for regional reporting and communication.
Communication Skills:
Exceptional interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to explain complex concepts clearly and persuasively to diverse audiences.
Team Player:
A collaborative spirit with the ability to build strong relationships and work effectively within a team.

Maintain high standards of data integrity and financial governance across both business units.

Skills & Competencies

Posisi: Senior Finance & Investment Manager
Perusahaan: Haven Foods
Skill Dibutuhkan: corporate finance, investment planning, trade finance, foreign exchange management, financial modeling, capital budgeting, risk analysis, excellent communication, leadership skills, strategic thinking, commercial acumen
Pengalaman: Minimum 5-8 years of experience in corporate finance, investment management, or trade finance, ideally within seafood export, agribusiness, or manufacturing sectors.
Pendidikan: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field. Professional certifications such as CFA, CPA, or MBA preferred.
Tugas Utama: Develop and implement financial strategies for export operations, manage investment portfolios, lead financial planning and analysis, maintain banking relationships, oversee cash flow and working capital management, monitor foreign exchange exposure, conduct financial modeling and investment analysis, provide management insights on shrimp pricing and market performance, ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulations, collaborate on capital allocation and strategic planning.

metadata.original_description:
Position Overview
We are seeking an experienced
Senior Finance & Investment Manager
to lead the financial strategy and investment management for our shrimp export operations. This role will be responsible for ensuring financial stability, optimizing capital allocation, and managing banking and institutional relationships that support global trade and business expansion.
The ideal candidate will possess strong expertise in
corporate finance, investment planning, trade finance, and foreign exchange management
, with a clear understanding of the operational and capital dynamics within the seafood export industry.
Key Responsibilities
Develop and implement
financial strategies
that support export operations, business growth, and long-term profitability.
Manage and monitor the company’s
investment portfolios
, including working capital instruments, capital projects, and financial reserves.
Lead
financial planning and analysis (FP&A)
— including budgeting, forecasting, and variance reporting.
Maintain and strengthen
relationships with banks, financial institutions, and export financing agencies
to secure trade finance facilities, letters of credit, and funding for expansion.
Oversee
cash flow, liquidity, and working capital management
, ensuring efficient allocation of resources across procurement, processing, and export activities.
Monitor and manage
foreign exchange exposure
and implement effective risk mitigation strategies.
Conduct
financial modeling and investment analysis
for infrastructure or capacity expansion projects, such as processing plants, cold storage, or logistics improvements.
Provide management with actionable insights on
global shrimp pricing trends, export market performance, and financial risks
.
Ensure compliance with
accounting standards, tax obligations, export regulations, and internal control procedures
.
Collaborate with executive leadership on
capital allocation, financial forecasting, and long-term strategic planning
.
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field.
Professional certifications such as
CFA, CPA, or MBA
preferred.
Minimum
5-8 years of experience
in corporate finance, investment management, or trade finance, ideally within seafood export, agribusiness, or manufacturing sectors.
Strong understanding of
export financing mechanisms
,
letters of credit
, and
foreign exchange management
.
Proven ability to
manage banking relationships
and negotiate financial arrangements that support international operations.
Proficient in
financial modeling, capital budgeting, and risk analysis
.
Excellent communication and leadership skills with the ability to work cross-functionally and present financial insights to senior management.
High integrity, strategic thinking, and strong commercial acumen.
What We Offer
Competitive compensation package based on experience and qualifications.
A strategic leadership role with direct impact on financial decision-making and corporate growth.
Opportunity to contribute to a globally oriented business with a focus on sustainable seafood exports.
A collaborative, performance-driven environment that values innovation, transparency, and accountability.

Posisi: Treasury Operations Analyst
Perusahaan: PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk
Skill Dibutuhkan: Cash management, Bank reconciliation, Intercompany funding management, FX transactions, Short-term investments, Treasury documentation compliance, Treasury reporting, Process improvement, Communication skills, Writing skills, Stakeholder management, Microsoft Office proficiency, SAP ERP knowledge
Pengalaman: At least 5 years of full time work experience in relevant finance areas especially in treasury operations
Pendidikan: At least a bachelor’s degree in accountancy/finance. Additional qualifications such as CIMA, CPA, and/or international CPA would be an advantage
Tugas Utama: Execute daily treasury operations including payments, monitoring of bank balances and daily cash forecasting, manage daily bank reconciliation, assist in managing intercompany funding, FX transactions, and short-term investments, maintain treasury documentation, coordinate with banks and internal stakeholders, support treasury reporting and month-end closing activities, participate in system enhancements and automation initiatives, contribute to treasury-related projects and process improvement efforts.

metadata.original_description:
Chandra Asri Group, through its subsidiary
PT Chandra Asri Sentral Solusi (CASS)
, has established a
Shared Service Center (SSC)
to enhance operational efficiency and support the business growth of its subsidiaries. From finance and HR to procurement, customer operations, and IT, our SSC is the backbone that keeps businesses running smoothly. One of our key areas of support is for
Aster Chemicals & Energy (ACE),
a leading chemical and energy solutions provider in Singapore and the Asia Pacific. ACE combines the legacy of Singapore’s first oil refinery with cutting-edge petrochemical operations, jointly owned by Chandra Asri Group and
Glencore
, one of the world’s largest natural resource companies.
PURPOSE:
The Treasury Operations Analyst supports ACE’s treasury operations by executing cash management activities and ensuring compliance with internal controls and regulatory requirements. This role plays a key part in optimizing liquidity, supporting trade finance, and enabling efficient treasury processes across ACE and its affiliated entities
ACCOUNTABILITIES:
Execute daily treasury operations including payments, monitoring of bank balances and daily cash forecasting to ensure accurate liquidity forecast to enable optimization of investments and borrowings.
Manage daily bank reconciliation to ensure no fradulent activities, all transactional cash flows are properly accounted for and bank charges are appropriate
Assist in managing intercompany funding, FX transactions, and short-term investments
Maintain treasury documentation and ensure compliance with internal controls and regulatory requirements
Coordinate with banks and internal stakeholders to ensure smooth execution of treasury processes
Support treasury reporting and month-end closing activities
Participate in system enhancements and automation initiatives (e.g., SAP S4 HANA)
Contribute to treasury-related projects and process improvement efforts
SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS:
At least a bachelor’s degree in accountancy/finance. Additional qualifications such as CIMA, CPA, and/or international CPA would be an advantage
At least 5 years of full time work experience in relevant finance areas especially in treasury operations
Familiarity with trade finance instruments and banking platforms
Proficient in English, especially business level of conversation.
Possess a collaborative mindset and good level of interpersonal skillset specifically in communication and writing skill
Ability to demonstrate strategic thought processes to be able to design and implement change management initiatives that may include digitalization of financial performance management
Resilient in change management and strong stakeholder management skills
Exhibits strong integrity, teamwork and trust attributes
Proficiency in Microsoft office suites applications. Experience and knowledge in SAP ERP would be an advantage.

metadata.job_title: Strategic Planning and Corporate Finance Senior Staff
metadata.original_description:
Assist in the development and refinement of the Group’s strategic plan and roadmaps.
Support scenario planning, market entry analysis, and business case development.
Collaborate with the Enterprise Intelligence department to conduct research and analysis on industry trends, competitors, and internal performance, as well as to gather insights for performance and strategic decision-making.
Build and maintain financial models for initiatives, new projects, and business plans.
Support feasibility studies and investment memos for new ventures, store formats, or joint ventures.
Conduct benchmarking and valuation research as inputs into corporate finance strategy.
Help prepare external presentations, board decks, and JV communication materials.
Support the execution and monitoring of strategic initiatives across departments.

Assist in standardizing project documentation, reporting templates, and initiative scorecards.
Ensure consistent documentation, data updates, and reporting for all assigned projects and models.

Exposure to F&B, retail, multi-company holding is preferred.
Strong proficiency in Excel (modeling, sensitivity analysis) and PowerPoint (business storytelling).
Familiarity with basic financial analysis concepts (NPV, IRR, ROI, payback).
Experience using project management framework and tools is an advantage.
Ability to structure and synthesize data into logical frameworks and executive-ready formats.
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving capabilities.
Highly organized with strong attention to detail and accountability.
Comfortable working with tight deadlines and ambiguity, as well as handling multiple priorities.
Effective communication and coordination skills with cross-functional stakeholders.
